_**User**_

帮我查看digeino的工具，现在有可以通过企业微信发送给个人微信的工具，是否也可以实现一个工具来接收个人微信发送给相同企业微信机器人应用消息的工具，接收到消息后的业务处理先todo，给我一个方案，先不要动代码。digeino是插件，可以支持其他系统调用它。

---

_**Agent (composer-1)**_


查看 digeino 的工具实现，重点了解企业微信发送工具的实现方式，以便制定接收消息的方案。

            "text": "func sendWeComMessageAPI(ctx context.Context, accessToken string, agentID int64, userID string, body map[string]interface{}) error {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "\turl := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/cgi-bin/message/send?access_token=%s\", getWeComAPIHost(), accessToken)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "\tbody[\"touser\"] = userID"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "\tbody[\"agentid\"] = agentID"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {

            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"marshal request: %w\", err)"

          {

            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "\thttpReq, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, \"POST\", url, bytes.NewBuffer(jsonData))"

            "lineNumber": 53,

          {

            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "\thttpReq.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "\tclient := \u0026http.Client{Timeout: 30 * time.Second}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "\tresp, err := client.Do(httpReq)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"call WeCom API: %w\", err)"

            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "\tdefer resp.Body.Close()"

            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "\trespBody, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)"

          {

            "text": "\tif err != nil {"

          {

            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "\thttpReq, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, \"POST\", url, bytes.NewBuffer(jsonData))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"create request: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "\thttpReq.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "\tclient := \u0026http.Client{Timeout: 30 * time.Second}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "\tresp, err := client.Do(httpReq)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"call WeCom API: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "\tdefer resp.Body.Close()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "\trespBody, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"read response: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "\tvar apiResp WeComMessageAPIResponse"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "\tif err := json.Unmarshal(respBody, \u0026apiResp); err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"parse response: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "\tif apiResp.ErrCode != 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom API errcode=%d errmsg=%s\", apiResp.ErrCode, apiResp.ErrMsg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "\treturn nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "// getWeComCustomerApp 获取具备「管理所有客服会话」权限的企业微信应用（用于发送客服消息给个人微信）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "func getWeComCustomerApp() (*workwx.WorkwxApp, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeCom.CorpID == \"\""
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 26,
            "line": 120
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 111,
            "line": 78
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/wx/wecom_message.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.48528429865837097
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# 更新：企业微信推送工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "**日期**: 2026-02-10"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "**类别**: 功能 / 工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "## 概述"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "新增企业微信（WeCom）推送工具，使 DigEino 作为 DigFlow Agent 插件时，能够将 Agent 运行结果通过企业微信应用消息发送给用户。企业微信通过中转到个人微信，相比公众号具有无封号风险、无需 48 小时内互动等优势。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "本更新新增三个 Eino 工具：文字消息、图片消息、文本卡片消息。Token 由 &#96;go-workwx&#96; 库内部管理，无需额外配置。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "## 新功能"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "### 1. 文字消息 (&#96;send_wecom_message&#96;)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "- 发送纯文本消息给企业成员"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "- 超过 850 字自动分条发送（企业微信单条建议上限）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "- 支持指定 &#96;agent_id&#96; 或使用配置中第一个应用"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "### 2. 图片消息 (&#96;send_wecom_image&#96;)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "- 使用临时素材的 &#96;media_id&#96; 发送图片"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "- 需先通过企业微信临时素材上传接口获取 &#96;media_id&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "### 3. 文本卡片消息 (&#96;send_wecom_text_card&#96;)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "- 发送标题 + 描述 + 链接的卡片，适合通知类场景"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "- 用户点击可跳转指定 URL"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "### 4. 客服消息 (&#96;send_wecom_customer_message&#96;) — 发给个人微信用户"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "- 使用企业微信「客户联系」的客服能力，将消息发给**个人微信**用户"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "- 需提供 &#96;open_kf_id&#96;（客服账号 ID）和 &#96;customer_id&#96;（外部联系人 ID）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "- 用户需先通过扫码/链接添加企业为客服后才能收到消息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "- 支持第三方传入 &#96;access_token&#96;（需来自具备「管理所有客服会话」权限的应用）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "- 或配置 &#96;ManageAllKFSession: true&#96; 的应用，由 DigEino 内部获取 token"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "## 修改的组件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "### 新增文件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/wx/wecom_message.go&#96;：企业微信消息发送逻辑（文字、图片、文本卡片）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/wx/wecom_tool.go&#96;：三个 Eino 工具的工厂函数"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "### 更新的文件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "- &#96;config/config.go&#96;：新增 &#96;WeComConfig&#96;、&#96;WeComApplication&#96; 结构体"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "- &#96;config/config.yaml&#96;：新增 &#96;WeCom&#96; 配置块"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/wx/wx_types.go&#96;：新增企业微信相关请求/响应类型"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/tools.go&#96;：在 &#96;BaseTools&#96; 中注册三个企业微信工具"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 45
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/updates/2026-02-10_wecom_push_tool.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.48469066619873047
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 403,
            "text": "func SendWeComCustomerMessage(ctx context.Context, req SendWeComCustomerMessageRequest) (SendWeComCustomerMessageResponse, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 404,
            "text": "\tif req.OpenKfID == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 405,
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeComCustomerMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"open_kf_id is required\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 406,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 407,
            "text": "\tif req.CustomerID == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 408,
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeComCustomerMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"customer_id is required\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 409,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 410,
            "text": "\tif req.Content == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 411,
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeComCustomerMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"content is required\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 412,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 413
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 414,
            "text": "\t// 第三方传入 token 时直接调客服 API"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 415,
            "text": "\tif req.AccessToken != \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 416,
            "text": "\t\tif utf8.RuneCountInString(req.Content) \u003e maxTextLength {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 417,
            "text": "\t\t\tparts := splitMsg(req.Content, maxTextLength)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 418,
            "text": "\t\t\tfor _, part := range parts {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 419,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tbody := map[string]interface{}{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 420,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\t\"msgtype\": \"text\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 421,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\t\"text\":    map[string]string{\"content\": part},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 422,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 423,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tif err := sendWeComCustomerMessageAPI(ctx, req.AccessToken, req.OpenKfID, req.CustomerID, body); err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 424,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\treturn SendWeComCustomerMessageResponse{Success: false, Message: fmt.Sprintf(\"发送失败: %v\", err)}, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 425,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 426,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 427,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeComCustomerMessageResponse{Success: true, Message: fmt.Sprintf(\"成功发送 %d 条消息\", len(parts))}, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 428,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 429,
            "text": "\t\tbody := map[string]interface{}{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 430,
            "text": "\t\t\t\"msgtype\": \"text\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 431,
            "text": "\t\t\t\"text\":    map[string]string{\"content\": req.Content},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 432,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 433,
            "text": "\t\tif err := sendWeComCustomerMessageAPI(ctx, req.AccessToken, req.OpenKfID, req.CustomerID, body); err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 434,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeComCustomerMessageResponse{Success: false, Message: fmt.Sprintf(\"发送失败: %v\", err)}, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 435,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 436,
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeComCustomerMessageResponse{Success: true, Message: \"客服消息发送成功\"}, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 437,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 438
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 439,
            "text": "\t// 内部 token：使用 go-workwx，需配置 ManageAllKFSession"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 440,
            "text": "\tapp, err := getWeComCustomerApp()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 441,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 442,
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeComCustomerMessageResponse{}, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 443,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 444,
            "text": "\trecipient := \u0026workwx.Recipient{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 445,
            "text": "\t\tUserIDs:  []string{req.CustomerID},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 446,
            "text": "\t\tOpenKfID: req.OpenKfID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 447,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 448
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 449,
            "text": "\tif utf8.RuneCountInString(req.Content) \u003e"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 41,
            "line": 448
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 130,
            "line": 401
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/wx/wecom_message.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.48029816150665283
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 443,
            "text": "func sendMessageRequest(ctx context.Context, url string, requestBody map[string]interface{}, openid string) error {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 444,
            "text": "\tjsonData, err := json.Marshal(requestBody)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 445,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 446,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to marshal request: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 447,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 448
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 449,
            "text": "\t// 创建 HTTP 请求"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 450,
            "text": "\thttpReq, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, \"POST\", url, bytes.NewBuffer(jsonData))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 451,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 452,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to create request: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 453,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 454
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 455,
            "text": "\thttpReq.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 456
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 457,
            "text": "\tclient := \u0026http.Client{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 458,
            "text": "\t\tTimeout: 30 * time.Second,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 459,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 460
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 461,
            "text": "\tresp, err := client.Do(httpReq)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 462,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 463,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to call WeChat API: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 464,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 465,
            "text": "\tdefer resp.Body.Close()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 466
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 467,
            "text": "\tbody, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 468,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 469,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to read response body: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 470,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 471
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 472,
            "text": "\tvar apiResp WeChatMessageResponse"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 473,
            "text": "\tif err := json.Unmarshal(body, \u0026apiResp); err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 474,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to parse response: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 475,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 476
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 477,
            "text": "\t// 检查响应"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 478,
            "text": "\tif apiResp.ErrCode != 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 479,
            "text": "\t\t// 处理常见的错误码"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 480,
            "text": "\t\tswitch apiResp.ErrCode {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 481,
            "text": "\t\tcase 45015:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 482,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"用户48小时内未与公众号交互，无法发送客服消息\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 483,
            "text": "\t\tcase 40001:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 484,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"access_token 无效，请检查配置\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 485,
            "text": "\t\tcase 40003:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 486,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"openid 无效: %s\", openid)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 487,
            "text": "\t\tcase 45047:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 488,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"发送消息过于频繁，请稍后再试\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 489,
            "text": "\t\tdefault:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 490,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"WeChat API error: errcode=%d, errmsg=%s\", apiResp.ErrCode, apiResp.ErrMsg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 491,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 492,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 493
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 494,
            "text": "\treturn nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 495,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 494
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 55,
            "line": 441
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/wx/wx_message.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.4743441939353943
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 323,
            "text": "func SendWeChatLinkMessage(ctx context.Context, req SendWeChatLinkMessageRequest) (SendWeChatLinkMessageResponse, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 324,
            "text": "\t// 1. 验证请求参数"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 325,
            "text": "\tif len(req.Articles) == 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 326,
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeChatLinkMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"articles is required and cannot be empty\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 327,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 328,
            "text": "\tif len(req.Articles) \u003e 1 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 329,
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeChatLinkMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"articles count must be 1 or less\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 330,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 331
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 332,
            "text": "\t// 验证文章内容"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 333,
            "text": "\tfor i, article := range req.Articles {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 334,
            "text": "\t\tif article.Title == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 335,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeChatLinkMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"article[%d].title is required\", i)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 336,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 337,
            "text": "\t\tif article.Description == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 338,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeChatLinkMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"article[%d].description is required\", i)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 339,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 340,
            "text": "\t\tif article.PicURL == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 341,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeChatLinkMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"article[%d].picurl is required\", i)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 342,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 343,
            "text": "\t\tif article.URL == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 344,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeChatLinkMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"article[%d].url is required\", i)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 345,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 346,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 347
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 348,
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 349
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 350,
            "text": "\t// 2. 确定接收者列表"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 351,
            "text": "\tvar openids []string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 352,
            "text": "\tif req.OpenID != \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 353,
            "text": "\t\t// 指定了单个 openid"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 354,
            "text": "\t\topenids = []string{req.OpenID}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 355,
            "text": "\t} else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 356,
            "text": "\t\t// 从配置中读取 openid 列表"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 357,
            "text": "\t\topenids = cfg.WeChat.OpenIDs"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 358,
            "text": "\t\tif len(openids) == 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 359,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeChatLinkMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"no openid specified and no openids configured\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 360,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 361,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 362
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 363,
            "text": "\t// 3. 获取 AccessToken（优先使用请求中传入的）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 364,
            "text": "\taccessToken := req.AccessToken"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 365,
            "text": "\tif accessToken == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 366,
            "text": "\t\tvar err error"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 367,
            "text": "\t\taccessToken, err = GetAccessToken(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 368,
            "text": "\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 369,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeChatLinkMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to get access token: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 370,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 371,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 372
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 373,
            "text": "\t// 4. 逐个发送消息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 374,
            "text": "\tvar sentTo []string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 375,
            "text": "\tvar failedTo []FailedMessage"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 376
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 377,
            "text": "\tfor _, openid := range openids {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 378,
            "text": "\t\terr := sendLinkMessageToUser(ctx, accessToken, openid, req.Articles)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 379,
            "text": "\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 380,
            "text": "\t\t\tfailedTo = append(failedTo, FailedMessage{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 381,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tOpenID: openid,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 382,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tReason: err.Error(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 383,
            "text": "\t\t\t})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 384,
            "text": "\t\t} else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 385,
            "text": "\t\t\tsentTo = append(sentTo, openid)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 386,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 387,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 388
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 389,
            "text": "\t// 5. 构建响应"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 390,
            "text": "\tresponse := SendWeChatLinkMessageResponse{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 391,
            "text": "\t\tSuccess:  len(failedTo) == 0,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 392,
            "text": "\t\tSentTo:   sentTo,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 393,
            "text": "\t\tFailedTo: failedTo,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 394,
            "text": "\t}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 393
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 55,
            "line": 321
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/wx/wx_message.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.47367793321609497
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package wx"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\t\"bytes\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\t\"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "\t\"encoding/json\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\t\"fmt\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "\t\"io\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\t\"net/http\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "\t\"time\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "\t\"unicode/utf8\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/whyiyhw/go-workwx\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "const maxTextLength = 850 // 企业微信单条消息建议不超过 850 字符"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "// getWeComAgentID 解析 agentID，若为 0 则从配置取第一个"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "func getWeComAgentID(agentID int64) (int64, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "\tif agentID != 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "\t\treturn agentID, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\tif len(cfg.WeCom.Applications) == 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "\t\treturn 0, fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom Applications not configured\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\treturn cfg.WeCom.Applications[0].AgentID, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "// getWeComAPIHost 获取企业微信 API 地址"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "func getWeComAPIHost() string {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeCom.QYAPIHost != \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "\t\treturn cfg.WeCom.QYAPIHost"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "\treturn \"https://qyapi.weixin.qq.com\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "// sendWeComMessageAPI 直接调用企业微信 API 发送消息（用于第三方传入 token）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "func sendWeComMessageAPI(ctx context.Context, accessToken string, agentID int64, userID string, body map[string]interface{}) error {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "\turl := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/cgi-bin/message/send?access_token=%s\","
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 62,
            "line": 41
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/wx/wecom_message.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.4593043327331543
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 390,
            "text": "\tresponse := SendWeChatLinkMessageResponse{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 391,
            "text": "\t\tSuccess:  len(failedTo) == 0,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 392,
            "text": "\t\tSentTo:   sentTo,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 393,
            "text": "\t\tFailedTo: failedTo,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 394,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 395
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 396,
            "text": "\tif len(sentTo) \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026 len(failedTo) == 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 397,
            "text": "\t\tresponse.Message = fmt.Sprintf(\"成功发送图文链接消息给 %d 个用户\", len(sentTo))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 398,
            "text": "\t} else if len(sentTo) \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026 len(failedTo) \u003e 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 399,
            "text": "\t\tresponse.Message = fmt.Sprintf(\"部分成功：成功发送给 %d 个用户，失败 %d 个\", len(sentTo), len(failedTo))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 400,
            "text": "\t} else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 401,
            "text": "\t\tresponse.Message = fmt.Sprintf(\"发送失败：所有 %d 个用户都发送失败\", len(failedTo))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 402,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 403
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 404,
            "text": "\treturn response, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 405,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 406
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 407,
            "text": "// sendLinkMessageToUser 向单个用户发送图文链接消息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 408,
            "text": "func sendLinkMessageToUser(ctx context.Context, accessToken, openid string, articles []LinkMessageArticle) error {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 409,
            "text": "\tif openid == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 410,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"openid is required\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 411,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 412,
            "text": "\tif len(articles) == 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 413,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"articles is required\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 414,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 415
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 416,
            "text": "\t// 微信客服消息接口"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 417,
            "text": "\turl := fmt.Sprintf(\"https://api.weixin.qq.com/cgi-bin/message/custom/send?access_token=%s\", accessToken)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 418
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 419,
            "text": "\t// 构建文章列表"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 420,
            "text": "\tarticlesList := make([]map[string]string, len(articles))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 421,
            "text": "\tfor i, article := range articles {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 422,
            "text": "\t\tarticlesList[i] = map[string]string{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 423,
            "text": "\t\t\t\"title\":       article.Title,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 424,
            "text": "\t\t\t\"description\": article.Description,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 425,
            "text": "\t\t\t\"picurl\":      article.PicURL,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 426,
            "text": "\t\t\t\"url\":         article.URL,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 427,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 428,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 429
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 430,
            "text": "\t// 构建请求体"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 431,
            "text": "\trequestBody := map[string]interface{}{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 432,
            "text": "\t\t\"touser\":  openid,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 433,
            "text": "\t\t\"msgtype\": \"news\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 434,
            "text": "\t\t\"news\": map[string]interface{}{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 435,
            "text": "\t\t\t\"articles\": articlesList,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 436,
            "text": "\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 437,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 438
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 439,
            "text": "\treturn sendMessageRequest(ctx, url, requestBody, openid)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 440,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 441
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 442,
            "text": "// sendMessageRequest 通用的发送消息请求函数"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 443,
            "text": "func sendMessageRequest(ctx context.Context, url string, requestBody map[string]interface{}, openid string) error {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 444,
            "text": "\tjsonData, err := json.Marshal(requestBody)"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 43,
            "line": 443
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 19,
            "line": 388
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/wx/wx_message.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.4544881582260132
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# 企业微信员工发给客户消息 - 实现方案"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "## 一、chatgpt-wechat-main 调研结论"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "**chatgpt-wechat-main 未实现该功能。** 其仅包含："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "- **客服消息**：&#96;SendCustomerChatMessage(openKfID, customerID, msg)&#96;，使用 &#96;cgi-bin/kf/send_msg&#96;，面向「用户添加企业为客服」的场景"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "- **应用消息**：&#96;SendToWeComUser(agentID, userID, msg)&#96;，面向企业成员"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "- **GetCustomerList**：获取客服账号列表 (&#96;kf/account/list&#96;)，不是外部联系人列表"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "无任何 &#96;externalcontact&#96;、&#96;external_contact&#96;、客户联系相关服务端实现。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "## 二、企业微信两种「发给个人微信」场景对比"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "flowchart TB"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "    subgraph 客服场景"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "        KF[用户扫码添加企业为客服]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "        KFAPI[\"cgi-bin/kf/send_msg\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "        KFID[open_kf_id + customer_id]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "        KF --\u003e KFAPI"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "        KFAPI --\u003e KFID"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "    end"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "    subgraph 员工场景"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "        EC[用户扫码添加员工为好友]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "        ECAPI[\"cgi-bin/externalcontact/add_msg_template\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "        ECID[sender + external_userid]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "        EC --\u003e ECAPI"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "        ECAPI --\u003e ECID"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "    end"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "| 维度     | 客服消息（已实现）      | 员工发客户（待实现）                          |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "| -------- | ----------------------- | --------------------------------------------- |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "| 添加方式 | 用户添加企业为客服      | 用户添加员工为好友                            |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "| API      | &#96;cgi-bin/kf/send_msg&#96;   | &#96;cgi-bin/externalcontact/add_msg_template&#96; 等 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "| 凭证     | 应用 ManageAllKFSession | **客户联系 secret**                           |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "| 参数     | open_kf_id, customer_id | sender (员工 userid), external_userid         |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "| **多轮对话** | 支持 | 不支持 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "| **限制** | 用户发消息后 48 小时内最多回复 5 条，用户续发可再回复 | 每位客户每天最多 1 条，单向群发 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "### 2.1 多轮对话与限制说明"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "**客服消息**（&#96;kf/send_msg&#96;）支持多轮对话：用户主动发消息后 48 小时内，企业可回复最多 5 条；用户继续发消息可再次回复。适合对话式客服场景。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "**员工发客户**（&#96;add_msg_template&#96;）不支持多轮：无论单独发 1 个还是群发多个，都走群发流程，受「每位客户每天 1 条」限制，是单向群发，非对话模式。企业微信目前没有服务端「员工-客户单聊即时发送」API。"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 49
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/企业微信员工发客户消息方案.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.4539041519165039
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package wx"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\t\"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\t\"fmt\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "// NewWeChatMessageTool 创建微信推送工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "func NewWeChatMessageTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeChat.Enabled == nil || !*cfg.WeChat.Enabled {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeChat tool is not enabled in config\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeChat.AppID == \"\" || cfg.WeChat.AppSecret == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeChat AppID or AppSecret not configured\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\treturn utils.InferTool("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "\t\t\"send_wechat_message\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\t\t\"通过微信服务号推送文字消息给指定的用户openid。支持发送给单个用户或配置中的所有用户。注意：用户需要在48小时内与公众号有交互才能接收客服消息。\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "\t\tfunc(ctx context.Context, req *SendWeChatTextMessageRequest) (*SendWeChatTextMessageResponse, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "\t\t\tresp, err := SendWeChatTextMessage(ctx, *req)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\t\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\t\t\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn \u0026resp, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "\t)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 33
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/wx/tool.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.44987499713897705
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "- 实现 &#96;getExternalContactAccessToken()&#96;：用 &#96;ExternalContactSecret&#96; 获取 token"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "- 实现 &#96;SendWeComExternalContactMessage()&#96;：单独发送，调用 &#96;add_msg_template&#96;（传 1 个 external_userid）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "- 实现 &#96;SendWeComExternalContactBroadcast()&#96;：群发，调用 &#96;add_msg_template&#96;（传多个 external_userid）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "- 可选：支持 add_msg_template 的异步流程（任务创建 → 状态查询）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "### 4. 新增工具（wecom_tool.go）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "| 工具名 | 用途 | 参数 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "|--------|------|------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "| &#96;send_wecom_external_contact_message&#96; | 单独发送 | sender, external_userid （单个）, content |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "| &#96;send_wecom_external_contact_broadcast&#96; | 群发 | sender, external_userids （数组）, content |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "**工具一：单独发送**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "func NewWeComExternalContactMessageTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "- 工具名：&#96;send_wecom_external_contact_message&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "- 描述：通过企业微信客户联系，由指定员工向**单个**已添加该员工的客户发送文字消息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "**工具二：群发**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "func NewWeComExternalContactBroadcastTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168,
            "text": "- 工具名：&#96;send_wecom_external_contact_broadcast&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "- 描述：通过企业微信客户联系，由指定员工向**多个**已添加该员工的客户群发文字消息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "### 5. 可选能力"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "- 获取员工客户列表：&#96;GET /cgi-bin/externalcontact/list?userid=xxx&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177,
            "text": "## 五、实现注意事项"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179,
            "text": "1. **go-workwx 支持**：需确认 whyiyhw/go-workwx 或 xen0n/go-workwx 是否封装 &#96;externalcontact&#96;；若无，需手写 HTTP 请求。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180,
            "text": "2. **限制**：同一成员对同一客户每日群发上限 1 条，需做限频或提示。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181,
            "text": "3. **external_userid 获取**：调用方需已有 external_userid；可考虑增加「获取员工客户列表」工具供上游使用。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182,
            "text": "4. **权限**：成员需开通客户联系，且客户需已添加该成员。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": "5. **两工具共用**：单独发送与群发共用 &#96;add_msg_template&#96;，仅 external_userid 数量不同。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187,
            "text": "## 六、建议实施顺序"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 189,
            "text": "1. 配置 &#96;ExternalContactSecret&#96; 与相关结构体"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 189
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 140
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/企业微信员工发客户消息方案.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.449108362197876
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package wx"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\t\"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\t\"fmt\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils\""
          },
          {

            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "// NewWeComMessageTool 创建企业微信文字消息发送工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "func NewWeComMessageTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeCom.Enabled == nil || !*cfg.WeCom.Enabled {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom tool is not enabled in config\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeCom.CorpID == \"\" || len(cfg.WeCom.Applications) == 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom CorpID or Applications not configured\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "\treturn utils.InferTool("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\t\t\"send_wecom_message\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "\t\t\"通过企业微信应用消息发送文字给指定的企业成员。user_id 为企业成员 ID，由 DigFlow 等调用方从会话上下文传入。支持超过 850 字时自动分条发送。\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\t\tfunc(ctx context.Context, req *SendWeComMessageRequest) (*SendWeComMessageResponse, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "\t\t\tresp, err := SendWeComMessage(ctx, *req)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "\t\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\t\t\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn \u0026resp, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "\t)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "// NewWeComImageTool 创建企业微信图片消息发送工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "func NewWeComImageTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeCom.Enabled == nil || !*cfg.WeCom.Enabled {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom tool is not enabled in config\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeCom.CorpID == \"\" || len(cfg.WeCom.Applications) == 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom CorpID or Applications not configured\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\treturn utils.InferTool("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "\t\t\"send_wecom_image\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "\t\t\"通过企业微信应用消息发送图片给指定的企业成员。需要先通过临时素材上传接口获取 media_id。\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\t\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "\t\t\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "// NewWeComTextCardTool 创建企业微信文本卡片消息发送工具"
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 355,
            "text": "func SendWeComTextCard(ctx context.Context, req SendWeComTextCardRequest) (SendWeComTextCardResponse, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 356,
            "text": "\tif req.UserID == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 357,
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeComTextCardResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"user_id is required\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 358,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 359,
            "text": "\tif req.Title == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 360,
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeComTextCardResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"title is required\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 361,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 362,
            "text": "\tif req.Description == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 363,
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeComTextCardResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"description is required\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 364,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 365,
            "text": "\tif req.URL == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 366,
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeComTextCardResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"url is required\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 367,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 368
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 369,
            "text": "\tagentID, err := getWeComAgentID(req.AgentID)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 370,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 371,
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeComTextCardResponse{}, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 372,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 373
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 374,
            "text": "\tif req.AccessToken != \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 375,
            "text": "\t\tbody := map[string]interface{}{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 376,
            "text": "\t\t\t\"msgtype\": \"textcard\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 377,
            "text": "\t\t\t\"textcard\": map[string]string{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 378,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\"title\":       req.Title,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 379,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\"description\": req.Description,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 380,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\"url\":         req.URL,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 381,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\"btntxt\":      \"详情\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 382,
            "text": "\t\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 383,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 384,
            "text": "\t\tif err := sendWeComMessageAPI(ctx, req.AccessToken, agentID, req.UserID, body); err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 385,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeComTextCardResponse{Success: false, Message: fmt.Sprintf(\"发送失败: %v\", err)}, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 386,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 387,
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeComTextCardResponse{Success: true, Message: \"文本卡片消息发送成功\"}, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 388,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 389
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 390,
            "text": "\tapp, err := getWeComApp(req.AgentID)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 391,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 392,
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeComTextCardResponse{}, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 393,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 394,
            "text": "\trecipient := \u0026workwx.Recipient{UserIDs: []string{req.UserID}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 395,
            "text": "\tif err := app.SendTextCardMessage(recipient, req.Title, req.Description, req.URL, \"详情\", false); err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 396,
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeComTextCardResponse{Success: false, Message: fmt.Sprintf(\"发送失败: %v\", err)}, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 397,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 398,
            "text": "\treturn SendWeComTextCardResponse{Success: true, Message: \"文本卡片消息发送成功\"}, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 399,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 400
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 401,
            "text": "// SendWeComCustomerMessage 发送企业微信客服消息（发给个人微信用户）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 402,
            "text": "// 使用企业微信「客户联系」的客服能力，用户需先通过扫码/链接添加企业为客服后才可收到消息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 403,
            "text": "func SendWeComCustomerMessage(ctx context.Context, req SendWeComCustomerMessageRequest) (SendWeComCustomerMessageResponse, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 404,
            "text": "\tif req.OpenKfID == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 405,
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeComCustomerMessageResponse{},"
          }
        ],
