    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "func getWeComApp(agentID int64) (*workwx.WorkwxApp, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202,
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203,
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeCom.CorpID == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom CorpID not configured\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "\tif len(cfg.WeCom.Applications) == 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom Applications not configured\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": "\tvar corpSecret string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211,
            "text": "\tvar targetAgentID int64"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212,
            "text": "\tif agentID != 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "\t\tfor _, app := range cfg.WeCom.Applications {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "\t\t\tif app.AgentID == agentID {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tcorpSecret = app.AgentSecret"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216,
            "text": "\t\t\t\ttargetAgentID = app.AgentID"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tbreak"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220,
            "text": "\t\tif corpSecret == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom application with AgentID %d not found\", agentID)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223,
            "text": "\t} else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224,
            "text": "\t\tapp := cfg.WeCom.Applications[0]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225,
            "text": "\t\tcorpSecret = app.AgentSecret"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226,
            "text": "\t\ttargetAgentID = app.AgentID"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229,
            "text": "\tif corpSecret == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 230,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom AgentSecret not configured\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 231,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 233,
            "text": "\tvar wx *workwx.Workwx"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234,
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeCom.QYAPIHost != \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235,
            "text": "\t\twx = workwx.New(cfg.WeCom.CorpID, workwx.WithQYAPIHost(cfg.WeCom.QYAPIHost))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236,
            "text": "\t} else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237,
            "text": "\t\twx = workwx.New(cfg.WeCom.CorpID)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "text": "\treturn wx.WithApp(corpSecret, targetAgentID), nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 242,
            "text": "// splitMsg 按字符数切割消息（支持多字节字符）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 243,
            "text": "func splitMsg(s string, maxLen int) []string {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244,
            "text": "\tvar result []string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245,
            "text": "\trunes := []rune(s)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 246,
            "text": "\tfor len(runes) \u003e maxLen {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247,
            "text": "\t\tresult = append(result, string(runes[:maxLen]))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248,
            "text": "\t\trunes = runes[maxLen:]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250,
            "text": "\tif len(runes) \u003e 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251,
            "text": "\t\tresult = append(result, string(runes))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253,
            "text": "\treturn result"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 255
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256,
            "text": "// SendWeComMessage 发送企业微信文字消息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 257,
            "text": "func SendWeComMessage(ctx context.Context, req SendWeComMessageRequest) (SendWeComMessageResponse, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258,
            "text": "\tif req.UserID == \"\""
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 20,
            "line": 257
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 48,
            "line": 199
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/wx/wecom_message.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.44188404083251953
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "func sendImageMessageToUser(ctx context.Context, accessToken, openid, mediaID string) error {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "\tif openid == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"openid is required\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176,
            "text": "\tif mediaID == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"media_id is required\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180,
            "text": "\t// 微信客服消息接口"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181,
            "text": "\turl := fmt.Sprintf(\"https://api.weixin.qq.com/cgi-bin/message/custom/send?access_token=%s\", accessToken)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": "\t// 构建请求体"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184,
            "text": "\trequestBody := map[string]interface{}{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185,
            "text": "\t\t\"touser\":  openid,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186,
            "text": "\t\t\"msgtype\": \"image\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187,
            "text": "\t\t\"image\": map[string]string{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188,
            "text": "\t\t\t\"media_id\": mediaID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 189,
            "text": "\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 190,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 191
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 192,
            "text": "\treturn sendMessageRequest(ctx, url, requestBody, openid)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 194
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195,
            "text": "// SendWeChatMiniProgramPage 发送微信小程序卡片消息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 196,
            "text": "func SendWeChatMiniProgramPage(ctx context.Context, req SendWeChatMiniProgramPageRequest) (SendWeChatMiniProgramPageResponse, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "\t// 1. 验证请求参数"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198,
            "text": "\tif req.Title == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199,
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeChatMiniProgramPageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"title is required\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202,
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204,
            "text": "\t// 2. 确定小程序配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "\tappID := req.AppID"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "\tif appID == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "\t\tappID = cfg.WeChat.MiniProgram.AppID"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "\t\tif appID == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeChatMiniProgramPageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"appid is required (either in request or config)\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "\tpagePath := req.PagePath"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "\tif pagePath == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215,
            "text": "\t\tpagePath = cfg.WeChat.MiniProgram.DefaultPath"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216,
            "text": "\t\tif pagePath == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeChatMiniProgramPageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"pagepath is required (either in request or config)\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "text": "\tthumbMediaID := req.ThumbMediaID"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "\tif thumbMediaID == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223,
            "text": "\t\tthumbMediaID = cfg.WeChat.MiniProgram.ThumbMediaID"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224,
            "text": "\t\tif thumbMediaID == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeChatMiniProgramPageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"thumb_media_id is required (either in request or config)\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229,
            "text": "\t// 3. 确定接收者列表"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 230,
            "text": "\tvar openids []string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 231,
            "text": "\tif req.OpenID != \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232,
            "text": "\t\t// 指定了单个 openid"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 27,
            "line": 231
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 59,
            "line": 170
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/wx/wx_message.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.4414931535720825
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "func SendWeChatImageMessage(ctx context.Context, req SendWeChatImageMessageRequest) (SendWeChatImageMessageResponse, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "\t// 1. 验证请求参数"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "\tif req.MediaID == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeChatImageMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"media_id is required\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "\t// 2. 确定接收者列表"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "\tvar openids []string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "\tif req.OpenID != \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "\t\t// 指定了单个 openid"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "\t\topenids = []string{req.OpenID}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "\t} else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "\t\t// 从配置中读取 openid 列表"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "\t\topenids = cfg.WeChat.OpenIDs"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "\t\tif len(openids) == 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeChatImageMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"no openid specified and no openids configured\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "\t// 3. 获取 AccessToken（优先使用请求中传入的）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "\taccessToken := req.AccessToken"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "\tif accessToken == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "\t\tvar err error"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "\t\taccessToken, err = GetAccessToken(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeChatImageMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to get access token: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "\t// 4. 逐个发送消息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "\tvar sentTo []string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "\tvar failedTo []FailedMessage"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "\tfor _, openid := range openids {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "\t\terr := sendImageMessageToUser(ctx, accessToken, openid, req.MediaID)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "\t\t\tfailedTo = append(failedTo, FailedMessage{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tOpenID: openid,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tReason: err.Error(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "\t\t\t})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "\t\t} else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "\t\t\tsentTo = append(sentTo, openid)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "\t// 5. 构建响应"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "\tresponse := SendWeChatImageMessageResponse{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "\t\tSuccess:  len(failedTo) == 0,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "\t\tSentTo:   sentTo,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "\t\tFailedTo: failedTo,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "\tif len(sentTo) \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026 len(failedTo) == 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "\t\tresponse.Message = fmt.Sprintf(\"成功发送图片消息给 %d 个用户\", len(sentTo))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "\t} else if len(sentTo) \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026 len(failedTo) \u003e 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "\t\tresponse.Message = fmt.Sprintf(\"部分成功：成功发送给 %d 个用户，失败 %d 个\", len(sentTo), len(failedTo))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "\t} else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "\t\tresponse.Message = fmt.Sprintf(\"发送失败：所有 %d 个用户都发送失败\", len(failedTo))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168,
            "text": "\treturn response, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "// sendImageMessageToUser 向单个用户发送图片消息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "func sendImageMessageToUser(ctx context.Context, accessToken, openid, mediaID string) error {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "\tif openid == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"openid is required\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "\t}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 174
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 50,
            "line": 104
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/wx/wx_message.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.43874019384384155
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# 更新：access_token 支持第三方传入"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "**日期**: 2026-02-10"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "**类别**: 功能增强 / 工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "## 概述"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "公众号（OA）和企业微信（WeCom）的发送工具现已支持通过请求参数传入 &#96;access_token&#96;。当调用方已有自己的 token 管理（如 chatgpt-wechat、DigFlow 等）时，可直接传入 token，无需 DigEino 内部获取，便于统一 token 策略、避免多端重复获取。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "## 新功能"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "### 请求参数新增 &#96;access_token&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "所有发送接口的请求体中均新增可选字段 &#96;access_token&#96;："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "- **公众号**：&#96;SendWeChatTextMessageRequest&#96;、&#96;SendWeChatImageMessageRequest&#96;、&#96;SendWeChatMiniProgramPageRequest&#96;、&#96;SendWeChatLinkMessageRequest&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "- **企业微信**：&#96;SendWeComMessageRequest&#96;、&#96;SendWeComImageMessageRequest&#96;、&#96;SendWeComTextCardRequest&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "**优先级**：若请求中提供了 &#96;access_token&#96;，则优先使用；否则仍由 DigEino 内部自动获取（公众号从缓存/API，企业微信由 go-workwx 管理）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "## 修改的组件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "### 更新的文件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/wx/wx_types.go&#96;：各 Request 类型新增 &#96;AccessToken string&#96; 字段"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/wx/wx_message.go&#96;：公众号发送逻辑中，优先使用 &#96;req.AccessToken&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/wx/wecom_message.go&#96;：企业微信发送逻辑中，若传入 token 则直接调 API，否则使用 go-workwx"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "### 新增类型"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "- &#96;WeComMessageAPIResponse&#96;：企业微信发送消息 API 的响应结构"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "## 使用示例"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "### 公众号"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "req := wx.SendWeChatTextMessageRequest{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "    OpenID:      \"user_openid\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "    Content:     \"消息内容\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "    AccessToken: \"第三方获取的 token\",  // 可选"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "resp, err := wx.SendWeChatTextMessage(ctx, req)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "### 企业微信"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "req := wx.SendWeComMessageRequest{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "    UserID:      \"ZhangSan\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "    Content:     \"消息内容\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "    AccessToken: \"第三方获取的 token\",  // 可选"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "resp, err := wx.SendWeComMessage(ctx, req)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "### Agent 工具调用（JSON）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;json"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "  \"user_id\": \"ZhangSan\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "  \"content\": \"任务已完成\","
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 60
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/updates/2026-02-10_access_token_third_party.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.435499906539917
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 287,
            "text": "func sendMiniProgramPageMessageToUser(ctx context.Context, accessToken, openid, title, appID, pagePath, thumbMediaID string) error {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 288,
            "text": "\tif openid == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 289,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"openid is required\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 290,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 291,
            "text": "\tif title == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 292,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"title is required\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 293,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 294,
            "text": "\tif appID == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 295,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"appid is required\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 296,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 297,
            "text": "\tif pagePath == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 298,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"pagepath is required\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 299,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 300,
            "text": "\tif thumbMediaID == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 301,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"thumb_media_id is required\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 302,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 303
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 304,
            "text": "\t// 微信客服消息接口"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 305,
            "text": "\turl := fmt.Sprintf(\"https://api.weixin.qq.com/cgi-bin/message/custom/send?access_token=%s\", accessToken)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 306
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 307,
            "text": "\t// 构建请求体"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 308,
            "text": "\trequestBody := map[string]interface{}{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 309,
            "text": "\t\t\"touser\":  openid,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 310,
            "text": "\t\t\"msgtype\": \"miniprogrampage\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 311,
            "text": "\t\t\"miniprogrampage\": map[string]string{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 312,
            "text": "\t\t\t\"title\":         title,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 313,
            "text": "\t\t\t\"appid\":         appID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 314,
            "text": "\t\t\t\"pagepath\":      pagePath,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 315,
            "text": "\t\t\t\"thumb_media_id\": thumbMediaID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 316,
            "text": "\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 317,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 318
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 319,
            "text": "\treturn sendMessageRequest(ctx, url, requestBody, openid)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 320,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 321
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 322,
            "text": "// SendWeChatLinkMessage 发送微信图文链接消息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 323,
            "text": "func SendWeChatLinkMessage(ctx context.Context, req SendWeChatLinkMessageRequest) (SendWeChatLinkMessageResponse, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 324,
            "text": "\t// 1. 验证请求参数"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 325,
            "text": "\tif len(req.Articles) == 0"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 26,
            "line": 324
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 78,

    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "func NewWeComTextCardTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeCom.Enabled == nil || !*cfg.WeCom.Enabled {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom tool is not enabled in config\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeCom.CorpID == \"\" || len(cfg.WeCom.Applications) == 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom CorpID or Applications not configured\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "\treturn utils.InferTool("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "\t\t\"send_wecom_text_card\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "\t\t\"通过企业微信应用消息发送文本卡片给指定的企业成员。文本卡片包含标题、描述和可点击的链接，适合通知类场景。\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "\t\tfunc(ctx context.Context, req *SendWeComTextCardRequest) (*SendWeComTextCardResponse, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "\t\t\tresp, err := SendWeComTextCard(ctx, *req)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "\t\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "\t\t\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn \u0026resp, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "\t)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "// NewWeComCustomerMessageTool 创建企业微信客服消息发送工具（发给个人微信用户）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "func NewWeComCustomerMessageTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeCom.Enabled == nil || !*cfg.WeCom.Enabled {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom tool is not enabled in config\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeCom.CorpID == \"\" || len(cfg.WeCom.Applications) == 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom CorpID or Applications not configured\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "\treturn utils.InferTool("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "\t\t\"send_wecom_customer_message\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "\t\t\"通过企业微信客服消息发送文字给个人微信用户。需使用 open_kf_id（客服账号ID）和 customer_id（外部联系人ID）。用户需先通过扫码/链接添加企业为客服后才能收到消息。支持超过 850 字时自动分条发送。\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "\t\tfunc(ctx context.Context, req *SendWeComCustomerMessageRequest) (*SendWeComCustomerMessageResponse, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "\t\t\tresp, err := SendWeComCustomerMessage(ctx, *req)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "\t\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "\t\t\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn \u0026resp, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "\t)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "// NewWeComCustomerImageTool 创建企业微信客服图片消息发送工具（发给个人微信用户）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "func NewWeComCustomerImageTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeCom.Enabled == nil || !*cfg.WeCom.Enabled"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 51,
            "line": 106
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 72,

        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/wx/wecom_tool.go",

      },

    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "**web_search 引擎选择**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "| 引擎 | 特点 | 配置 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "|------|------|------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "| Bocha | 国内服务，中文友好 | &#96;Tools.WebSearch.Bocha.ApiKey&#96; |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "| Firecrawl | 与 scrape 共用 ApiKey | &#96;Tools.Firecrawl.ApiKey&#96; |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "| **Tavily** | 面向 AI、低延迟、英文/国际搜索 | &#96;Tools.WebSearch.Tavily.ApiKey&#96; 或 &#96;TAVILY_API_KEY&#96; |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "| SerpApi/Google | 依赖第三方 API | 各自 ApiKey |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "## 2. 智能 UI/UX 设计 (UI/UX Design)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "基于 AI 的设计知识库检索与设计系统自动生成工具。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "| 工具名称 | 功能描述 | 主要参数 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "| :--- | :--- | :--- |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "| &#96;ui_ux_search&#96; | 检索 UI/UX 知识库（样式、配色、字体、交互、落地页模式等）。 | &#96;query&#96;: 检索词; &#96;stack&#96;: 技术栈(如 tailwind) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "| &#96;generate_design_system&#96; | 为特定产品需求生成完整的 UI/UX 设计系统。 | &#96;query&#96;: 需求描述; &#96;project_name&#96;: 项目名 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "| &#96;persist_design_system&#96; | 将生成的设计系统持久化为 &#96;MASTER.md&#96; 及页面覆盖文件。 | &#96;project_name&#96;: 项目名; &#96;page_name&#96;: 页面名 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "## 3. 社交推送与通知 (Messaging \u0026 Push)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "支持 WeChat 公众号及 WeCom（企业微信）的多种消息类型推送。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "### 3.1 企业微信 (WeCom)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "| 工具名称 | 功能描述 | 主要参数 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "| :--- | :--- | :--- |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "| &#96;send_wecom_message&#96; | 发送企业微信应用消息（文字）。 | &#96;user_id&#96;: 成员ID; &#96;content&#96;: 文本内容 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "| &#96;send_wecom_image&#96; | 发送图片消息。 | &#96;user_id&#96;: 成员ID; &#96;media_id&#96;: 临时素材ID |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "| &#96;send_wecom_text_card&#96; | 发送文本卡片（带链接和描述）。 | &#96;user_id&#96;: 成员ID; &#96;title&#96;: 标题; &#96;url&#96;: 链接 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "| &#96;send_wecom_customer_message&#96; | **客服消息**。发送给添加了客服的个人微信用户。 | &#96;customer_id&#96;: 外部ID; &#96;content&#96;: 文本内容 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "### 3.2 个人微信 (WeChat)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "| 工具名称 | 功能描述 | 主要参数 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "| :--- | :--- | :--- |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "| &#96;send_wechat_message&#96; | 通过微信服务号推送文字消息给关注用户。 | &#96;openid&#96;: 用户识别码; &#96;content&#96;: 文本内容 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "## 4. 如何在 Go 项目中集成 (Integration Guide)"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 73
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 26
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/tools_info.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.4310455024242401
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 231,
            "text": "\tif req.OpenID != \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232,
            "text": "\t\t// 指定了单个 openid"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 233,
            "text": "\t\topenids = []string{req.OpenID}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234,
            "text": "\t} else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235,
            "text": "\t\t// 从配置中读取 openid 列表"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236,
            "text": "\t\topenids = cfg.WeChat.OpenIDs"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237,
            "text": "\t\tif len(openids) == 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeChatMiniProgramPageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"no openid specified and no openids configured\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 242,
            "text": "\t// 4. 获取 AccessToken（优先使用请求中传入的）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 243,
            "text": "\taccessToken := req.AccessToken"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244,
            "text": "\tif accessToken == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245,
            "text": "\t\tvar err error"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 246,
            "text": "\t\taccessToken, err = GetAccessToken(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247,
            "text": "\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeChatMiniProgramPageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to get access token: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252,
            "text": "\t// 5. 逐个发送消息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253,
            "text": "\tvar sentTo []string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254,
            "text": "\tvar failedTo []FailedMessage"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 255
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256,
            "text": "\tfor _, openid := range openids {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 257,
            "text": "\t\terr := sendMiniProgramPageMessageToUser(ctx, accessToken, openid, req.Title, appID, pagePath, thumbMediaID)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258,
            "text": "\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 259,
            "text": "\t\t\tfailedTo = append(failedTo, FailedMessage{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 260,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tOpenID: openid,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tReason: err.Error(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "text": "\t\t\t})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 263,
            "text": "\t\t} else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264,
            "text": "\t\t\tsentTo = append(sentTo, openid)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 266,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 267
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 268,
            "text": "\t// 6. 构建响应"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 269,
            "text": "\tresponse := SendWeChatMiniProgramPageResponse{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 270,
            "text": "\t\tSuccess:  len(failedTo) == 0,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 271,
            "text": "\t\tSentTo:   sentTo,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 272,
            "text": "\t\tFailedTo: failedTo,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 273,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 275,
            "text": "\tif len(sentTo) \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026 len(failedTo) == 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 276,
            "text": "\t\tresponse.Message = fmt.Sprintf(\"成功发送小程序卡片消息给 %d 个用户\", len(sentTo))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 277,
            "text": "\t} else if len(sentTo) \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026 len(failedTo) \u003e 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 278,
            "text": "\t\tresponse.Message = fmt.Sprintf(\"部分成功：成功发送给 %d 个用户，失败 %d 个\", len(sentTo), len(failedTo))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 279,
            "text": "\t} else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 280,
            "text": "\t\tresponse.Message = fmt.Sprintf(\"发送失败：所有 %d 个用户都发送失败\", len(failedTo))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 281,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 282
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 283,
            "text": "\treturn response, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 286,
            "text": "// sendMiniProgramPageMessageToUser 向单个用户发送小程序卡片消息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 287,
            "text": "func sendMiniProgramPageMessageToUser(ctx context.Context, accessToken, openid, title, appID, pagePath, thumbMediaID string) error {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 288,
            "text": "\tif openid == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 289,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"openid is required\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 290,
            "text": "\t}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 289
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 21,
            "line": 229
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/wx/wx_message.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.42924386262893677
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 446,
            "text": "\t\tOpenKfID: req.OpenKfID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 447,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 448
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 449,
            "text": "\tif utf8.RuneCountInString(req.Content) \u003e maxTextLength {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 450,

          {
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "    \"go.uber.org/zap\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212,
            "text": "func init() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "    ctx := context.Background()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215,
            "text": "    // 获取 DigEino 的所有基础工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216,
            "text": "    baseTools, err := digeinoTools.BaseTools(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "    if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218,
            "text": "        logger.Error(\"获取 DigEino 基础工具失败\", zap.Error(err))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219,
            "text": "        return"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "    // 批量注册工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223,
            "text": "    for _, tool := range baseTools {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224,
            "text": "        info, err := tool.Info(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225,
            "text": "        if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226,
            "text": "            logger.Warn(\"获取工具信息失败\", zap.Error(err))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227,
            "text": "            continue"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229,
            "text": "        "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 230,
            "text": "        if err := variable.ToolRegistry.Register(info.Name, tool); err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 231,
            "text": "            logger.Warn(\"工具已存在\", zap.String(\"name\", info.Name))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232,
            "text": "        } else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 233,
            "text": "            logger.Info(\"工具注册成功\", zap.String(\"name\", info.Name))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "text": "**注意**：这种方式会注册 DigEino 的所有基础工具，包括："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240,
            "text": "- &#96;ui_ux_search&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241,
            "text": "- &#96;generate_design_system&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 242,
            "text": "- &#96;persist_design_system&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 243,
            "text": "- &#96;send_wechat_message&#96;（如果配置了微信）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245,
            "text": "### 方式三：使用 UI/UX Agent 工具（推荐）⭐"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 246
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247,
            "text": "**这是最推荐的方式**，Agent 工具会自动完成整个设计系统生成工作流，包括需求分析、生成、补充搜索和持久化。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249,
            "text": "#### 什么是 UI/UX Agent 工具？"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251,
            "text": "&#96;generate_ui_design_system&#96; 是一个智能编排的 Agent 工具，它将整个设计系统生成工作流封装成一个工具。相比单独使用各个工具，Agent 工具的优势是："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253,
            "text": "- ✅ **自动工作流编排**：自动完成需求分析、生成、搜索、持久化"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254,
            "text": "- ✅ **智能决策**：根据用户需求自动决定调用哪些工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 255,
            "text": "- ✅ **完整输出**：一次性返回完整的设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256,
            "text": "- ✅ **简单易用**：只需一个工具调用，无需手动编排"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 257
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258,
            "text": "#### 步骤 1：在 agent.yml 中配置模型"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 259
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 260,
            "text": "在你的应用配置 &#96;app/your_app/config/agent.yml&#96; 中确保有模型配置："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 263,
            "text": "Models:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264,
            "text": "  - Name: \"ui_model\"  # 模型名称，用于 Agent（必须与代码中的名称一致）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265,
            "text": "    "
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 4,
            "line": 264
          },

            "line": 208
          }
