    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# 在 DigFlow 中使用 DigEino UI/UX 工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "本指南说明如何在 DigFlow 项目中使用 DigEino 的 UI/UX 工具。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "## 目录"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "- [前置条件](#前置条件)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "- [快速开始](#快速开始)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "- [使用方式](#使用方式)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "  - [方式一：单独注册工具](#方式一单独注册工具)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "  - [方式二：批量注册所有工具](#方式二批量注册所有工具)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "  - [方式三：使用 UI/UX Agent 工具（推荐）](#方式三使用-uiux-agent-工具推荐)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "- [Agent 工具详解](#agent-工具详解)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "- [配置说明](#配置说明)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "- [使用示例](#使用示例)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "- [故障排查](#故障排查)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "- [参考](#参考)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "## 前置条件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "1. **DigFlow 项目已存在**：确保你已经有一个 DigFlow 项目"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "2. **DigEino 依赖已添加**：DigFlow 的 &#96;go.mod&#96; 中应该已经包含 DigEino 依赖"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "require ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "    github.com/originaleric/digeino v1.0.2  // 或更新版本"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "## 快速开始"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "### 最简单的使用方式"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "**1. 添加依赖**（如果还没有）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "go get github.com/originaleric/digeino"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "**2. 注册工具**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "在你的 DigFlow 应用的 &#96;app/your_app/tools/tool_register.go&#96; 中："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "package tools"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "    \"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/internal/global/variable\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "func init() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "    ctx := context.Background()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "    // 注册 UI/UX 搜索工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "    tool, _ := ui_ux.NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "    variable.ToolRegistry.Register(\"ui_ux_search\", tool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "**3. 在 Agent 中使用**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "在你的 Agent 配置 &#96;app/your_app/config/agent.yml&#96; 中："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "Tools:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "  - Name: \"ui_ux_search\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "    Description: \"检索 UI/UX 设计知识库\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "Nodes:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "  - Key: \"designer\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "    Type: \"chat_model\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "    BindTools:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "      - \"ui_ux_search\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "## 使用方式"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "### 方式一：单独注册工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "适合只需要特定工具的场景。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "#### 步骤 1：创建或编辑工具注册文件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "在你的 DigFlow 应用中创建 &#96;app/your_app/tools/tool_register.go&#96;："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "package tools"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "    \"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "    "
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 93
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.42545440793037415
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "## 4. 如何在 Go 项目中集成 (Integration Guide)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "&#96;DigEino&#96; 的工具集是基于 [CloudWeGo Eino](https://github.com/cloudwego/eino) 框架开发的标准 &#96;tool.BaseTool&#96;。这意味着它们可以被集成到任何使用 Eino 框架的 Go 应用中。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "### 4.1 引入依赖"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "首先，在您的项目中安装 &#96;DigEino&#96;："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "go get github.com/originaleric/digeino"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "### 4.2 初始化配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "&#96;DigEino&#96; 工具依赖于一个全局配置单例。在使用工具前，您需要初始化配置（支持从 YAML 加载或环境变量覆盖）："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "import \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "func main() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "    // 方式 A：从 YAML 文件加载"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "    cfg, _ := config.LoadConfig(\"path/to/your/config.yaml\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "    // 方式 B：手动设置关键参数（如从环境变量读取）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "    cfg := config.Get()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "    cfg.Tools.WebSearch.Engine = \"tavily\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "    cfg.Tools.WebSearch.Tavily.ApiKey = os.Getenv(\"TAVILY_API_KEY\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "    // 或使用 Google: cfg.Tools.WebSearch.Google.ApiKey = \"...\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "    cfg.Tools.Pinecone.ApiKey = os.Getenv(\"PINECONE_KEY\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "### 4.3 获取并使用工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "您可以一次性获取全量工具，或者仅引入特定工具："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/research\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "func useTools(ctx context.Context) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "    // 1. 获取所有通过 BaseTools 注册的工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "    allTools, _ := tools.BaseTools(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "    // 2. 或者初始化特定工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "    grepTool, _ := research.NewGrepSearchTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "    // 3. 在 Eino Agent (Graph) 中使用"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "    // graph.AddChatModelNode(\"model\", model, compose.WithBindTools(allTools))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "### 4.4 兼容性说明"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "所有的工具都返回标准的 &#96;tool.BaseTool&#96; 接口："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "- **Schema 定义**：自动根据 Go 结构体生成 JSON Schema，模型可直接理解。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "- **并发安全**：支持 context 控制和超时刻。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "- **错误处理**：内部已进行安全封装，返回友好的错误提示供模型自我纠错。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "**本工具库旨在为 Golang 生态提供一套开箱即用的「大模型工具箱」，助力开发者快速构建具备调研、设计与推送能力的智能体。**"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 129
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 66
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/tools_info.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.39599230885505676
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 263,
            "text": "Models:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264,
            "text": "  - Name: \"ui_model\"  # 模型名称，用于 Agent（必须与代码中的名称一致）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265,
            "text": "    Type: \"qwen\"      # 或 \"openai\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 266,
            "text": "    Config:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 267,
            "text": "      api_key: \"${QWEN_API_KEY}\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 268,
            "text": "      model: \"qwen-max\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 269,
            "text": "      base_url: \"https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 270,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 271
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 272,
            "text": "#### 步骤 2：注册 Agent 工具（使用 DigFlow 的模型）⭐ 推荐"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 273
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274,
            "text": "**推荐方式**：使用 DigFlow 的 ModelRegistry 获取 ChatModel"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 275
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 276,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 277,
            "text": "package tools"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 278
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 279,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 280,
            "text": "    \"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 281,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 282,
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/internal/global/variable\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 283,
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/internal/utils/logger\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 286,
            "text": "    \"go.uber.org/zap\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 287,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 288
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 289,
            "text": "func init() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 290,
            "text": "    ctx := context.Background()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 291,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 292,
            "text": "    // 从 DigFlow 的 ModelRegistry 获取 ChatModel"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 293,
            "text": "    // 注意：模型名称必须与 agent.yml 中配置的 Model Name 一致"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 294,
            "text": "    chatModel, err := variable.ModelRegistry.GetChatModel(\"ui_model\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 295,
            "text": "    if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 296,
            "text": "        logger.Error(\"获取 ChatModel 失败\", "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 297,
            "text": "            zap.String(\"model_name\", \"ui_model\"),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 298,
            "text": "            zap.Error(err))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 299,
            "text": "        return"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 300,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 301,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 302,
            "text": "    // 创建 UI/UX Agent 工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 303,
            "text": "    agentTool, err := ui_ux.NewUIDesignSystemAgentTool(ctx, chatModel)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 304,
            "text": "    if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 305,
            "text": "        logger.Error(\"创建 UI/UX Agent 工具失败\", zap.Error(err))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 306,
            "text": "        return"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 307,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 308,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 309,
            "text": "    // 注册工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 310,
            "text": "    if err := variable.ToolRegistry.Register(\"generate_ui_design_system\", agentTool); err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 311,
            "text": "        logger.Warn(\"UI/UX Agent 工具已存在\", zap.String(\"name\", \"generate_ui_design_system\"))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 312,
            "text": "    } else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 313,
            "text": "        logger.Info(\"UI/UX Agent 工具注册成功\", zap.String(\"name\", \"generate_ui_design_system\"))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 314,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 315,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 316,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 317
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 318,
            "text": "#### 步骤 3：在 agent.yml 中配置工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 319
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 320,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 321,
            "text": "Tools:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 322,
            "text": "  - Name: \"generate_ui_design_system\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 323,
            "text": "    Description: \"生成完整的 UI/UX 设计系统（智能编排 Agent）\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 324,
            "text": "    UseGlobal: false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 325
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 326,
            "text": "Nodes:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 327,
            "text": "  - Key: \"designer\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 328,
            "text": "    Type: \"chat_model\""
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 328
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 260
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.39203453063964844
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "package tools"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "    \"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/internal/global/variable\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/internal/utils/logger\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "    \"go.uber.org/zap\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "func init() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "    ctx := context.Background()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "    // 注册 UI/UX 搜索工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "    searchTool, err := ui_ux.NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "    if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "        logger.Error(\"创建 UI/UX 搜索工具失败\", zap.Error(err))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "        return"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "    if err := variable.ToolRegistry.Register(\"ui_ux_search\", searchTool); err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "        logger.Warn(\"UI/UX 搜索工具已存在\", zap.String(\"name\", \"ui_ux_search\"))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "    } else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "        logger.Info(\"UI/UX 搜索工具注册成功\", zap.String(\"name\", \"ui_ux_search\"))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "    // 注册设计系统生成工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "    designSystemTool, err := ui_ux.NewGenerateDesignSystemTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "    if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "        logger.Error(\"创建设计系统生成工具失败\", zap.Error(err))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "        return"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "    if err := variable.ToolRegistry.Register(\"generate_design_system\", designSystemTool); err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "        logger.Warn(\"设计系统生成工具已存在\", zap.String(\"name\", \"generate_design_system\"))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "    } else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "        logger.Info(\"设计系统生成工具注册成功\", zap.String(\"name\", \"generate_design_system\"))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "    // 注册设计系统持久化工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "    persistTool, err := ui_ux.NewPersistDesignSystemTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "    if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "        logger.Error(\"创建设计系统持久化工具失败\", zap.Error(err))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "        return"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "    if err := variable.ToolRegistry.Register(\"persist_design_system\", persistTool); err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "        logger.Warn(\"设计系统持久化工具已存在\", zap.String(\"name\", \"persist_design_system\"))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "    } else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "        logger.Info(\"设计系统持久化工具注册成功\", zap.String(\"name\", \"persist_design_system\"))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "#### 步骤 2：在 bootstrap 中导入工具包"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "在 &#96;bootstrap/your_app/init.go&#96; 中导入工具包："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "package yourappbootstrap"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/bootstrap/common\""
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 150
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 87
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.39117860794067383
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "package yourappbootstrap"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/bootstrap/common\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "    _ \"DigFlow/app/your_app/tools\"  // 导入工具包，触发 init() 注册"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "    // ... 其他导入"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "func init() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "    common.InitCommon()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "    // ... 其他初始化逻辑"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "#### 步骤 3：在 agent.yml 中配置工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "在你的应用配置 &#96;app/your_app/config/agent.yml&#96; 中添加工具："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "Tools:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "  - Name: \"ui_ux_search\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168,
            "text": "    Description: \"检索 UI/UX 设计知识库\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "    UseGlobal: false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,
            "text": "  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "  - Name: \"generate_design_system\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "    Description: \"生成完整设计系统\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "    UseGlobal: false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174,
            "text": "  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "  - Name: \"persist_design_system\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176,
            "text": "    Description: \"持久化设计系统到文件\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177,
            "text": "    UseGlobal: false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179,
            "text": "Nodes:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180,
            "text": "  - Key: \"designer\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181,
            "text": "    Type: \"chat_model\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182,
            "text": "    Model: \"qwen-max\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": "    SystemPrompt: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184,
            "text": "      你是一位专业的 UI/UX 设计师。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185,
            "text": "      你可以使用以下工具："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186,
            "text": "      - ui_ux_search: 搜索设计知识库"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187,
            "text": "      - generate_design_system: 生成完整设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188,
            "text": "      - persist_design_system: 持久化设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 189,
            "text": "    BindTools:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 190,
            "text": "      - \"ui_ux_search\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 191,
            "text": "      - \"generate_design_system\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 192,
            "text": "      - \"persist_design_system\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 194
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195,
            "text": "### 方式二：批量注册所有工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 196
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "如果你想要使用 DigEino 提供的所有基础工具（包括 UI/UX 工具和微信工具），可以使用 &#96;BaseTools()&#96; 函数："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200,
            "text": "package tools"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203,
            "text": "    \"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/internal/global/variable\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/internal/utils/logger\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "    digeinoTools \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "    \"go.uber.org/zap\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212,
            "text": "func init() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "    ctx := context.Background()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "    "
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 214
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 146
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.3861137628555298
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "func BaseTools(ctx context.Context) ([]tool.BaseTool, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "\tvar tools []tool.BaseTool"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "\t// 1. UI/UX 设计智能工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\tuiTool, err := ui_ux.NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, uiTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "\t// 1.1. UI/UX 设计系统生成工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "\tdesignSystemTool, err := ui_ux.NewGenerateDesignSystemTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, designSystemTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "\t// 1.2. UI/UX 设计系统持久化工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "\tpersistTool, err := ui_ux.NewPersistDesignSystemTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, persistTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "\t// 2. 微信推送工具（如果已启用）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "\twxTool, err := wx.NewWeChatMessageTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, wxTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "\t// 3. 企业微信推送工具（如果已启用）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "\twecomTool, err := wx.NewWeComMessageTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, wecomTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "\twecomImageTool, err := wx.NewWeComImageTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, wecomImageTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "\twecomTextCardTool, err := wx.NewWeComTextCardTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, wecomTextCardTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "\twecomCustomerTool, err := wx.NewWeComCustomerMessageTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, wecomCustomerTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "\twecomCustomerImageTool, err := wx.NewWeComCustomerImageTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, wecomCustomerImageTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "\twecomCustomerVoiceTool, err := wx.NewWeComCustomerVoiceTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, wecomCustomerVoiceTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "\twecomCustomerVideoTool, err := wx.NewWeComCustomerVideoTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, wecomCustomerVideoTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "\twecomCustomerFileTool, err := wx.NewWeComCustomerFileTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, wecomCustomerFileTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "\twecomCustomerLinkTool, err := wx.NewWeComCustomerLinkTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, wecomCustomerLinkTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "\twecomCustomerMiniprogramTool, err := wx.NewWeComCustomerMiniprogramTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, wecomCustomerMiniprogramTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "\t}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 112
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 58,
            "line": 44
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/tools.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.3857133388519287
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 381,
            "text": "func init() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 382,
            "text": "    ctx := context.Background()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 383,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 384,
            "text": "    // 加载 DigEino 配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 385,
            "text": "    // 注意：需要创建 DigEino 的配置文件 config/digeino.yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 386,
            "text": "    _, err := config.Load(\"config/digeino.yaml\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 387,
            "text": "    if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 388,
            "text": "        logger.Error(\"加载 DigEino 配置失败\", zap.Error(err))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 389,
            "text": "        return"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 390,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 391,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 392,
            "text": "    // 从配置创建 Agent 工具（自动读取 DigEino 配置中的 ChatModel）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 393,
            "text": "    agentTool, err := ui_ux.NewUIDesignSystemAgentToolFromConfig(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 394,
            "text": "    if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 395,
            "text": "        logger.Error(\"创建 UI/UX Agent 工具失败\", zap.Error(err))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 396,
            "text": "        return"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 397,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 398,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 399,
            "text": "    // 注册工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 400,
            "text": "    if err := variable.ToolRegistry.Register(\"generate_ui_design_system\", agentTool); err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 401,
            "text": "        logger.Warn(\"UI/UX Agent 工具已存在\", zap.String(\"name\", \"generate_ui_design_system\"))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 402,
            "text": "    } else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 403,
            "text": "        logger.Info(\"UI/UX Agent 工具注册成功\", zap.String(\"name\", \"generate_ui_design_system\"))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 404,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 405,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 406,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 407
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 408,
            "text": "**DigEino 配置文件** (&#96;config/digeino.yaml&#96;):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 409
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 410,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 411,
            "text": "ChatModel:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 412,
            "text": "  Type: \"qwen\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 413,
            "text": "  Config:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 414,
            "text": "    ApiKey: \"${QWEN_API_KEY}\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 415,
            "text": "    Model: \"qwen-max\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 416,
            "text": "    BaseUrl: \"https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 417
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 418,
            "text": "UIUX:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 419,
            "text": "  Storage:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 420,
            "text": "    BaseDir: \"storage/app/ui_ux\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 421,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 422
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 423,
            "text": "## Agent 工具详解"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 424
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 425,
            "text": "### Agent 工具参数"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 426
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 427,
            "text": "Agent 工具接受以下参数："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 428
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 429,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;json"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 430,
            "text": "{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 431,
            "text": "  \"query\": \"beauty spa wellness service\",      // 必需：用户需求描述"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 432,
            "text": "  \"project_name\": \"Serenity Spa\",              // 可选：项目名称"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 433,
            "text": "  \"stack\": \"react\",                            // 可选：技术栈（react, vue, tailwind 等）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 434,
            "text": "  \"persist\": true,                             // 可选：是否持久化设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 435,
            "text": "  \"page_name\": \"homepage\"                      // 可选：页面名称（用于生成页面覆盖）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 436,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 437,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 438
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 439,
            "text": "**参数说明**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 440,
            "text": "- **query**（必需）：用户需求描述，例如 \"beauty spa wellness service\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 441,
            "text": "- **project_name**（可选）：项目名称，用于生成设计系统和文件命名"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 442,
            "text": "- **stack**（可选）：技术栈，Agent 会自动获取该技术栈的指南"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 443,
            "text": "- **persist**（可选）：是否持久化设计系统到文件"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 443
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 380
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.3763430118560791
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package ui_ux"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\t\"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\t\"fmt\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/model\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/compose\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/schema\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "// UIDesignSystemAgent UI/UX 设计系统生成 Agent"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "// 这是一个编排的 Agent，内部使用工具来完成设计系统生成工作流"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "type UIDesignSystemAgent struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "\tagent compose.Runnable[[]*schema.Message, *schema.Message]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "// NewUIDesignSystemAgent 创建 UI/UX 设计系统生成 Agent"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "// 需要传入 ChatModel，Agent 内部会使用工具进行工作流编排"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "func NewUIDesignSystemAgent(ctx context.Context, chatModel model.ChatModel, additionalTools ...tool.BaseTool) (*UIDesignSystemAgent, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "\t// 准备工具集"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\tallTools := []tool.BaseTool{}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\t// 1. UI/UX 搜索工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "\tsearchTool, err := NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\t\tallTools = append(allTools, searchTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "\t// 2. 设计系统生成工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "\tdesignSystemTool, err := NewGenerateDesignSystemTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\t\tallTools = append(allTools, designSystemTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "\t// 3. 持久化工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "\tpersistTool, err := NewPersistDesignSystemTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "\t\tallTools = append(allTools, persistTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "\t// 4. 添加外部传入的额外工具（如其他项目工具）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "\tallTools = append(allTools, additionalTools...)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "\t// 绑定工具到模型"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "\ttoolInfos := make([]*schema.ToolInfo, 0, len(allTools))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "\tfor _, t := range allTools {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "\t\tif info, err := t.Info(ctx); err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\t\t\ttoolInfos = append(toolInfos, info)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "\tif err := chatModel.BindTools(toolInfos); err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to bind tools: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "\t// 创建工具执行节点"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "\ttoolNode, err := compose.NewToolNode(ctx, \u0026compose.ToolsNodeConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "\t\tTools: allTools,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "\t})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to create tool node: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "\t// 创建 Agent Lambda 节点（手动调用模型和工具）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "\tagentLambda := func(ctx context.Context, input []*schema.Message) (*schema.Message, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "\t\t// 构建消息列表（包含系统提示词）"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 50,
            "line": 66
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/ui_ux/agent.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.3760744035243988
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "\tagentLambda := func(ctx context.Context, input []*schema.Message) (*schema.Message, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "\t\t// 构建消息列表（包含系统提示词）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "\t\tmessages := []*schema.Message{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "\t\t\tschema.SystemMessage(getSystemPrompt()),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "\t\tmessages = append(messages, input...)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "\t\t// 调用模型生成"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "\t\toutput, err := chatModel.Generate(ctx, messages)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"model generate failed: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "\t\t// 如果有工具调用，执行工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "\t\tif len(output.ToolCalls) \u003e 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "\t\t\t// 执行工具（工具节点接受单个消息，返回消息数组）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "\t\t\ttoolResults, err := toolNode.Invoke(ctx, output)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "\t\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"tool execution failed: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "\t\t\t// 将工具结果添加到消息列表，再次调用模型"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "\t\t\tmessages = append(messages, output)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "\t\t\tmessages = append(messages, toolResults...)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "\t\t\t// 再次调用模型处理工具结果（可能需要多轮工具调用）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "\t\t\tfor {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tfinalOutput, err := chatModel.Generate(ctx, messages)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"model generate after tools failed: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t// 如果还有工具调用，继续执行"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tif len(finalOutput.ToolCalls) \u003e 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\ttoolResults, err := toolNode.Invoke(ctx, finalOutput)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"tool execution failed: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tmessages = append(messages, finalOutput)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tmessages = append(messages, toolResults...)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tcontinue"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "\t\t\t\treturn finalOutput, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "\t\treturn output, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "\t// 创建 Graph 工作流"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "\tgraph := compose.NewGraph[[]*schema.Message, *schema.Message]()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "\t_ = graph.AddLambdaNode(\"ui_design_system_agent\", compose.InvokableLambda(agentLambda))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "\t// 编译 Graph 为 Runnable"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "\tcompiledGraph, err := graph.Compile(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to compile graph: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "\treturn \u0026UIDesignSystemAgent{agent: compiledGraph}, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "// NewUIDesignSystemAgentFromConfig 从配置创建 UI/UX 设计系统生成 Agent"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 82,
            "line": 128
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 63,
            "line": 64
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/ui_ux/agent.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
