    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# UI/UX Design System Agent"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "基于 ui_ux_pro_max v2.0 的设计系统生成 Agent，支持完整的工作流编排和工具调用。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "## 功能特性"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "### 1. 核心工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "- **&#96;ui_ux_search&#96;**: 搜索 UI/UX 设计知识库"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "- **&#96;generate_design_system&#96;**: 生成完整设计系统（包含推理引擎）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "- **&#96;persist_design_system&#96;**: 持久化设计系统到文件（Master + Overrides 模式）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "### 2. Agent 编排"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "- **&#96;UIDesignSystemAgent&#96;**: 智能编排的 Agent，自动完成设计系统生成工作流"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "- **&#96;NewUIDesignSystemAgentTool&#96;**: 将 Agent 包装成工具，供其他 Agent 使用"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "## 使用方法"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "### 方式一：直接使用工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "    \"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "// 1. 搜索工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "searchTool, _ := ui_ux.NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "// 使用 searchTool..."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "// 2. 生成设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "designSystemTool, _ := ui_ux.NewGenerateDesignSystemTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "// 使用 designSystemTool..."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "// 3. 持久化设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "persistTool, _ := ui_ux.NewPersistDesignSystemTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "// 使用 persistTool..."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "### 方式二：使用 Agent（推荐）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "**方式 2a：从配置创建（最简单，推荐）**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "    \"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "// 1. 加载配置（通常在应用启动时执行一次）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "_, err := config.Load(\"config/config.yaml\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "    return err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "// 2. 从配置创建 Agent（自动读取 config.yaml 中的 ChatModel 配置）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "agent, err := ui_ux.NewUIDesignSystemAgentFromConfig(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "    return err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "// 3. 调用 Agent"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "result, err := agent.Invoke(ctx, \"生成一个美容spa的设计系统，项目名称：Serenity Spa\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "    return err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "fmt.Println(result.Content)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "**方式 2b：手动传入 ChatModel（向后兼容）**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "    \"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\""
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 78
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/ui_ux/README.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.348574161529541
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "    \"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "    \"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/model\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "    openaiModel \"github.com/cloudwego/eino-ext/components/model/openai\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "// 1. 创建 ChatModel"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "chatModel, err := openaiModel.NewChatModel(ctx, \u0026openaiModel.ChatModelConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "    BaseURL: \"https://api.openai.com/v1\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "    APIKey:  \"your-api-key\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "    Model:   \"gpt-4\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "// 2. 创建 Agent"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "agent, err := ui_ux.NewUIDesignSystemAgent(ctx, chatModel)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "    return err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "// 3. 调用 Agent"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "result, err := agent.Invoke(ctx, \"生成一个美容spa的设计系统，项目名称：Serenity Spa\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "    return err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "fmt.Println(result.Content)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "### 方式三：将 Agent 作为工具使用"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "**方式 3a：从配置创建（推荐）**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "    \"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "    \"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "// 1. 加载配置（通常在应用启动时执行一次）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "_, err := config.Load(\"config/config.yaml\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "    return err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "// 2. 从配置创建 Agent 工具（自动读取 config.yaml 中的 ChatModel 配置）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "agentTool, err := ui_ux.NewUIDesignSystemAgentToolFromConfig(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "    return err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "// 3. 在其他 Agent 中使用"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "tools := []tool.BaseTool{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "    agentTool, // Agent 作为工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "    // 其他工具..."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "// 4. 在其他 Agent 中，LLM 会自动调用这个工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "**方式 3b：手动传入 ChatModel（向后兼容）**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "    \"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "    \"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/model\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "// 1. 创建 ChatModel"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "chatModel, _ := createChatModel(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "// 2. 将 Agent 包装成工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "agentTool, err := ui_ux.NewUIDesignSystemAgentTool(ctx, chatModel)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "    return err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "// 3. 在其他 Agent 中使用"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "tools := []tool.BaseTool{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "    agentTool, // Agent 作为工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "    // 其他工具..."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "// 4. 在其他 Agent 中，LLM 会自动调用这个工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "## Agent 工作流"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "Agent 内部自动执行以下工作流："
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 168
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 75
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/ui_ux/README.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.33713048696517944
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 528,
            "text": "func init() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 529,
            "text": "    // 加载 DigEino 配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 530,
            "text": "    _, err := config.Load(\"config/digeino.yaml\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 531,
            "text": "    if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 532,
            "text": "        logger.Warn(\"加载 DigEino 配置失败，使用默认配置\", zap.Error(err))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 533,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 534,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 535,
            "text": "    // ... 注册工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 536,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 537,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 538
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 539,
            "text": "## 使用示例"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 540
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 541,
            "text": "### 示例 1：使用 UI/UX Agent 工具（推荐）⭐"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 542
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 543,
            "text": "这是最简单的方式，Agent 会自动完成整个工作流："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 544
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 545,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 546,
            "text": "Nodes:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 547,
            "text": "  - Key: \"designer\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 548,
            "text": "    Type: \"chat_model\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 549,
            "text": "    Model: \"ui_model\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 550,
            "text": "    SystemPrompt: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 551,
            "text": "      你是一位专业的 UI/UX 设计师。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 552,
            "text": "      当用户需要生成设计系统时，使用 generate_ui_design_system 工具。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 553,
            "text": "      这个工具会自动完成需求分析、生成设计系统、补充搜索和持久化。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 554,
            "text": "    BindTools:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 555,
            "text": "      - \"generate_ui_design_system\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 556,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 557
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 558,
            "text": "**用户请求示例**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 559,
            "text": "- \"生成一个美容spa的设计系统，项目名称：Serenity Spa\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 560,
            "text": "- \"为我的电商平台生成设计系统，技术栈：react\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 561,
            "text": "- \"生成设计系统并持久化，项目名称：MyApp，页面：homepage\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 562
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 563,
            "text": "**Agent 会自动**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 564,
            "text": "1. 分析需求：识别产品类型（Beauty/Spa）、样式关键词、行业、技术栈"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 565,
            "text": "2. 生成设计系统：调用 &#96;generate_design_system&#96; 生成完整设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 566,
            "text": "3. 补充搜索：根据需要调用 &#96;ui_ux_search&#96; 获取 React 技术栈指南"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 567,
            "text": "4. 返回结果：返回完整的设计系统，包括 Pattern、Style、Colors、Typography、Effects"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 568
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 569,
            "text": "### 示例 2：使用场景"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 570
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 571,
            "text": "#### 场景 1：快速生成设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 572
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 573,
            "text": "**用户请求**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 574,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 575,
            "text": "生成一个电商平台的设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 576,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 577
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 578,
            "text": "**Agent 响应**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 579,
            "text": "- 自动识别产品类型：E-commerce"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 580,
            "text": "- 生成完整设计系统（配色、字体、样式、布局模式）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 581,
            "text": "- 返回格式化的设计系统文档"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 582
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 583,
            "text": "#### 场景 2：生成并持久化设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 584
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 585,
            "text": "**用户请求**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 586,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 587,
            "text": "生成一个 SaaS 产品的设计系统，项目名称：MySaaS，技术栈：react，并持久化"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 588,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 589
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 590,
            "text": "**Agent 响应**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 591,
            "text": "- 生成设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 592,
            "text": "- 获取 React 技术栈指南"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 593,
            "text": "- 持久化到 &#96;storage/app/ui_ux/design-system/mysaas/MASTER.md&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 594,
            "text": "- 返回持久化路径"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 595
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 596,
            "text": "#### 场景 3：生成页面特定设计系统"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 597
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 527
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.3371284008026123
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# Update: UI/UX Design Intelligence Plugin Integration"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "**Date**: 2026-01-11"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "**Category**: Feature / Tools"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "## Summary"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "Integrated a comprehensive UI/UX Design Intelligence engine as a reusable tool within the Digeino framework. This enables any AI agent powered by Digeino to access professional design guidelines, color palettes, typography pairings, and interaction principles."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "## New Features"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "- **Native search engine**: Efficient BM25-based retrieval system for design knowledge."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "- **Embedded Knowledge Base**: 400+ professional design rules and patterns embedded directly into the binary using &#96;//go:embed&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "- **Domain Detection**: Automatic detection of query intent (e.g., distinguishing between a request for \"colors\" vs. \"layout\")."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "- **Stack-Specific Guidelines**: Support for technology-specific advice (React, Vue, Tailwind, SwiftUI, Flutter, etc.)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "- **Eino Tool Wrapper**: Out-of-the-box compatibility with the Eino framework."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "## Components Added"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/ui_ux/bm25.go&#96;: Implementation of the BM25 ranking algorithm."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/ui_ux/detector.go&#96;: Natural language intent detector for design domains."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/ui_ux/service.go&#96;: Core orchestration service managing embedded CSV data."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/ui_ux/tool.go&#96;: Eino-compliant tool factory."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/ui_ux/data/&#96;: Full dataset including styles, colors, UX guidelines, and implementation prompts."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "## How to Use"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "Import the &#96;ui_ux&#96; package and register the tool:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "import \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "// ... "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "uiTool, err := ui_ux.NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "if err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "    tools = append(tools, uiTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "## Impact"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "This update significantly lowers the barrier for AI agents to provide visually stunning and UX-sound UI recommendations without requiring external API calls or complex local file management."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 38
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/updates/2026-01-11_ui_ux_plugin_integration.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.3276081085205078
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, wecomCustomerMiniprogramTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "\t// 4. 通用调研系列工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "\tgrepTool, err := research.NewGrepSearchTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, grepTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "\treadTool, err := research.NewReadFileTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, readTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "\tdocTool, err := research.NewDocToMarkdownTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, docTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "\tfirecrawlTool, err := research.NewFirecrawlTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, firecrawlTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "\twebSearchTool, err := websearch.NewWebSearchTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, webSearchTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "\tsemanticSearchTool, err := research.NewSemanticSearchTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, semanticSearchTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "\tcodeIndexTool, err := research.NewCodeIndexTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, codeIndexTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "\tjinaReaderTool, err := research.NewJinaReaderTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, jinaReaderTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "\twriteFileTool, err := research.NewWriteFileTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, writeFileTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "\t// 5. 本地无头浏览器抓取工具（高级反爬场景，如微信公众号）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "\tlocalScraperTool, err := research.NewLocalScraperTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, localScraperTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "\t// 5.1 本地浏览器通用抓取工具（read/screenshot + cookie 复用）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "\tbrowserBrowseTool, err := research.NewBrowserBrowseTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, browserBrowseTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "\t// 这里未来可以放入通用的 Google 搜索、计算器等跨项目工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "\treturn tools, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 165
          },

            "column": 77,
            "line": 109
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/tools.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },

    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 442,
            "text": "- **stack**（可选）：技术栈，Agent 会自动获取该技术栈的指南"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 443,
            "text": "- **persist**（可选）：是否持久化设计系统到文件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 444,
            "text": "- **page_name**（可选）：页面名称，用于生成页面特定的覆盖文件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 445
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 446,
            "text": "### Agent 工作流"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 447
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 448,
            "text": "Agent 内部自动执行以下工作流："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 449
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 450,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 451,
            "text": "1. 分析需求"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 452,
            "text": "   ↓"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 453,
            "text": "2. 生成设计系统（generate_design_system）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 454,
            "text": "   ↓"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 455,
            "text": "3. 补充搜索（ui_ux_search，如果需要）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 456,
            "text": "   - 样式选项"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 457,
            "text": "   - 图表推荐"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 458,
            "text": "   - UX 最佳实践"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 459,
            "text": "   - 字体选项"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 460,
            "text": "   ↓"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 461,
            "text": "4. 技术栈指南（ui_ux_search with stack，如果指定了技术栈）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 462,
            "text": "   ↓"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 463,
            "text": "5. 持久化（persist_design_system，如果用户请求）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 464,
            "text": "   ↓"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 465,
            "text": "6. 返回完整结果"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 466,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 467
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 468,
            "text": "### 与单独工具的区别"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 469
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 470,
            "text": "#### 使用单独工具（方式一、二）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 471
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 472,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 473,
            "text": "# 需要手动编排工作流"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 474,
            "text": "BindTools:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 475,
            "text": "  - \"ui_ux_search\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 476,
            "text": "  - \"generate_design_system\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 477,
            "text": "  - \"persist_design_system\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 478
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 479,
            "text": "# 需要在 SystemPrompt 中详细说明调用顺序"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 480,
            "text": "SystemPrompt: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 481,
            "text": "  1. 先调用 generate_design_system"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 482,
            "text": "  2. 然后调用 ui_ux_search 补充信息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 483,
            "text": "  3. 最后调用 persist_design_system"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 484,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 485
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 486,
            "text": "#### 使用 Agent 工具（方式三）⭐"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 487
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 488,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 489,
            "text": "# 只需一个工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 490,
            "text": "BindTools:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 491,
            "text": "  - \"generate_ui_design_system\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 492
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 493,
            "text": "# SystemPrompt 简单明了"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 494,
            "text": "SystemPrompt: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 495,
            "text": "  使用 generate_ui_design_system 生成设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 496,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 497
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 498,
            "text": "## 配置说明"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 499
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 500,
            "text": "### 配置存储路径（可选）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 501
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 502,
            "text": "如果你想要自定义设计系统的存储路径，可以在 DigFlow 的配置中添加 DigEino 的配置："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 503
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 504,
            "text": "#### 创建 DigEino 配置文件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 505
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 506,
            "text": "在 DigFlow 项目中创建 &#96;config/digeino.yaml&#96;："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 507
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 508,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 509,
            "text": "ChatModel:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 510,
            "text": "  Type: \"qwen\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 511,
            "text": "  Config:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 512,
            "text": "    ApiKey: \"${QWEN_API_KEY}\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 513,
            "text": "    Model: \"qwen-max\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 514,
            "text": "    BaseUrl: \"https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 515
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 516,
            "text": "UIUX:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 517,
            "text": "  Storage:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 518,
            "text": "    BaseDir: \"storage/app/ui_ux\"  # 设计系统存储路径"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 519,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 520
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 521,
            "text": "#### 在工具注册时加载配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 522
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 523,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 524,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 525,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 526,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 527
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 528,
            "text": "func init() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 529,
            "text": "    // 加载 DigEino 配置"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 529
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 441
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.32571038603782654
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package wx"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\t\"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\t\"fmt\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "// NewWeChatMessageTool 创建微信推送工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "func NewWeChatMessageTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeChat.Enabled == nil || !*cfg.WeChat.Enabled {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeChat tool is not enabled in config\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeChat.AppID == \"\" || cfg.WeChat.AppSecret == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeChat AppID or AppSecret not configured\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\treturn utils.InferTool("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "\t\t\"send_wechat_message\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\t\t\"通过微信服务号推送文字消息给指定的用户openid。支持发送给单个用户或配置中的所有用户。注意：用户需要在48小时内与公众号有交互才能接收客服消息。\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "\t\tfunc(ctx context.Context, req *SendWeChatTextMessageRequest) (*SendWeChatTextMessageResponse, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "\t\t\tresp, err := SendWeChatTextMessage(ctx, *req)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\t\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\t\t\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn \u0026resp, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "\t)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 33
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/wx/tool.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.3223154544830322
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 324,
            "text": "    UseGlobal: false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 325
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 326,
            "text": "Nodes:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 327,
            "text": "  - Key: \"designer\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 328,
            "text": "    Type: \"chat_model\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 329,
            "text": "    Model: \"ui_model\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 330,
            "text": "    SystemPrompt: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 331,
            "text": "      你是一位专业的 UI/UX 设计师。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 332,
            "text": "      当用户需要生成设计系统时，使用 generate_ui_design_system 工具。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 333,
            "text": "      这个工具会自动完成："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 334,
            "text": "      1. 分析需求（产品类型、样式、行业、技术栈）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 335,
            "text": "      2. 生成完整设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 336,
            "text": "      3. 补充搜索详细信息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 337,
            "text": "      4. 获取技术栈指南"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 338,
            "text": "      5. 持久化（如果用户请求）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 339,
            "text": "    BindTools:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 340,
            "text": "      - \"generate_ui_design_system\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 341
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 342,
            "text": "  - Key: \"tools\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 343,
            "text": "    Type: \"tools_node\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 344,
            "text": "    Tools:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 345,
            "text": "      - \"generate_ui_design_system\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 346
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 347,
            "text": "Edges:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 348,
            "text": "  - From: \"START\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 349,
            "text": "    To: \"designer\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 350,
            "text": "  - From: \"tools\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 351,
            "text": "    To: \"designer\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 352
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 353,
            "text": "Branches:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 354,
            "text": "  - From: \"designer\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 355,
            "text": "    Condition: \"has_tool_calls\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 356,
            "text": "    Targets:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 357,
            "text": "      - Key: \"tools\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 358,
            "text": "        When: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 359,
            "text": "      - Key: \"END\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 360,
            "text": "        When: false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 361,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 362
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 363,
            "text": "#### 替代方式：使用 DigEino 配置创建 Agent"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 364
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 365,
            "text": "如果你想要使用 DigEino 的配置系统（而不是 DigFlow 的模型），可以这样做："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 366
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 367,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 368,
            "text": "package tools"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 369
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 370,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 371,
            "text": "    \"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 372,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 373,
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/internal/global/variable\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 374,
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/internal/utils/logger\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 375,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 376,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 377,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 378,
            "text": "    \"go.uber.org/zap\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 379,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 380
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 381,
            "text": "func init() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 382,
            "text": "    ctx := context.Background()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 383,
            "text": "    "
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 383
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 323
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.31719040870666504
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 660,
            "text": "5. **模型名称一致性**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 661,
            "text": "   - 使用 Agent 工具时，&#96;agent.yml&#96; 中的模型名称必须与 &#96;tool_register.go&#96; 中的名称一致"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 662,
            "text": "   - 推荐使用 &#96;ui_model&#96; 作为模型名称"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 663
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 664,
            "text": "## 故障排查"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 665
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 666,
            "text": "### 问题 1：工具未找到"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 667
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 668,
            "text": "**错误信息**：&#96;工具 xxx 未注册&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 669
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 670,
            "text": "**解决方案**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 671,
            "text": "1. 检查工具是否在 &#96;tool_register.go&#96; 中正确注册"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 672,
            "text": "2. 检查 &#96;bootstrap/init.go&#96; 是否导入了工具包"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 673,
            "text": "3. 查看日志确认工具注册是否成功"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 674
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 675,
            "text": "### 问题 2：模型未找到（Agent 工具）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 676
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 677,
            "text": "**错误**：&#96;模型 ui_model 不存在&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 678
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 679,
            "text": "**解决**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 680,
            "text": "1. 检查 &#96;agent.yml&#96; 中是否配置了名为 &#96;ui_model&#96; 的模型"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 681,
            "text": "2. 确保模型名称与 &#96;tool_register.go&#96; 中的名称一致"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 682,
            "text": "3. 检查模型是否已正确注册到 ModelRegistry"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 683
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 684,
            "text": "### 问题 3：Agent 工具创建失败"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 685
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 686,
            "text": "**错误**：&#96;failed to create UI design system agent&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 687
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 688,
            "text": "**解决**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 689,
            "text": "1. 检查 ChatModel 是否正确获取"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 690,
            "text": "2. 检查 DigEino 依赖是否正确安装"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 691,
            "text": "3. 查看日志获取详细错误信息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 692
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 693,
            "text": "### 问题 4：工具调用失败"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 694
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 695,
            "text": "**错误**：&#96;agent execution failed&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 696
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 697,
            "text": "**解决**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 698,
            "text": "1. 检查模型 API Key 是否正确配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 699,
            "text": "2. 检查网络连接"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 700,
            "text": "3. 查看 Agent 内部日志"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 701
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 702,
            "text": "### 问题 5：配置加载失败"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 703
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 704,
            "text": "**错误信息**：&#96;加载 DigEino 配置失败&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 705
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 706,
            "text": "**解决方案**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 707,
            "text": "1. 检查配置文件路径是否正确"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 708,
            "text": "2. 如果不需要配置驱动功能，可以不加载 DigEino 配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 709,
            "text": "3. 使用 DigFlow 的模型注册表代替"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 710
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 711,
            "text": "### 问题 6：存储路径问题"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 712
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 713,
            "text": "**错误信息**：&#96;failed to create directories&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 714
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 715,
            "text": "**解决方案**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 716,
            "text": "1. 检查存储目录的写入权限"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 717,
            "text": "2. 确认 &#96;BaseDir&#96; 配置是否正确"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 718,
            "text": "3. 使用绝对路径避免路径问题"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 719
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 720,
            "text": "## 完整示例：在 UI Pro 应用中使用"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 721
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 722,
            "text": "参考 &#96;DigFlow/app/ui_pro/config/agent.yml&#96;，你可以看到 UI Pro 应用已经配置了 UI/UX 工具："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 723
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 724,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 725,
            "text": "Tools:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 726,
            "text": "  - Name: \"ui_ux_search\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 727,
            "text": "    Description: \"检索 UI/UX 设计知识库\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 728,
            "text": "    UseGlobal: true  # 如果工具在全局注册，使用 UseGlobal: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 729,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 730
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 731,
            "text": "如果你的工具在应用级别注册，使用 &#96;UseGlobal: false&#96;。"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 732
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 659
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.314071387052536
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "**user_id 来源**：由 DigFlow Agent 在调用时从会话上下文（如企业微信消息的 FromUserID）解析并传入。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "**客服消息前置**：用户需先通过企业微信客服链接/扫码添加企业为客服，系统会为每个用户分配 &#96;external_userid&#96;（即 &#96;customer_id&#96;）。&#96;open_kf_id&#96; 在企业微信管理后台创建客服账号后获得。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "## 使用指南"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "### 1. 前置条件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "- 已注册企业微信（[work.weixin.qq.com](https://work.weixin.qq.com/)）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "- 创建自建应用并获取 AgentID、AgentSecret"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "- 在 DigFlow 项目中已引入 DigEino 依赖"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "### 2. 配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "在 DigEino 或 DigFlow 的 &#96;config.yaml&#96; 中启用并填写企业微信配置（见上方配置示例）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "### 3. 在 DigFlow 中注册工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "DigEino 的 &#96;BaseTools()&#96; 会自动注册企业微信工具（当 &#96;WeCom.Enabled: true&#96; 时）。在 DigFlow 的 &#96;tool_register.go&#96; 中引入 DigEino 工具："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "func init() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "    ctx := context.Background()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "    baseTools, _ := tools.BaseTools(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "    for _, t := range baseTools {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "        variable.ToolRegistry.Register(t.Info(ctx).Name, t)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "或在 Agent 配置中显式绑定："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "Tools:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "  - Name: \"send_wecom_message\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "    Description: \"通过企业微信发送文字消息\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "  - Name: \"send_wecom_image\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "    Description: \"通过企业微信发送图片消息\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "  - Name: \"send_wecom_text_card\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "    Description: \"通过企业微信发送文本卡片消息\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "### 4. 在 Agent 中调用"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "Agent 在执行过程中可调用上述工具，将结果发送给企业微信用户。&#96;user_id&#96; 需由调用方（如 chatgpt-wechat、DigFlow 的企业微信接入层）从收到的企业微信消息中解析 &#96;FromUserID&#96; 并传入工具参数。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "**示例（Agent 内部逻辑）**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "当用户通过企业微信发送消息时，会话上下文中应包含 &#96;user_id&#96;。Agent 完成处理后调用："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;json"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "  \"tool\": \"send_wecom_message\","
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 144
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 85
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/updates/2026-02-10_wecom_push_tool.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.3065764009952545
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "func NewUIDesignSystemAgentTool(ctx context.Context, chatModel model.ChatModel, additionalTools ...tool.BaseTool) (tool.BaseTool, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "\t// 创建 Agent 实例"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "\tagentInstance, err := NewUIDesignSystemAgent(ctx, chatModel, additionalTools...)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to create UI design system agent: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "\t// 将 Agent 包装成工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "\treturn utils.InferTool("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "\t\t\"generate_ui_design_system\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "\t\t\"生成完整的 UI/UX 设计系统，包括样式、配色、字体、布局模式等。这是一个智能编排的 Agent，会自动分析需求、生成设计系统、补充搜索并获取技术栈指南。如果需要持久化，可以设置 persist=true。\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "\t\tfunc(ctx context.Context, req *UIDesignSystemAgentToolRequest) (*UIDesignSystemAgentToolResponse, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "\t\t\t// 构建查询字符串"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "\t\t\tqueryParts := []string{req.Query}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\t\t\tif req.ProjectName != \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tqueryParts = append(queryParts, fmt.Sprintf(\"项目名称: %s\", req.ProjectName))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "\t\t\tif req.Stack != \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tqueryParts = append(queryParts, fmt.Sprintf(\"技术栈: %s\", req.Stack))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "\t\t\tif req.Persist {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tqueryParts = append(queryParts, \"请持久化设计系统\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tif req.PageName != \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tqueryParts = append(queryParts, fmt.Sprintf(\"页面名称: %s\", req.PageName))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "\t\t\tquery := fmt.Sprintf(\"生成设计系统：%s\", strings.Join(queryParts, \"，\"))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "\t\t\t// 调用 Agent 执行完整工作流"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "\t\t\tresult, err := agentInstance.Invoke(ctx, query)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "\t\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"agent execution failed: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "\t\t\t// 解析 Agent 返回的结果"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "\t\t\tresponse := \u0026UIDesignSystemAgentToolResponse{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tDesignSystem: result.Content,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tMessage:      \"Design system generated successfully\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "\t\t\tif req.Persist {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tresponse.Message += \" and persisted to design-system/ directory\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn response, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "\t)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "// NewUIDesignSystemAgentToolFromConfig 从配置创建 Agent 工具（便捷方法）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "// 自动从 config.yaml 加载 ChatModel 配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "func NewUIDesignSystemAgentToolFromConfig"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 41,
            "line": 82
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 69,
            "line": 29
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/ui_ux/agent_tool.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.30366650223731995
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package wx"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\t\"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\t\"fmt\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "// NewWeComMessageTool 创建企业微信文字消息发送工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "func NewWeComMessageTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeCom.Enabled == nil || !*cfg.WeCom.Enabled {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom tool is not enabled in config\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeCom.CorpID == \"\" || len(cfg.WeCom.Applications) == 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom CorpID or Applications not configured\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "\treturn utils.InferTool("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\t\t\"send_wecom_message\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "\t\t\"通过企业微信应用消息发送文字给指定的企业成员。user_id 为企业成员 ID，由 DigFlow 等调用方从会话上下文传入。支持超过 850 字时自动分条发送。\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\t\tfunc(ctx context.Context, req *SendWeComMessageRequest) (*SendWeComMessageResponse, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "\t\t\tresp, err := SendWeComMessage(ctx, *req)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "\t\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\t\t\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn \u0026resp, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "\t)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "// NewWeComImageTool 创建企业微信图片消息发送工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "func NewWeComImageTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeCom.Enabled == nil || !*cfg.WeCom.Enabled {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom tool is not enabled in config\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeCom.CorpID == \"\" || len(cfg.WeCom.Applications) == 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom CorpID or Applications not configured\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\treturn utils.InferTool("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "\t\t\"send_wecom_image\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "\t\t\"通过企业微信应用消息发送图片给指定的企业成员。需要先通过临时素材上传接口获取 media_id。\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "\t\tfunc(ctx context.Context, req *SendWeComImageMessageRequest) (*SendWeComImageMessageResponse, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "\t\t\tresp, err := SendWeComImageMessage(ctx, *req)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\t\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "\t\t\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn \u0026resp, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "\t)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "// NewWeComTextCardTool 创建企业微信文本卡片消息发送工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "func NewWeComTextCardTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeCom.Enabled == nil || !*cfg.WeCom.Enabled"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
