```json
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package websearch"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\t\"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\t\"fmt\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "\t\"os\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "// WebSearch 执行网页搜索"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "func WebSearch(ctx context.Context, req *SearchRequest) (*SearchResponse, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "\ttoolCfg := cfg.Tools.WebSearch"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "\tengine := toolCfg.Engine"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "\tif engine == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "\t\tengine = \"duckduckgo\" // 默认为 duckduckgo 占位"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\tfmt.Printf(\"执行搜索, engine: %s, query: %s, max_results: %d\\n\", engine, req.Query, req.MaxResults)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\tvar provider SearchProvider"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "\tvar err error"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\t// 转换为 map[string]interface{} 以兼容各 Provider 接参"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\tconfigMap := make(map[string]interface{})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "\tswitch engine {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "\tcase \"bocha\":"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "\t\tconfigMap[\"BochaApiKey\"] = toolCfg.Bocha.ApiKey"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\t\tconfigMap[\"BochaBaseUrl\"] = toolCfg.Bocha.BaseUrl"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "\t\tprovider, err = NewBochaProvider(configMap)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\tcase \"serpapi\":"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "\t\tconfigMap[\"SerpAPIKey\"] = toolCfg.SerpApi.ApiKey"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "\t\tconfigMap[\"SerpAPIEngine\"] = \"google\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "\t\tif toolCfg.SerpApi.BaseUrl != \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "\t\t\t// 如果有自定义URL需求，此处可以扩展，目前原生没这个参数"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "\t\tprovider, err = NewSerpAPIProvider(configMap)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "\tcase \"google\":"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "\t\tconfigMap[\"GoogleApiKey\"] = toolCfg.Google.ApiKey"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\t\tconfigMap[\"GoogleSearchEngineId\"] = toolCfg.Google.Cx"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "\t\tprovider, err = NewGoogleProvider(configMap)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "\tcase \"bing\":"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "\t\tconfigMap[\"BingApiKey\"] = toolCfg.Bing.ApiKey"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "\t\t// configMap[\"BingSafeSearch\"] = toolCfg.Bing.SafeSearch"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\t\tprovider, err = NewBingProvider(configMap)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "\tcase \"firecrawl\":"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "\t\t// Firecrawl Search 复用全局 Firecrawl ApiKey（与 firecrawl_scrape 相同）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "\t\tfirecrawlCfg := cfg.Tools.Firecrawl"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "\t\tapiKey := firecrawlCfg.ApiKey"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 31,
            "line": 53
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/research/websearch/web_search.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.2802998125553131
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# DigEino 工具集概览 (Tools Information)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "本文档旨在汇总 &#96;DigEino&#96; 中集成的所有 Eino 工具，详细说明其功能、参数及使用场景。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "## 1. 调研与搜索 (Researcher \u0026 Search)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "这类工具旨在帮助 Agent 理解项目代码、阅读外部文档以及搜索互联网信息。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "### 1.1 基础调研 (Basic Research)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "| 工具名称 | 功能描述 | 主要参数 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "| :--- | :--- | :--- |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "| &#96;research_grep&#96; | 在源码或指定目录中进行关键词检索（模拟 ripgrep）。 | &#96;query&#96;: 关键词; &#96;path&#96;: 搜索路径 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "| &#96;research_read&#96; | 精确读取指定文件的完整内容。 | &#96;path&#96;: 文件路径 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "| &#96;research_doc_to_md&#96; | 集成 **Unstructured.io**，将 PDF/Word/Docx 高质量转为 Markdown。 | &#96;path&#96;: 文档路径 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "### 1.2 高级检索 (Advanced Retrieval)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "| 工具名称 | 功能描述 | 主要参数 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "| :--- | :--- | :--- |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "| &#96;research_semantic_search&#96; | **向量语义搜索**。基于 Pinecone，通过相似度定位偏逻辑意图的内容。 | &#96;query&#96;: 搜索意图; &#96;max_results&#96;: 结果数 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "| &#96;research_code_index&#96; | **项目索引工具**。扫描指定目录并将代码/文档向量化存入 Pinecone。 | &#96;path&#96;: 目标目录 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "| &#96;web_search&#96; | **统一网页搜索**。支持 Bocha, SerpApi, Google, Bing, DuckDuckGo, Firecrawl 和 Tavily 引擎。 | &#96;query&#96;: 搜索词; &#96;max_results&#96;: 结果数; &#96;region&#96;: 地区 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "| &#96;firecrawl_scrape&#96; | **深度网页爬取**。调用 Firecrawl API 将 URL 转换为清洗后的 Markdown。 | &#96;url&#96;: 目标网页地址 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "| &#96;research_jina_reader&#96; | **高级网页抓取**。使用 Jina Reader (r.jina.ai) 深度读取网页并转换为 Markdown，对微信公众号、知乎等强反爬平台有较好兼容性。 | &#96;url&#96;: 目标网页地址 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "| &#96;research_local_scraper&#96; | **本地无头浏览器抓取**。使用 go-rod + stealth 绕过复杂反爬（如微信公众号），抓取正文并输出 Text 与 Markdown。 | &#96;url&#96;: 目标网页地址 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "**web_search 引擎选择**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "| 引擎 | 特点 | 配置 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "|------|------|------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "| Bocha | 国内服务，中文友好 | &#96;Tools.WebSearch.Bocha.ApiKey&#96; |"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 32
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/tools_info.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.2783145308494568
    }
  ]
}
```

```json
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package webhook"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\t\"fmt\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\t\"strings\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "// GetWebhookConfig 从全局配置获取 WebhookConfig"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "func GetWebhookConfig(buildDefaultURL func() string) *config.WebhookConfig {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get().Status.Webhook"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "\tif cfg.Enabled != nil \u0026\u0026 !*cfg.Enabled {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "\t// 这里需要注意，Config 是 WebhookConfig 类型"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "\twebhookConfig := \u0026cfg.Config"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "\tif webhookConfig.URL == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "\t\tif cfg.URL != \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "\t\t\twebhookConfig.URL = cfg.URL"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "\t\t} else if buildDefaultURL != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\t\t\twebhookConfig.URL = buildDefaultURL()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "\tif webhookConfig.Method == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\t\twebhookConfig.Method = \"POST\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "\tif webhookConfig.Timeout == 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "\t\twebhookConfig.Timeout = 5"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "\tif webhookConfig.RetryCount == 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\t\twebhookConfig.RetryCount = 3"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\tif webhookConfig.RetryDelay == 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "\t\twebhookConfig.RetryDelay = 1000"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "\treturn webhookConfig"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "// IsStoreEnabled 检查 Store 是否启用"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "func IsStoreEnabled() bool {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get().Status.Store"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "\tif cfg.Enabled != nil \u0026\u0026 !*cfg.Enabled {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "\t\treturn false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\treturn true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "// BuildDefaultWebhookURL 构建默认的本地 webhook URL"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "func BuildDefaultWebhookURL(scheme, host string) string {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "\tif host == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "\t\tport := config.Get().HttpServer.Api.Port"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "\t\tif port == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "\t\t\thost = \"localhost\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "\t\t} else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "\t\t\tif strings.HasPrefix(port, \":\") {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "\t\t\t\thost = \"localhost\" + port"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "\t\t\t} else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "\t\t\t\thost = \"localhost:\" + port"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%s://%s/api/v1/webhook/status\", scheme, host)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 68
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./webhook/config.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.34184205532073975
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": ","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "// SendStatus 发送状态更新"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "func (c *WebhookClient) SendStatus(ctx context.Context, status ExecutionStatus) error {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\t// 检查事件是否被订阅"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "\tif len(c.config.Events) \u003e 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "\t\tsubscribed := false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "\t\tfor _, e := range c.config.Events {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "\t\t\tif e == status.Type {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tsubscribed = true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tbreak"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "\t\tif !subscribed {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "\tpayload := WebhookPayload{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "\t\tEvent:  status.Type,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "\t\tStatus: status,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "\tdata, err := json.Marshal(payload)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"marshal payload failed: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "\t// 如果配置了密钥，生成签名"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "\tif c.config.Secret != \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "\t\tpayload.Signature = c.generateSignature(data, c.config.Secret)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "\t\t// 重新序列化包含签名的 payload"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "\t\tdata, _ = json.Marshal(payload)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "\tvar lastErr error"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "\tretryCount := c.config.RetryCount"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "\tif retryCount == 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "\t\tretryCount = 3"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "\tretryDelay := time.Duration(c.config.RetryDelay) * time.Millisecond"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "\tif retryDelay == 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "\t\tretryDelay = 1000 * time.Millisecond"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "\tfor i := 0; i \u003c= retryCount; i++ {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "\t\tif i \u003e 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "\t\t\ttime.Sleep(retryDelay)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "\t\terr = c.doPost(ctx, data)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "\t\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "\t\tlastErr = err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"send webhook failed after %d retries: %w\", retryCount, lastErr)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "func (c *WebhookClient) doPost(ctx context.Context, data []byte) error {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "\tmethod := c.config.Method"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "\tif method == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "\t\tmethod = \"POST\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "\treq, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, method, c.config.URL, bytes.NewBuffer(data))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "\t\treturn err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "\treq.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "\tfor k, v := range c.config.Headers {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "\t\treq.Header.Set(k, v)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "\tresp, err := c.client.Do(req)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "\t\treturn err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "\tdefer resp.Body.Close()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "\tif resp.StatusCode \u003e= 200 \u0026\u0026 resp.StatusCode \u003c 300 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"http status error: %d\", resp.StatusCode)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "func (c *WebhookClient) generateSignature(data []byte, secret string) string {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "\th := hmac.New(sha256.New, []byte(secret))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "\th.Write(data)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "\treturn hex.EncodeToString(h.Sum(nil))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 138
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 3,
            "line": 43
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./webhook/webhook_client.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.3329941928386688
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "// WebhookConfig 基础 Webhook 配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "type WebhookConfig struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "\tURL        string            &#96;yaml:\"url\" json:\"url\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "\tMethod     string            &#96;yaml:\"method\" json:\"method,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\tHeaders    map[string]string &#96;yaml:\"headers\" json:\"headers,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "\tSecret     string            &#96;yaml:\"secret\" json:\"secret,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "\tTimeout    int               &#96;yaml:\"timeout\" json:\"timeout,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "\tRetryCount int               &#96;yaml:\"retry_count\" json:\"retry_count,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "\tRetryDelay int               &#96;yaml:\"retry_delay\" json:\"retry_delay,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "\tEvents     []string          &#96;yaml:\"events\" json:\"events,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "// StatusStoreConfig 状态存储配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "type StatusStoreConfig struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "\tEnabled *bool       &#96;yaml:\"Enabled\" json:\"Enabled,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "\tType    string      &#96;yaml:\"Type\" json:\"Type,omitempty\"&#96; // memory, mysql"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "\tMySQL   MySQLConfig &#96;yaml:\"MySQL\" json:\"MySQL\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "// MySQLConfig MySQL 配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "type MySQLConfig struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "\tHost        string &#96;yaml:\"Host\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "\tPort        int    &#96;yaml:\"Port\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "\tUser        string &#96;yaml:\"User\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "\tPassword    string &#96;yaml:\"Password\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "\tDatabase    string &#96;yaml:\"Database\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "\tExecTable   string &#96;yaml:\"ExecTable\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "\tStatusTable string &#96;yaml:\"StatusTable\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "// WeChatConfig 微信推送配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "type WeChatConfig struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "\tEnabled       *bool    &#96;yaml:\"Enabled\" json:\"Enabled,omitempty\"&#96;             // 是否启用微信推送功能"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "\tAppID         string   &#96;yaml:\"AppID\" json:\"AppID,omitempty\"&#96;                 // 微信服务号 AppID"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "\tAppSecret     string   &#96;yaml:\"AppSecret\" json:\"AppSecret,omitempty\"&#96;         // 微信服务号 AppSecret"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "\tOpenIDs       []string &#96;yaml:\"OpenIDs\" json:\"OpenIDs,omitempty\"&#96;             // 默认接收消息的用户 openid 列表"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "\tTokenFilePath string   &#96;yaml:\"TokenFilePath\" json:\"TokenFilePath,omitempty\"&#96; // AccessToken 存储文件路径（相对于项目根目录）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "\t// 小程序相关配置（用于发送小程序卡片消息）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "\tMiniProgram MiniProgramConfig &#96;yaml:\"MiniProgram\" json:\"MiniProgram,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "// MiniProgramConfig 小程序配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "type"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 4,
            "line": 87
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 43
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./config/config.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.3284308910369873
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) AddWebhookClient(client *WebhookClient) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "\tdefer sc.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "\tsc.webhookClients = append(sc.webhookClients, client)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "// SetStatusStore 设置状态存储"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) SetStatusStore(store StatusStoreInterface) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "\tdefer sc.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "\tsc.statusStore = store"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "// SetStatusCallback 设置状态回调"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) SetStatusCallback(callback func(status ExecutionStatus)) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "\tdefer sc.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "\tsc.statusCallback = callback"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "// OnNodeStart 节点开始执行"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) OnNodeStart(ctx context.Context, nodeKey, nodeType string, input interface{}) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "\tsc.nodeStartTime[nodeKey] = time.Now()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "\tsc.path = append(sc.path, nodeKey)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "\tlogger := sc.logger"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "\tstatus := ExecutionStatus{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "\t\tType:        \"node_start\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "\t\tTimestamp:   time.Now().UnixMilli(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "\t\tExecutionID: sc.executionID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "\t\tNodeKey:     nodeKey,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "\t\tNodeType:    nodeType,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "\t\tStatus:      \"running\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "\t\tAppName:     sc.appName,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "\t\tRequestID:   sc.requestID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "\t\tDataFlow:    sc.marshalDataFlow(input, nil),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "\tif logger != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "\t\tinputCount := 0"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "\t\tif status.DataFlow != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "\t\t\tinputCount = status.DataFlow.InputCount"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "\t\tlogger.OnNodeStartLog(nodeKey, nodeType, inputCount)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "\tsc.sendStatusAsync(ctx, status)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "// OnNodeEnd 节点结束执行"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) OnNodeEnd(ctx context.Context, nodeKey, nodeType string, output interface{}, err error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "\tstartTime, ok := sc.nodeStartTime[nodeKey]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "\tlogger := sc.logger"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 20,
            "line": 129
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 44,
            "line": 73
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./webhook/status_collector.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.3013155460357666
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package webhook"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\t\"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\t\"encoding/json\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "\t\"sync\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\t\"time\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/schema\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "// StatusLogger 日志接口，调用方可选择性实现"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "type StatusLogger interface {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "\tOnNodeStartLog(nodeKey, nodeType string, inputCount int)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "\tOnNodeEndLog(nodeKey, nodeType string, outputCount int, err error)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "\tOnCompleteLog(executionID string, duration time.Duration, usage *Usage)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "// StatusCollector 状态收集器"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "type StatusCollector struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "\texecutionID string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\tappName     string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "\trequestID   string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\tstartTime   time.Time"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "\twebhookClients []*WebhookClient"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\tstatusStore    StatusStoreInterface"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\tstatusCallback func(status ExecutionStatus)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "\tmu            sync.Mutex"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "\tstatusHistory []ExecutionStatus"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "\tnodeStartTime map[string]time.Time"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\tpath          []string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\ttokenUsageMap map[string]*Usage"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "\ttotalUsage    Usage"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "\tenableDataFlow bool"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "\tlogger         StatusLogger"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "// NewStatusCollector 创建状态收集器，DataFlow 开关从 config.Get().Status.DataFlow 读取，默认关闭"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "func NewStatusCollector(executionID, appName, requestID string) *StatusCollector {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\tenableDataFlow := false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "\tif cfg := config.Get(); cfg != nil \u0026\u0026 cfg.Status.DataFlow.Enabled != nil \u0026\u0026 *cfg.Status.DataFlow.Enabled {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "\t\tenableDataFlow = true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "\treturn \u0026StatusCollector{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\t\texecutionID:    executionID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "\t\tappName:        appName,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "\t\trequestID:      requestID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "\t\tstartTime:      time.Now(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "\t\tnodeStartTime:  make(map[string]time.Time),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "\t\ttokenUsageMap:  make(map[string]*Usage),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "\t\tenableDataFlow: enableDataFlow,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "// EnableDataFlow 启用/禁用 DataFlow 追踪（优先级高于 eino.yml 配置）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) EnableDataFlow(enable bool) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "\tdefer sc.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "\tsc.enableDataFlow = enable"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "// SetLogger 设置日志 hook"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) SetLogger(logger StatusLogger) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "\tdefer sc.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "\tsc.logger = logger"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "// AddWebhookClient 添加 Webhook 客户端"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) AddWebhookClient(client *WebhookClient) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "\tdefer sc.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "\tsc.webhookClients ="
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 20,
            "line": 77
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./webhook/status_collector.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.3011283874511719
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 268,
            "text": "func Default() *Config {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 269,
            "text": "\tenabled := true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 270,
            "text": "\tdisabled := false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 271,
            "text": "\twechatDisabled := false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 272,
            "text": "\tdataFlowDisabled := false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 273,
            "text": "\treturn \u0026Config{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274,
            "text": "\t\tHttpServer: HttpServerConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 275,
            "text": "\t\t\tApi: struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 276,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tPort string &#96;yaml:\"Port\" json:\"Port\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 277,
            "text": "\t\t\t}{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 278,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tPort: \":20201\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 279,
            "text": "\t\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 280,
            "text": "\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 281,
            "text": "\t\tStatus: StatusConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 282,
            "text": "\t\t\tWebhook: AppWebhookConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 283,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tEnabled: \u0026enabled,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tConfig: WebhookConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tMethod:     \"POST\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 286,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tTimeout:    5,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 287,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tRetryCount: 3,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 288,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tRetryDelay: 1000,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 289,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 290,
            "text": "\t\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 291,
            "text": "\t\t\tStore: StatusStoreConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 292,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tEnabled: \u0026enabled,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 293,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tType:    \"memory\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 294,
            "text": "\t\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 295,
            "text": "\t\t\tDataFlow: DataFlowConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 296,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tEnabled: \u0026dataFlowDisabled,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 297,
            "text": "\t\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 298,
            "text": "\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 299,
            "text": "\t\tWeChat: WeChatConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 300,
            "text": "\t\t\tEnabled:       \u0026wechatDisabled,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 301,
            "text": "\t\t\tTokenFilePath: \"storage/app/wechat/access_token.json\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 302,
            "text": "\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 303,
            "text": "\t\tWeCom: WeComConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 304,
            "text": "\t\t\tEnabled:       \u0026wechatDisabled,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 305,
            "text": "\t\t\tQYAPIHost:     \"https://qyapi.weixin.qq.com\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 306,
            "text": "\t\t\tTokenFilePath: \"storage/app/wecom/access_token.json\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 307,
            "text": "\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 308,
            "text": "\t\tChatModel: ChatModelConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 309,
            "text": "\t\t\tType: \"qwen\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 310,
            "text": "\t\t\tConfig: map[string]interface{}{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 311,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\"ApiKey\":  \"\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 312,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\"Model\":   \"qwen-max\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 313,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\"BaseUrl\": \"https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 314,
            "text": "\t\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 315,
            "text": "\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 316,
            "text": "\t\tUIUX: UIUXConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 317,
            "text": "\t\t\tStorage: UIUXStorageConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 318,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tBaseDir: \"storage/app/ui_ux\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 319,
            "text": "\t\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 320,
            "text": "\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 321,
            "text": "\t\tTools: ToolsConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 322,
            "text": "\t\t\tFirecrawl: FirecrawlConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 323,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tApiKey: \"\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 324,
            "text": "\t\t\t},"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 5,
            "line": 323
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 29,

          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./config/config.go",
```
