    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package webhook"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\t\"bytes\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\t\"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "\t\"crypto/hmac\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\t\"crypto/sha256\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "\t\"encoding/hex\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\t\"encoding/json\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "\t\"fmt\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "\t\"net/http\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "\t\"time\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "// WebhookClient Webhook 客户端"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "type WebhookClient struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "\tconfig *config.WebhookConfig"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "\tclient *http.Client"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "var ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "\t// 共享 Transport 以复用连接池"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\tdefaultTransport = \u0026http.Transport{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "\t\tMaxIdleConns:        100,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "\t\tMaxIdleConnsPerHost: 100, // 显著提高单主机并发连接数，特别适用于本地 Webhook"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\t\tIdleConnTimeout:     90 * time.Second,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "// NewWebhookClient 创建 Webhook 客户端"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "func NewWebhookClient(config *config.WebhookConfig) *WebhookClient {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\ttimeout := time.Duration(config.Timeout) * time.Second"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "\tif timeout == 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\t\ttimeout = 5 * time.Second"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "\treturn \u0026WebhookClient{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "\t\tconfig: config,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "\t\tclient: \u0026http.Client{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "\t\t\tTimeout:   timeout,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "\t\t\tTransport: defaultTransport,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "// SendStatus 发送状态更新"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "func (c *WebhookClient) SendStatus(ctx context.Context, status ExecutionStatus) error {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\t// 检查事件是否被订阅"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "\tif len(c.config.Events) \u003e 0"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 28,
            "line": 50
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./webhook/webhook_client.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.29556751251220703
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# DigEino 使用指南"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "&#96;DigEino&#96; 是基于 &#96;Eino&#96; 的二次封装，旨在为 Go 项目提供统一的状态追踪、Webhook 回调及配置管理功能。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "## 1. 安装"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "在您的 Go 项目中，通过以下命令导入："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "go get github.com/originaleric/digeino"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "## 2. 配置管理"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "&#96;DigEino&#96; 提供了灵活的配置管理方式，推荐在项目启动时进行初始化。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "### 2.1 依赖结构"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "配置主要包含两个部分："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "- &#96;HttpServer&#96;: 用于获取本地服务端口（构建默认 Webhook URL 时使用）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "- &#96;Status&#96;: 包含 &#96;Webhook&#96; 和 &#96;Store&#96;（存储）的配置。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "### 2.2 使用示例"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "#### 方式 A：从 YAML 文件加载（推荐）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "首先，在您的项目中准备一个 &#96;config.yaml&#96; 文件（可以参考 &#96;DigEino/config/config.yaml&#96;）："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "HttpServer:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "  Api:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "    Port: \":20201\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "Status:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "  Webhook:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "    Enabled: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "    URL: \"https://your-callback-url.com/webhook\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "    Events: [\"complete\", \"error\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "  Store:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "    Enabled: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "    Type: \"memory\" # 或 \"mysql\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "然后在代码中加载："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "import \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "func main() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "    // 加载配置文件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "    _, err := config.Load(\"path/to/your/config.yaml\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "    if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "        panic(err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "#### 方式 B：在代码中手动设置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "import \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "func initConfig() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "    cfg := config.Default()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "    cfg.Status.Webhook.Config.URL = \"https://custom-url.com\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "    config.Set(cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "## 3. 核心功能使用"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "### 3.1 状态存储 (Status Store)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "&#96;DigEino&#96; 支持将执行状态存储在内存或 MySQL 中。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "import \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/status\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "func someProcess() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "    // 获取默认存储实例（根据配置自动选择 memory 或 mysql）"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 80
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/usage.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.2824796438217163
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) sendStatusAsync(ctx context.Context, status ExecutionStatus) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211,
            "text": "\tsc.statusHistory = append(sc.statusHistory, status)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212,
            "text": "\tcallback := sc.statusCallback"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "\tstore := sc.statusStore"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "\tclients := sc.webhookClients"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "\t// 1. 优先执行回调（SSE 等），虽然它是同步调用，但在应用端可能已实现异步"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218,
            "text": "\tif callback != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219,
            "text": "\t\tcallback(status)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "\t// 2. 异步存储状态，避免数据库等慢操作阻塞主流程"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223,
            "text": "\tif store != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224,
            "text": "\t\tgo func() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225,
            "text": "\t\t\tstore.AddStatus(sc.executionID, status)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226,
            "text": "\t\t}()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229,
            "text": "\t// 3. 异步发送 Webhook"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 230,
            "text": "\tif len(clients) \u003e 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 231,
            "text": "\t\tgo func() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232,
            "text": "\t\t\tfor _, client := range clients {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 233,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t_ = client.SendStatus(ctx, status)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235,
            "text": "\t\t}()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "text": "// CollectTokenUsage 收集TokenUsage"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) CollectTokenUsage(nodeKey string, usage *Usage) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241,
            "text": "\tif usage == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 242,
            "text": "\t\treturn"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 243,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 246,
            "text": "\tdefer sc.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248,
            "text": "\tsc.tokenUsageMap[nodeKey] = usage"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249,
            "text": "\tsc.totalUsage.PromptTokens += usage.PromptTokens"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250,
            "text": "\tsc.totalUsage.CompletionTokens += usage.CompletionTokens"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251,
            "text": "\tsc.totalUsage.TotalTokens += usage.TotalTokens"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254,
            "text": "// GetTotalUsage 获取汇总的TokenUsage"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 255,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) GetTotalUsage() *Usage {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 257,
            "text": "\tdefer sc.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 259,
            "text": "\tif sc.totalUsage.PromptTokens == 0 \u0026\u0026 sc.totalUsage.CompletionTokens == 0 \u0026\u0026 sc.totalUsage.TotalTokens == 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 260,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 263,
            "text": "\treturn \u0026Usage{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264,
            "text": "\t\tPromptTokens:     sc.totalUsage.PromptTokens,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265,
            "text": "\t\tCompletionTokens: sc.totalUsage.CompletionTokens,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 266,
            "text": "\t\tTotalTokens:      sc.totalUsage.TotalTokens,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 267,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 268,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 269
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 270,
            "text": "// GetExecutionID 获取执行ID"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 271,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) GetExecutionID() string {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 272,
            "text": "\treturn sc.executionID"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 273,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 275,
            "text": "// GetStatusHistory 获取状态历史"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 276,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) GetStatusHistory() []ExecutionStatus {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 277,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 278,
            "text": "\tdefer sc.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 279,
            "text": "\thistory := make([]ExecutionStatus, len(sc.statusHistory))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 280,
            "text": "\tcopy(history, sc.statusHistory)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 281,
            "text": "\treturn history"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 282,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 283
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284,
            "text": "// getTotalUsageLocked 获取汇总 Usage，调用方需已持 sc.mu"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) getTotalUsageLocked() *Usage {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 286,
            "text": "\tif sc.totalUsage.PromptTokens == 0 \u0026\u0026 sc.totalUsage.CompletionTokens == 0 \u0026\u0026"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 77,
            "line": 285
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 37,
            "line": 207
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./webhook/status_collector.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.27381619811058044
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package webhook"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "// Usage 使用量统计"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "type Usage struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\tPromptTokens     int &#96;json:\"prompt_tokens\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "\tCompletionTokens int &#96;json:\"completion_tokens\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\tTotalTokens      int &#96;json:\"total_tokens\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "// ExecutionStatus 执行状态"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "type ExecutionStatus struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "\t// 基础信息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "\tType        string &#96;json:\"type\"&#96;         // \"node_start\" | \"node_end\" | \"data_flow\" | \"control_flow\" | \"error\" | \"complete\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "\tTimestamp   int64  &#96;json:\"timestamp\"&#96;    // Unix 时间戳（毫秒）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "\tExecutionID string &#96;json:\"execution_id\"&#96; // 执行 ID（用于关联）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "\t// 节点信息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "\tNodeKey  string &#96;json:\"node_key,omitempty\"&#96;  // 节点标识"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "\tNodeType string &#96;json:\"node_type,omitempty\"&#96; // 节点类型"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "\tStatus   string &#96;json:\"status\"&#96;              // \"running\" | \"success\" | \"error\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "\tError    string &#96;json:\"error,omitempty\"&#96;     // 错误信息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\t// 数据流信息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "\tDataFlow *DataFlowStatus &#96;json:\"data_flow,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "\t// 控制流信息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "\tControlFlow *ControlFlowStatus &#96;json:\"control_flow,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\t// 执行上下文"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "\tAppName   string &#96;json:\"app_name\"&#96;   // Agent 名称"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "\tRequestID string &#96;json:\"request_id\"&#96; // 请求 ID（可选）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "\t// Usage 信息（可选）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\tUsage *Usage &#96;json:\"usage,omitempty\"&#96; // Token 使用统计"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "// DataFlowStatus 数据流状态"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "type DataFlowStatus struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "\tInputCount  int                      &#96;json:\"input_count\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "\tOutputCount int                      &#96;json:\"output_count\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "\tInputData   []map[string]interface{} &#96;json:\"input_data,omitempty\"&#96;  // 可选，可配置是否包含"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "\tOutputData  []map[string]interface{} &#96;json:\"output_data,omitempty\"&#96; // 可选"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "// ControlFlowStatus 控制流状态"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "type ControlFlowStatus struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "\tBranchFrom string   &#96;json:\"branch_from,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "\tBranchTo   string   &#96;json:\"branch_to,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "\tCondition  string   &#96;json:\"condition,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\tPath       []string &#96;json:\"path\"&#96; // 执行路径"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "// WebhookPayload Webhook 请求体"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "type WebhookPayload struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "\tEvent     string          &#96;json:\"event\"&#96;"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 41,
            "line": 54
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./webhook/types.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.2708263397216797
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "// WebhookPayload Webhook 请求体"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "type WebhookPayload struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "\tEvent     string          &#96;json:\"event\"&#96;               // 事件类型"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "\tStatus    ExecutionStatus &#96;json:\"status\"&#96;              // 状态信息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "\tSignature string          &#96;json:\"signature,omitempty\"&#96; // 签名（如果配置了 secret）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "// Message 消息（用于 Webhook 和 StatusStore）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "type Message struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "\tRole    string &#96;json:\"role\"&#96; // user | assistant | system"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "\tContent string &#96;json:\"content\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "// StatusStoreInterface 状态存储接口（为了解耦）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "type StatusStoreInterface interface {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "\tAddStatus(executionID string, status ExecutionStatus) bool"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "\tSetResult(executionID string, result Message) bool"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 69
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 50
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./webhook/types.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.2646354138851166
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package status"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\t\"encoding/json\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\t\"fmt\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "\t\"sync\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\t\"time\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/webhook\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "\t\"gorm.io/driver/mysql\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "\t\"gorm.io/gorm\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "// StatusStore 状态存储接口"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "type StatusStore interface {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "\tCreateExecution(executionID, appName, requestID string) *ExecutionRecord"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "\tGetExecution(executionID string) (*ExecutionRecord, bool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "\tAddStatus(executionID string, status webhook.ExecutionStatus) bool"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "\tSetResult(executionID string, result webhook.Message) bool"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "\tListExecutions(page, pageSize int) ([]*ExecutionRecord, int)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "// ExecutionRecord 执行记录"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "type ExecutionRecord struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "\tExecutionID   string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\tAppName       string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\tRequestID     string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "\tStartTime     time.Time"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "\tEndTime       *time.Time"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "\tStatus        string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "\tStatusHistory []webhook.ExecutionStatus"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\tResult        *webhook.Message"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "\tError         string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\tmu            sync.RWMutex"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "// memoryStatusStore 内存实现"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "type memoryStatusStore struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "\tmu         sync.RWMutex"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "\texecutions map[string]*ExecutionRecord"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "\tmaxRecords int"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "func NewMemoryStatusStore(maxRecords int) StatusStore {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "\treturn \u0026memoryStatusStore{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "\t\texecutions: make(map[string]*ExecutionRecord),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "\t\tmaxRecords: maxRecords,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "func (s *memoryStatusStore) CreateExecution(executionID, appName, requestID string) *ExecutionRecord {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "\ts.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "\tdefer s.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "\trecord := \u0026ExecutionRecord{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "\t\tExecutionID:   executionID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "\t\tAppName:       appName,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "\t\tRequestID:     requestID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "\t\tStartTime:     time.Now(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "\t\tStatus:        \"running\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "\t\tStatusHistory: make([]webhook.ExecutionStatus, 0),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "\ts.executions[executionID] = record"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "\treturn record"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "func (s *memoryStatusStore) GetExecution(executionID string) (*ExecutionRecord, bool) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "\ts.mu.RLock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "\tdefer s.mu.RUnlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "\trecord, exists := s.executions[executionID]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "\treturn record, exists"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "func (s *memoryStatusStore) AddStatus(executionID string,"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 57,

          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./status/status_store.go",
