    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package webhook"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\t\"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "// statusCollectorKey 状态收集器在Context中的key"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "type statusCollectorKey struct{}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "// WithStatusCollector 将状态收集器注入到Context中"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "func WithStatusCollector(ctx context.Context, collector *StatusCollector) context.Context {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "\treturn context.WithValue(ctx, statusCollectorKey{}, collector)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "// GetStatusCollector 从Context中获取状态收集器"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "func GetStatusCollector(ctx context.Context) *StatusCollector {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "\tif collector, ok := ctx.Value(statusCollectorKey{}).(*StatusCollector); ok {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "\t\treturn collector"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "\treturn nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 20
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./webhook/context.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.24797946214675903
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# DigEino Performance Optimization Update - 2026-01-11"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "## Overview"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "This update focuses on improving the responsiveness of Eino-based applications by eliminating blocking operations in the status collection and webhook delivery layer."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "## Key Changes"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "### 1. Asynchronous Status Collection"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "The &#96;StatusCollector&#96; has been refactored to prevent slowing down the main execution graph during state persistence and webhook delivery."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "- **Async Execution**: &#96;StatusStore.AddStatus&#96; and &#96;WebhookClient.SendStatus&#96; now run in their own goroutines."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "- **Benefit**: Zero-latency impact on the Eino Graph from slow database writes or network-constrained webhook endpoints."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "- **Affected File**: &#96;webhook/status_collector.go&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "### 2. HTTP Connection Pooling for Webhooks"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "&#96;WebhookClient&#96; now utilizes a shared, high-performance HTTP Transport."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "- **Connection Reuse**: Configured &#96;MaxIdleConns&#96; and &#96;MaxIdleConnsPerHost&#96; to &#96;100&#96; to support high-frequency event delivery."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "- **Benefit**: Significantly reduces per-request overhead and prevents port exhaustion under load."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "- **Affected File**: &#96;webhook/webhook_client.go&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "### 3. Improved Token Usage Tracking"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "- **Aggregation**: Enhanced the &#96;CollectTokenUsage&#96; logic to accurately sum tokens across complex parallel and nested nodes."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "- **Benefit**: Provides a reliable metric for cost and performance monitoring."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "## Impact"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "These changes collectively allow &#96;DigFlow&#96; and other dependent agents to achieve significantly higher throughput and lower end-to-end latency, especially in multi-node graph architectures."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 25
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/updates/2026-01-11-performance-optimization.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.23196953535079956
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "func someProcess() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "    // 获取默认存储实例（根据配置自动选择 memory 或 mysql）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "    store := status.GetDefaultStore()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "    // 创建执行记录"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "    record := store.CreateExecution(\"exec_id_001\", \"my_app\", \"req_id_001\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "    // 更新状态"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "    store.AddStatus(\"exec_id_001\", webhook.ExecutionStatus{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "        Type: \"node_start\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "        NodeKey: \"node_1\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "        Status: \"running\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "    })"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "### 3.2 Webhook 客户端"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "用于将状态更新通过 HTTP 回调发送给第三方系统。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/webhook\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "func notifyCallback() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "    // 获取 Webhook 配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "    webhookCfg := webhook.GetWebhookConfig(nil)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "    if webhookCfg == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "        return"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "    client := webhook.NewWebhookClient(webhookCfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "    err := client.SendStatus(context.Background(), statusInfo)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "## 4. AgentState 扩展字段"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "&#96;AgentState&#96; 结构体提供了 &#96;Extensions&#96; 字段，允许各个项目存储特定的扩展数据，而无需修改核心库。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "### 4.1 基本使用"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "import \"github.com/originaleric/digeino\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "// 创建 AgentState"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "state := \u0026digeino.AgentState{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "    SessionID: \"session_001\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "    Query:     \"用户查询\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "// 设置扩展字段（字符串类型）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "state.SetStringExtension(\"pdf_path\", \"/path/to/file.pdf\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "state.SetStringExtension(\"custom_field\", \"custom_value\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "// 设置扩展字段（整数类型）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "state.SetIntExtension(\"page_count\", 10)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "// 设置扩展字段（布尔类型）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "state.SetBoolExtension(\"is_processed\", true)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "// 设置任意类型的扩展字段"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "state.SetExtension(\"complex_data\", map[string]interface{}{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "    \"key1\": \"value1\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "    \"key2\": 123,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "### 4.2 获取扩展字段"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "// 获取字符串类型"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "pdfPath, ok := state.GetStringExtension(\"pdf_path\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "if ok {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "    fmt.Printf(\"PDF Path: %s\\n\", pdfPath)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "// 获取整数类型"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "pageCount, ok := state.GetIntExtension(\"page_count\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "if ok {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "    fmt.Printf(\"Page Count: %d\\n\", pageCount)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "// 获取布尔类型"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 164
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 78
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/usage.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.2300979048013687
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "func (s *mysqlStatusStore) GetExecution(executionID string) (*ExecutionRecord, bool) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202,
            "text": "\tvar model MySQLExecutionModel"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203,
            "text": "\tif err := s.db.Table(s.execTable).Where(\"execution_id = ?\", executionID).First(\u0026model).Error; err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "\treturn \u0026ExecutionRecord{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "\t\tExecutionID: model.ExecutionID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "\t\tAppName:     model.AppName,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "\t\tRequestID:   model.RequestID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": "\t\tStartTime:   model.StartTime,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211,
            "text": "\t\tEndTime:     model.EndTime,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212,
            "text": "\t\tStatus:      model.Status,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "\t\tError:       model.Error,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "\t}, true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "func (s *mysqlStatusStore) AddStatus(executionID string, status webhook.ExecutionStatus) bool {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218,
            "text": "\tvar dataJson, controlJson string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219,
            "text": "\tif status.DataFlow != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220,
            "text": "\t\tb, _ := json.Marshal(status.DataFlow)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "text": "\t\tdataJson = string(b)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223,
            "text": "\tif status.ControlFlow != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224,
            "text": "\t\tb, _ := json.Marshal(status.ControlFlow)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225,
            "text": "\t\tcontrolJson = string(b)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228,
            "text": "\tstatusModel := \u0026MySQLExecutionStatusModel{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229,
            "text": "\t\tExecutionID:  executionID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 230,
            "text": "\t\tType:         status.Type,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 231,
            "text": "\t\tTimestampMs:  status.Timestamp,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232,
            "text": "\t\tNodeKey:      status.NodeKey,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 233,
            "text": "\t\tNodeType:     status.NodeType,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234,
            "text": "\t\tStatus:       status.Status,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235,
            "text": "\t\tError:        status.Error,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236,
            "text": "\t\tAppName:      status.AppName,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237,
            "text": "\t\tRequestID:    status.RequestID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238,
            "text": "\t\tDataFlowJSON: dataJson,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "text": "\t\tControlJSON:  controlJson,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241,
            "text": "\ts.db.Table(s.statusTable).Create(statusModel)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 242
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 243,
            "text": "\tif status.Type == \"complete\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244,
            "text": "\t\tupdate := map[string]interface{}{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245,
            "text": "\t\t\t\"status\":   \"completed\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 246,
            "text": "\t\t\t\"end_time\": time.Now(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248,
            "text": "\t\tif status.Status == \"error\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249,
            "text": "\t\t\tupdate[\"status\"] = \"failed\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250,
            "text": "\t\t\tupdate[\"error\"] = status.Error"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252,
            "text": "\t\ts.db.Table(s.execTable).Where(\"execution_id = ?\", executionID).Updates(update)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254,
            "text": "\treturn true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 255,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 257,
            "text": "func (s *mysqlStatusStore) SetResult(executionID string, result webhook.Message) bool {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258,
            "text": "\tupdate := map[string]interface{}{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 259,
            "text": "\t\t\"result_role\":    result.Role,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 260,
            "text": "\t\t\"result_content\": result.Content,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "text": "\ts.db.Table(s.execTable).Where(\"execution_id = ?\", executionID).Updates(update)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 263,
            "text": "\treturn true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 266,
            "text": "func (s *mysqlStatusStore) ListExecutions(page, pageSize int)"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 61,
            "line": 265
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 198
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./status/status_store.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.21778953075408936
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package status"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/webhook\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "// StatusStoreAdapter 适配器，将 status.StatusStore 适配为 webhook.StatusStoreInterface"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "type StatusStoreAdapter struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\tstore StatusStore"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "// NewStatusStoreAdapter 创建适配器"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "func NewStatusStoreAdapter(store StatusStore) *StatusStoreAdapter {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "\treturn \u0026StatusStoreAdapter{store: store}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "// CreateExecution 创建执行记录"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "func (a *StatusStoreAdapter) CreateExecution(executionID, appName, requestID string) interface{} {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "\treturn a.store.CreateExecution(executionID, appName, requestID)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "// AddStatus 添加状态更新"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "func (a *StatusStoreAdapter) AddStatus(executionID string, status webhook.ExecutionStatus) bool {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "\treturn a.store.AddStatus(executionID, status)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "// SetResult 设置执行结果"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "func (a *StatusStoreAdapter) SetResult(executionID string, result webhook.Message) bool {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\treturn a.store.SetResult(executionID, result)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 29
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./status/store_adapter.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.1942044496536255
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) OnNodeEnd(ctx context.Context, nodeKey, nodeType string, output interface{}, err error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "\tstartTime, ok := sc.nodeStartTime[nodeKey]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "\tlogger := sc.logger"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "\tvar nodeUsage *Usage"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "\tif nodeType == \"chat_model\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "\t\tnodeUsage = extractUsageFromOutput(output)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "\t\tif nodeUsage != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "\t\t\tsc.CollectTokenUsage(nodeKey, nodeUsage)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "\tstatus := ExecutionStatus{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "\t\tType:        \"node_end\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "\t\tTimestamp:   time.Now().UnixMilli(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "\t\tExecutionID: sc.executionID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "\t\tNodeKey:     nodeKey,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "\t\tNodeType:    nodeType,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "\t\tStatus:      \"success\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "\t\tAppName:     sc.appName,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "\t\tRequestID:   sc.requestID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "\t\tDataFlow:    sc.marshalDataFlow(nil, output),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "\t\tUsage:       nodeUsage,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "\tif ok {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "\t\t_ = time.Since(startTime)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "\t\tstatus.Status = \"error\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "\t\tstatus.Error = err.Error()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "\tif logger != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "\t\toutputCount := 0"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "\t\tif status.DataFlow != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "\t\t\toutputCount = status.DataFlow.OutputCount"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168,
            "text": "\t\tlogger.OnNodeEndLog(nodeKey, nodeType, outputCount, err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "\tsc.sendStatusAsync(ctx, status)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174,
            "text": "// OnComplete 执行完成"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) OnComplete(ctx context.Context, result *schema.Message, err error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177,
            "text": "\tpath := make([]string, len(sc.path))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178,
            "text": "\tcopy(path, sc.path)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179,
            "text": "\ttotalUsage := sc.getTotalUsageLocked()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180,
            "text": "\tlogger := sc.logger"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": "\tstatus := ExecutionStatus{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184,
            "text": "\t\tType:        \"complete\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185,
            "text": "\t\tTimestamp:   time.Now().UnixMilli(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186,
            "text": "\t\tExecutionID: sc.executionID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187,
            "text": "\t\tStatus:      \"success\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188,
            "text": "\t\tAppName:     sc.appName,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 189,
            "text": "\t\tRequestID:   sc.requestID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 190,
            "text": "\t\tControlFlow: \u0026ControlFlowStatus{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 191,
            "text": "\t\t\tPath: path,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 192,
            "text": "\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193,
            "text": "\t\tUsage: totalUsage,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 194,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 196,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "\t\tstatus.Status = \"error\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198,
            "text": "\t\tstatus.Error = err.Error()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "\tif logger != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202,
            "text": "\t\tlogger.OnCompleteLog(sc.executionID, time.Since(sc.startTime), totalUsage)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "\tsc.sendStatusAsync(ctx, status)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "// sendStatusAsync 异步发送状态"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) sendStatusAsync(ctx context.Context, status ExecutionStatus) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211,
            "text": "\tsc.statusHistory = append(sc.statusHistory, status)"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 52,
            "line": 210
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 31,
            "line": 125
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./webhook/status_collector.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.19377629458904266
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package research"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\t\"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\t\"encoding/json\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "\t\"fmt\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\t\"io\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "\t\"net/http\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\t\"strings\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "\t\"time\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "// JinaReaderRequest 网页读取请求"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "type JinaReaderRequest struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "\tURL string &#96;json:\"url\" jsonschema:\"required,description=要读取并转换为 Markdown 的网页 URL\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "// JinaReaderResponse 网页读取响应"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "type JinaReaderResponse struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\tMarkdown string &#96;json:\"markdown\" jsonschema:\"description=转换后的 Markdown 内容\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "// JinaReader 使用 r.jina.ai 将网页转换为 Markdown"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "// 这是一个极其强大的抓取方案，能够有效绕过微信公众号等平台的反爬验证"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "func JinaReader(ctx context.Context, req *JinaReaderRequest) (*JinaReaderResponse, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\tif req.URL == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"URL 不能为空\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "\t// 构造 Jina Reader URL"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\tjinaURL := fmt.Sprintf(\"https://r.jina.ai/%s\", req.URL)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\thttpReq, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, \"GET\", jinaURL, nil)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"创建请求失败: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "\t// 设置 Header 为 text/event-stream"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "\t// 实验证明 Jina Reader 的免费模式对 event-stream 的反爬支持更佳"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "\thttpReq.Header.Set(\"Accept\", \"text/event-stream\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\tclient := \u0026http.Client{Timeout: 90 * time.Second}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "\tresp, err := client.Do(httpReq)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"请求 Jina Reader 失败: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\tdefer resp.Body.Close()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "\tif resp.StatusCode != http.StatusOK {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "\t\tbody, _ := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"Jina Reader 返回错误: %d, body: %s\", resp.StatusCode, string(body))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "\tbody, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"读取响应失败: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "\t// 简单的 EventStream 解析逻辑 (Jina Reader 的格式通常是 data: {...})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "\t// 我们尝试寻找 data: 开头的行并提取其中的 content"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "\tcontent := string(body)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "\t// 如果是 event-stream 格式，尝试提取数据部分"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "\t// 为简单起见，如果包含 \"data: {\" 则尝试剥离前缀，"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "\t// 但其实 Jina Reader 在 event-stream 模式下如果是完整返回，"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 76,
            "line": 67
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/research/jina_reader.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.19257940351963043
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "func (s *memoryStatusStore) AddStatus(executionID string, status webhook.ExecutionStatus) bool {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "\ts.mu.RLock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "\trecord, exists := s.executions[executionID]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "\ts.mu.RUnlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "\tif !exists {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "\t\treturn false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "\trecord.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "\tdefer record.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "\trecord.StatusHistory = append(record.StatusHistory, status)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "\tif status.Type == \"complete\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "\t\tif status.Status == \"error\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "\t\t\trecord.Status = \"failed\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "\t\t\trecord.Error = status.Error"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "\t\t} else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "\t\t\trecord.Status = \"completed\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "\t\tnow := time.Now()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "\t\trecord.EndTime = \u0026now"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "\treturn true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "func (s *memoryStatusStore) SetResult(executionID string, result webhook.Message) bool {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "\ts.mu.RLock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "\trecord, exists := s.executions[executionID]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "\ts.mu.RUnlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "\tif !exists {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "\t\treturn false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "\trecord.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "\tdefer record.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "\trecord.Result = \u0026result"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "\treturn true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "func (s *memoryStatusStore) ListExecutions(page, pageSize int) ([]*ExecutionRecord, int) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "\ts.mu.RLock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "\tdefer s.mu.RUnlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "\trecords := make([]*ExecutionRecord, 0, len(s.executions))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "\tfor _, r := range s.executions {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "\t\trecords = append(records, r)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "\treturn records, len(records)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "// MySQL 模型"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "type MySQLExecutionModel struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "\tID            uint32     &#96;gorm:\"primaryKey;column:id;autoIncrement\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "\tExecutionID   string     &#96;gorm:\"column:execution_id;size:64;not null;uniqueIndex\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "\tAppName       string     &#96;gorm:\"column:app_name;size:100;not null;index\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,

          },
          {

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,

          },

          },

          },

          },
          {

          },

      "score": 0.18980473279953003
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# 2026-03-06 StatusCollector 增强与 DataFlow 配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "## 概述"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "对 &#96;webhook.StatusCollector&#96; 进行四项增强：DataFlow 数据流追踪（支持通过 eino.yml 配置开关，默认关闭）、chat_model 节点自动提取 Token Usage、OnComplete 事件附带汇总 Usage、以及可配置的日志 Hook。现有项目无需修改配置文件即可兼容。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "## 变更文件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "### config/config.go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "- **StatusConfig** 新增字段：&#96;DataFlow DataFlowConfig&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "- **DataFlowConfig** 新增类型：&#96;Enabled *bool&#96;（nil 或 false 表示关闭，默认关闭）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "- **Default()** 中为 &#96;Status.DataFlow.Enabled&#96; 赋默认值 &#96;false&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "### webhook/types.go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "- **ExecutionStatus** 新增字段：&#96;Usage *Usage&#96;（&#96;json:\"usage,omitempty\"&#96;），用于在 node_end / complete 事件中携带 Token 统计"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "### webhook/status_collector.go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "- **StatusLogger** 新增接口：&#96;OnNodeStartLog&#96;、&#96;OnNodeEndLog&#96;、&#96;OnCompleteLog&#96;，供调用方注入 zap/slog 等实现"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "- **StatusCollector** 新增字段：&#96;enableDataFlow bool&#96;（从 config 读取）、&#96;logger StatusLogger&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "- **NewStatusCollector**：创建时从 &#96;config.Get().Status.DataFlow.Enabled&#96; 读取 DataFlow 开关，未配置或为 false 时默认关闭"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "- **EnableDataFlow(enable bool)**：手动覆盖配置（优先级高于 eino.yml）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "- **SetLogger(logger StatusLogger)**：设置日志 Hook"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "- **OnNodeStart**：写入 &#96;DataFlow&#96;（当 enableDataFlow 为 true 时），并调用 &#96;logger.OnNodeStartLog&#96;（若已设置）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "- **OnNodeEnd**：写入 &#96;DataFlow&#96;；当节点类型为 &#96;chat_model&#96; 时自动从输出提取 Usage 并调用 &#96;CollectTokenUsage&#96;，同时在 status 中携带 &#96;Usage&#96;；调用 &#96;logger.OnNodeEndLog&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "- **OnComplete**：在 status 中携带汇总 &#96;Usage&#96;，并调用 &#96;logger.OnCompleteLog&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "- **marshalDataFlow**：通用序列化，支持 &#96;[]*schema.Message&#96;、&#96;*schema.Message&#96; 及任意类型的 JSON 序列化"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "- **extractUsageFromOutput** / **extractUsageFromMessage**：从 chat_model 输出的 &#96;ResponseMeta.Usage&#96; 提取 Token 统计"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "- **getTotalUsageLocked**：在持锁下返回汇总 Usage，供 OnComplete 使用"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 31
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/updates/2026-03-06_StatusCollector增强与DataFlow配置.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.1873796582221985
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "type MySQLExecutionStatusModel struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "\tID           uint32 &#96;gorm:\"primaryKey;column:id;autoIncrement\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "\tExecutionID  string &#96;gorm:\"column:execution_id;size:64;not null;index\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "\tType         string &#96;gorm:\"column:type;size:32;not null\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "\tTimestampMs  int64  &#96;gorm:\"column:timestamp_ms;not null\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "\tNodeKey      string &#96;gorm:\"column:node_key;size:100\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "\tNodeType     string &#96;gorm:\"column:node_type;size:50\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "\tStatus       string &#96;gorm:\"column:status;size:32;not null\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "\tError        string &#96;gorm:\"column:error;type:text\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "\tAppName      string &#96;gorm:\"column:app_name;size:100;not null;index\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "\tRequestID    string &#96;gorm:\"column:request_id;size:100;not null;index\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "\tDataFlowJSON string &#96;gorm:\"column:data_flow;type:text\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "\tControlJSON  string &#96;gorm:\"column:control_flow;type:text\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "\tCreatedAt    time.Time"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "type mysqlStatusStore struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "\tdb          *gorm.DB"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "\texecTable   string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "\tstatusTable string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "func NewMySQLStatusStore(cfg config.StatusStoreConfig) (StatusStore, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "\tdsn := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s:%s@tcp(%s:%d)/%s?charset=utf8mb4\u0026parseTime=True\u0026loc=Local\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168,
            "text": "\t\tcfg.MySQL.User, cfg.MySQL.Password, cfg.MySQL.Host, cfg.MySQL.Port, cfg.MySQL.Database)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,
            "text": "\tdb, err := gorm.Open(mysql.Open(dsn), \u0026gorm.Config{})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "\treturn \u0026mysqlStatusStore{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176,
            "text": "\t\tdb:          db,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177,
            "text": "\t\texecTable:   cfg.MySQL.ExecTable,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178,
            "text": "\t\tstatusTable: cfg.MySQL.StatusTable,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179,
            "text": "\t}, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182,
            "text": "func (s *mysqlStatusStore) CreateExecution(executionID, appName, requestID string) *ExecutionRecord {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": "\tnow := time.Now()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184,
            "text": "\tmodel := \u0026MySQLExecutionModel{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185,
            "text": "\t\tExecutionID: executionID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186,
            "text": "\t\tAppName:     appName,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187,
            "text": "\t\tRequestID:   requestID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188,
            "text": "\t\tStartTime:   now,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 189,
            "text": "\t\tStatus:      \"running\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 190,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 191,
            "text": "\ts.db.Table(s.execTable).Create(model)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 192,
            "text": "\treturn \u0026ExecutionRecord{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193,
            "text": "\t\tExecutionID: executionID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 194,
            "text": "\t\tAppName:     appName,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195,
            "text": "\t\tRequestID:   requestID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 196,
            "text": "\t\tStartTime:   now,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "\t\tStatus:      \"running\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "func (s *mysqlStatusStore) GetExecution(executionID string)"
          }
        ],

            "text": "// ========== Webhook 和 StatusStore 相关类型定义（从 webhook 或 config 包重新导出） =========="
          },

            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },
          {

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "// ControlFlowStatus 控制流状态"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "// WebhookConfig Webhook 配置"

          {

            "text": "    URL: \"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "    Events: [\"complete\", \"error\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "    method: \"POST\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "    timeout: 5"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    retry_count: 3"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "    retry_delay: 1000"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "  Store:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "    Enabled: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "    Type: \"memory\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    MySQL:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "      Host: \"127.0.0.1\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "      Port: 3306"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "      User: \"root\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "      Password: \"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "      Database: \"digpdf\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "      ExecTable: \"df_execution\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "      StatusTable: \"df_execution_status\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "WeChat:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "  Enabled: false                    # 是否启用微信推送功能"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "  AppID: \"\"                         # 微信服务号 AppID"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "  AppSecret: \"\"                     # 微信服务号 AppSecret"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "  OpenIDs: []                       # 默认接收消息的用户 openid 列表"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "  TokenFilePath: \"storage/app/wechat/access_token.json\"  # AccessToken 存储文件路径"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "  MiniProgram:                      # 小程序配置（用于小程序卡片消息）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "    AppID: \"\"                       # 小程序 AppID"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "    DefaultPath: \"pages/index/index\"  # 默认页面路径，例如 \"pages/index/index\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "    ThumbMediaID: \"\"                # 小程序卡片封面图片的 media_id"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "WeCom:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "  Enabled: false                    # 是否启用企业微信推送功能"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "  CorpID: \"\"                        # 企业微信 CorpID（我的企业 \u003e 企业信息）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "  QYAPIHost: \"https://qyapi.weixin.qq.com\"  # 企业微信 API 地址（可选，支持自定义域名）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "  TokenFilePath: \"storage/app/wecom/access_token.json\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "  Applications:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "    - AgentID: 0                    # 企业微信应用 ID（应用管理 \u003e 自建应用）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "      AgentSecret: \"\"               # 应用 Secret"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "      ManageAllKFSession: false     # 是否管理所有客服会话（用于 send_wecom_customer_message 发给个人微信）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "ChatModel:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "  Type: \"qwen\"                      # 模型类型: qwen, openai"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 48
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./config/config.yaml",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.30720019340515137
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 268,
            "text": "func Default() *Config {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 269,
            "text": "\tenabled := true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 270,
            "text": "\tdisabled := false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 271,
            "text": "\twechatDisabled := false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 272,
            "text": "\tdataFlowDisabled := false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 273,
            "text": "\treturn \u0026Config{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274,
            "text": "\t\tHttpServer: HttpServerConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 275,
            "text": "\t\t\tApi: struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 276,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tPort string &#96;yaml:\"Port\" json:\"Port\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 277,
            "text": "\t\t\t}{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 278,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tPort: \":20201\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 279,
            "text": "\t\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 280,
            "text": "\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 281,
            "text": "\t\tStatus: StatusConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 282,
            "text": "\t\t\tWebhook: AppWebhookConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 283,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tEnabled: \u0026enabled,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tConfig: WebhookConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tMethod:     \"POST\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 286,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tTimeout:    5,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 287,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tRetryCount: 3,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 288,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tRetryDelay: 1000,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 289,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 290,
            "text": "\t\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 291,
            "text": "\t\t\tStore: StatusStoreConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 292,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tEnabled: \u0026enabled,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 293,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tType:    \"memory\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 294,
            "text": "\t\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 295,
            "text": "\t\t\tDataFlow: DataFlowConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 296,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tEnabled: \u0026dataFlowDisabled,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 297,
            "text": "\t\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 298,
            "text": "\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 299,
            "text": "\t\tWeChat: WeChatConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 300,
            "text": "\t\t\tEnabled:       \u0026wechatDisabled,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 301,
            "text": "\t\t\tTokenFilePath: \"storage/app/wechat/access_token.json\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 302,
            "text": "\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 303,
            "text": "\t\tWeCom: WeComConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 304,
            "text": "\t\t\tEnabled:       \u0026wechatDisabled,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 305,
            "text": "\t\t\tQYAPIHost:     \"https://qyapi.weixin.qq.com\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 306,
            "text": "\t\t\tTokenFilePath: \"storage/app/wecom/access_token.json\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 307,
            "text": "\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 308,
            "text": "\t\tChatModel: ChatModelConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 309,
            "text": "\t\t\tType: \"qwen\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 310,
            "text": "\t\t\tConfig: map[string]interface{}{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 311,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\"ApiKey\":  \"\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 312,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\"Model\":   \"qwen-max\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 313,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\"BaseUrl\": \"https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 314,
            "text": "\t\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 315,
            "text": "\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 316,
            "text": "\t\tUIUX: UIUXConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 317,
            "text": "\t\t\tStorage: UIUXStorageConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 318,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tBaseDir: \"storage/app/ui_ux\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 319,
            "text": "\t\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 320,
            "text": "\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 321,
            "text": "\t\tTools: ToolsConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 322,
            "text": "\t\t\tFirecrawl: FirecrawlConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 323,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tApiKey: \"\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 324,
            "text": "\t\t\t},"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 5,
            "line": 323
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 29,
            "line": 266
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./config/config.go",
