      },
      "score": 0.27882230281829834
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# DigEino 使用指南"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "&#96;DigEino&#96; 是基于 &#96;Eino&#96; 的二次封装，旨在为 Go 项目提供统一的状态追踪、Webhook 回调及配置管理功能。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "## 1. 安装"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "在您的 Go 项目中，通过以下命令导入："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "go get github.com/originaleric/digeino"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "## 2. 配置管理"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "&#96;DigEino&#96; 提供了灵活的配置管理方式，推荐在项目启动时进行初始化。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "### 2.1 依赖结构"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "配置主要包含两个部分："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "- &#96;HttpServer&#96;: 用于获取本地服务端口（构建默认 Webhook URL 时使用）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "- &#96;Status&#96;: 包含 &#96;Webhook&#96; 和 &#96;Store&#96;（存储）的配置。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "### 2.2 使用示例"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "#### 方式 A：从 YAML 文件加载（推荐）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "首先，在您的项目中准备一个 &#96;config.yaml&#96; 文件（可以参考 &#96;DigEino/config/config.yaml&#96;）："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "HttpServer:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "  Api:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "    Port: \":20201\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "Status:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "  Webhook:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "    Enabled: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "    URL: \"https://your-callback-url.com/webhook\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "    Events: [\"complete\", \"error\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "  Store:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "    Enabled: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "    Type: \"memory\" # 或 \"mysql\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "然后在代码中加载："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "import \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "func main() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "    // 加载配置文件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "    _, err := config.Load(\"path/to/your/config.yaml\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "    if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "        panic(err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "#### 方式 B：在代码中手动设置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "import \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "func initConfig() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "    cfg := config.Default()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "    cfg.Status.Webhook.Config.URL = \"https://custom-url.com\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "    config.Set(cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "## 3. 核心功能使用"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "### 3.1 状态存储 (Status Store)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "&#96;DigEino&#96; 支持将执行状态存储在内存或 MySQL 中。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "import \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/status\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "func someProcess() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "    // 获取默认存储实例（根据配置自动选择 memory 或 mysql）"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 80
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/usage.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.24554890394210815
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "text": "func CodeIndex(ctx context.Context, req *CodeIndexRequest) (*CodeIndexResponse, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240,
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get().Tools"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241,
            "text": "\tsearchPath := req.Path"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 242,
            "text": "\tif searchPath == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 243,
            "text": "\t\tsearchPath = \".\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 246,
            "text": "\t// 1. Loader"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247,
            "text": "\tldr, err := file.NewFileLoader(ctx, \u0026file.FileLoaderConfig{})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252,
            "text": "\t// 2. Splitter"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253,
            "text": "\tspl, err := markdown.NewHeaderSplitter(ctx, \u0026markdown.HeaderConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254,
            "text": "\t\tHeaders: map[string]string{\"#\": \"h1\", \"##\": \"h2\"},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 255,
            "text": "\t})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 257,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 259
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 260,
            "text": "\t// 3. Indexer"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261,
            "text": "\tidxConn, err := createPineconeConn(cfg.Pinecone.ApiKey, cfg.Pinecone.Host)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 263,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 266,
            "text": "\tembedder, err := openai.NewEmbedder(ctx, \u0026openai.EmbeddingConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 267,
            "text": "\t\tAPIKey:     cfg.Embedding.ApiKey,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 268,
            "text": "\t\tBaseURL:    cfg.Embedding.BaseUrl,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 269,
            "text": "\t\tModel:      cfg.Embedding.Model,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 270,
            "text": "\t\tDimensions: \u0026cfg.Embedding.Dimensions,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 271,
            "text": "\t})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 272,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 273,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 275
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 276,
            "text": "\tidx := \u0026PineconeIndexer{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 277,
            "text": "\t\tindexConn: idxConn,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 278,
            "text": "\t\tembedder:  embedder,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 279,
            "text": "\t\tnamespace: cfg.Pinecone.Namespace,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 280,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 281
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 282,
            "text": "\t// 4. Graph"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 283,
            "text": "\tg := compose.NewGraph[document.Source, []string]()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284,
            "text": "\t_ = g.AddLoaderNode(\"loader\", ldr)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285,
            "text": "\t_ = g.AddDocumentTransformerNode(\"splitter\", spl)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 286,
            "text": "\t_ = g.AddIndexerNode(\"indexer\", idx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 287
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 288,
            "text": "\t_ = g.AddEdge(compose.START, \"loader\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 289,
            "text": "\t_ = g.AddEdge(\"loader\", \"splitter\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 290,
            "text": "\t_ = g.AddEdge(\"splitter\", \"indexer\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 291,
            "text": "\t_ = g.AddEdge(\"indexer\", compose.END)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 292
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 293,
            "text": "\trunnable, err := g.Compile(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 294,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 295,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 296,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 297
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 298,
            "text": "\t// 5. Execution Logic (Dir vs File)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 299,
            "text": "\tvar totalDocs int"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 300
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 301,
            "text": "\tinfo, err := os.Stat(searchPath)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 302,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 303,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"无法访问路径: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 304,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 305
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 306,
            "text": "\tprocessFile := func(path string) error {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 307,
            "text": "\t\t_, err := runnable.Invoke(ctx, document.Source{URI: path})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 308,
            "text": "\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 309,
            "text": "\t\t\t// 记录错误但继续处理"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 310,
            "text": "\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"索引文件失败 %s: %v\\n\", path, err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 311,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 312,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 313,
            "text": "\t\ttotalDocs++"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 314,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 315,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 316
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 317,
            "text": "\tif info.IsDir()"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 16,
            "line": 316
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 236
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/research/semantic_search.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.2159622311592102
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "// WebhookConfig 基础 Webhook 配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "type WebhookConfig struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "\tURL        string            &#96;yaml:\"url\" json:\"url\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "\tMethod     string            &#96;yaml:\"method\" json:\"method,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\tHeaders    map[string]string &#96;yaml:\"headers\" json:\"headers,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "\tSecret     string            &#96;yaml:\"secret\" json:\"secret,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "\tTimeout    int               &#96;yaml:\"timeout\" json:\"timeout,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "\tRetryCount int               &#96;yaml:\"retry_count\" json:\"retry_count,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "\tRetryDelay int               &#96;yaml:\"retry_delay\" json:\"retry_delay,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "\tEvents     []string          &#96;yaml:\"events\" json:\"events,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "// StatusStoreConfig 状态存储配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "type StatusStoreConfig struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "\tEnabled *bool       &#96;yaml:\"Enabled\" json:\"Enabled,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "\tType    string      &#96;yaml:\"Type\" json:\"Type,omitempty\"&#96; // memory, mysql"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "\tMySQL   MySQLConfig &#96;yaml:\"MySQL\" json:\"MySQL\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "// MySQLConfig MySQL 配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "type MySQLConfig struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "\tHost        string &#96;yaml:\"Host\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "\tPort        int    &#96;yaml:\"Port\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "\tUser        string &#96;yaml:\"User\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "\tPassword    string &#96;yaml:\"Password\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "\tDatabase    string &#96;yaml:\"Database\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "\tExecTable   string &#96;yaml:\"ExecTable\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "\tStatusTable string &#96;yaml:\"StatusTable\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "// WeChatConfig 微信推送配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "type WeChatConfig struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "\tEnabled       *bool    &#96;yaml:\"Enabled\" json:\"Enabled,omitempty\"&#96;             // 是否启用微信推送功能"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "\tAppID         string   &#96;yaml:\"AppID\" json:\"AppID,omitempty\"&#96;                 // 微信服务号 AppID"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "\tAppSecret     string   &#96;yaml:\"AppSecret\" json:\"AppSecret,omitempty\"&#96;         // 微信服务号 AppSecret"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "\tOpenIDs       []string &#96;yaml:\"OpenIDs\" json:\"OpenIDs,omitempty\"&#96;             // 默认接收消息的用户 openid 列表"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "\tTokenFilePath string   &#96;yaml:\"TokenFilePath\" json:\"TokenFilePath,omitempty\"&#96; // AccessToken 存储文件路径（相对于项目根目录）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "\t// 小程序相关配置（用于发送小程序卡片消息）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "\tMiniProgram MiniProgramConfig &#96;yaml:\"MiniProgram\" json:\"MiniProgram,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "// MiniProgramConfig 小程序配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "type"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 4,
            "line": 87
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 43
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./config/config.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.21425260603427887
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package webhook"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\t\"fmt\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\t\"strings\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "// GetWebhookConfig 从全局配置获取 WebhookConfig"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "func GetWebhookConfig(buildDefaultURL func() string) *config.WebhookConfig {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get().Status.Webhook"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "\tif cfg.Enabled != nil \u0026\u0026 !*cfg.Enabled {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "\t// 这里需要注意，Config 是 WebhookConfig 类型"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "\twebhookConfig := \u0026cfg.Config"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "\tif webhookConfig.URL == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "\t\tif cfg.URL != \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "\t\t\twebhookConfig.URL = cfg.URL"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "\t\t} else if buildDefaultURL != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\t\t\twebhookConfig.URL = buildDefaultURL()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "\tif webhookConfig.Method == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\t\twebhookConfig.Method = \"POST\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "\tif webhookConfig.Timeout == 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "\t\twebhookConfig.Timeout = 5"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "\tif webhookConfig.RetryCount == 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\t\twebhookConfig.RetryCount = 3"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\tif webhookConfig.RetryDelay == 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "\t\twebhookConfig.RetryDelay = 1000"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "\treturn webhookConfig"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "// IsStoreEnabled 检查 Store 是否启用"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "func IsStoreEnabled() bool {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get().Status.Store"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "\tif cfg.Enabled != nil \u0026\u0026 !*cfg.Enabled {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "\t\treturn false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\treturn true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "// BuildDefaultWebhookURL 构建默认的本地 webhook URL"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "func BuildDefaultWebhookURL(scheme, host string) string {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "\tif host == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "\t\tport := config.Get().HttpServer.Api.Port"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "\t\tif port == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "\t\t\thost = \"localhost\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "\t\t} else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "\t\t\tif strings.HasPrefix(port, \":\") {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "\t\t\t\thost = \"localhost\" + port"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "\t\t\t} else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "\t\t\t\thost = \"localhost:\" + port"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%s://%s/api/v1/webhook/status\", scheme, host)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 68
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./webhook/config.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.20987355709075928
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) AddWebhookClient(client *WebhookClient) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "\tdefer sc.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "\tsc.webhookClients = append(sc.webhookClients, client)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "// SetStatusStore 设置状态存储"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) SetStatusStore(store StatusStoreInterface) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "\tdefer sc.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "\tsc.statusStore = store"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "// SetStatusCallback 设置状态回调"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) SetStatusCallback(callback func(status ExecutionStatus)) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "\tdefer sc.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "\tsc.statusCallback = callback"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "// OnNodeStart 节点开始执行"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) OnNodeStart(ctx context.Context, nodeKey, nodeType string, input interface{}) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "\tsc.nodeStartTime[nodeKey] = time.Now()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "\tsc.path = append(sc.path, nodeKey)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "\tlogger := sc.logger"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "\tstatus := ExecutionStatus{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "\t\tType:        \"node_start\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "\t\tTimestamp:   time.Now().UnixMilli(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "\t\tExecutionID: sc.executionID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "\t\tNodeKey:     nodeKey,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "\t\tNodeType:    nodeType,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "\t\tStatus:      \"running\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "\t\tAppName:     sc.appName,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "\t\tRequestID:   sc.requestID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "\t\tDataFlow:    sc.marshalDataFlow(input, nil),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "\tif logger != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "\t\tinputCount := 0"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "\t\tif status.DataFlow != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "\t\t\tinputCount = status.DataFlow.InputCount"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "\t\tlogger.OnNodeStartLog(nodeKey, nodeType, inputCount)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "\tsc.sendStatusAsync(ctx, status)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "// OnNodeEnd 节点结束执行"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) OnNodeEnd(ctx context.Context, nodeKey, nodeType string, output interface{}, err error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "\tstartTime, ok := sc.nodeStartTime[nodeKey]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "\tlogger := sc.logger"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 20,
            "line": 129
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 44,
            "line": 73
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./webhook/status_collector.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.20327340066432953
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 266,
            "text": "func (s *mysqlStatusStore) ListExecutions(page, pageSize int) ([]*ExecutionRecord, int) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 267,
            "text": "\tvar models []MySQLExecutionModel"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 268,
            "text": "\tvar total int64"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 269,
            "text": "\ts.db.Table(s.execTable).Count(\u0026total)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 270,
            "text": "\ts.db.Table(s.execTable).Offset((page - 1) * pageSize).Limit(pageSize).Find(\u0026models)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 271
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 272,
            "text": "\trecords := make([]*ExecutionRecord, 0, len(models))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 273,
            "text": "\tfor _, m := range models {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274,
            "text": "\t\trecords = append(records, \u0026ExecutionRecord{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 275,
            "text": "\t\t\tExecutionID: m.ExecutionID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 276,
            "text": "\t\t\tAppName:     m.AppName,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 277,
            "text": "\t\t\tRequestID:   m.RequestID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 278,
            "text": "\t\t\tStartTime:   m.StartTime,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 279,
            "text": "\t\t\tEndTime:     m.EndTime,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 280,
            "text": "\t\t\tStatus:      m.Status,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 281,
            "text": "\t\t})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 282,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 283,
            "text": "\treturn records, int(total)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 286,
            "text": "func GetDefaultStore() StatusStore {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 287,
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get().Status.Store"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 288,
            "text": "\tif cfg.Type == \"memory\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 289,
            "text": "\t\treturn NewMemoryStatusStore(1000)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 290,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 291,
            "text": "\tstore, err := NewMySQLStatusStore(cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 292,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 293,
            "text": "\t\treturn NewMemoryStatusStore(1000)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 294,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 295,
            "text": "\tif store == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 296,
            "text": "\t\treturn NewMemoryStatusStore(1000)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 297,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 298,
            "text": "\treturn store"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 299,
            "text": "}"
          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package webhook"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\t\"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\t\"encoding/json\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "\t\"sync\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\t\"time\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/schema\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "// StatusLogger 日志接口，调用方可选择性实现"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "type StatusLogger interface {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "\tOnNodeStartLog(nodeKey, nodeType string, inputCount int)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "\tOnNodeEndLog(nodeKey, nodeType string, outputCount int, err error)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "\tOnCompleteLog(executionID string, duration time.Duration, usage *Usage)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "// StatusCollector 状态收集器"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "type StatusCollector struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "\texecutionID string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\tappName     string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "\trequestID   string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\tstartTime   time.Time"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "\twebhookClients []*WebhookClient"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\tstatusStore    StatusStoreInterface"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\tstatusCallback func(status ExecutionStatus)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "\tmu            sync.Mutex"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "\tstatusHistory []ExecutionStatus"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "\tnodeStartTime map[string]time.Time"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\tpath          []string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\ttokenUsageMap map[string]*Usage"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "\ttotalUsage    Usage"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "\tenableDataFlow bool"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "\tlogger         StatusLogger"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "// NewStatusCollector 创建状态收集器，DataFlow 开关从 config.Get().Status.DataFlow 读取，默认关闭"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "func NewStatusCollector(executionID, appName, requestID string) *StatusCollector {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\tenableDataFlow := false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "\tif cfg := config.Get(); cfg != nil \u0026\u0026 cfg.Status.DataFlow.Enabled != nil \u0026\u0026 *cfg.Status.DataFlow.Enabled {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "\t\tenableDataFlow = true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "\treturn \u0026StatusCollector{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\t\texecutionID:    executionID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "\t\tappName:        appName,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "\t\trequestID:      requestID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "\t\tstartTime:      time.Now(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "\t\tnodeStartTime:  make(map[string]time.Time),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "\t\ttokenUsageMap:  make(map[string]*Usage),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "\t\tenableDataFlow: enableDataFlow,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "// EnableDataFlow 启用/禁用 DataFlow 追踪（优先级高于 eino.yml 配置）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) EnableDataFlow(enable bool) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "\tdefer sc.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "\tsc.enableDataFlow = enable"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "// SetLogger 设置日志 hook"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) SetLogger(logger StatusLogger) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "\tdefer sc.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "\tsc.logger = logger"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "// AddWebhookClient 添加 Webhook 客户端"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) AddWebhookClient(client *WebhookClient) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "\tdefer sc.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "\tsc.webhookClients ="
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 20,
            "line": 77
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./webhook/status_collector.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.19312715530395508

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, wecomCustomerMiniprogramTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "\t// 4. 通用调研系列工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "\tgrepTool, err := research.NewGrepSearchTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, grepTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "\treadTool, err := research.NewReadFileTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, readTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "\tdocTool, err := research.NewDocToMarkdownTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, docTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "\tfirecrawlTool, err := research.NewFirecrawlTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, firecrawlTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "\twebSearchTool, err := websearch.NewWebSearchTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, webSearchTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "\tsemanticSearchTool, err := research.NewSemanticSearchTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, semanticSearchTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "\tcodeIndexTool, err := research.NewCodeIndexTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, codeIndexTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "\tjinaReaderTool, err := research.NewJinaReaderTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, jinaReaderTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "\twriteFileTool, err := research.NewWriteFileTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, writeFileTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "\t// 5. 本地无头浏览器抓取工具（高级反爬场景，如微信公众号）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "\tlocalScraperTool, err := research.NewLocalScraperTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, localScraperTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "\t// 5.1 本地浏览器通用抓取工具（read/screenshot + cookie 复用）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "\tbrowserBrowseTool, err := research.NewBrowserBrowseTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, browserBrowseTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "\t// 这里未来可以放入通用的 Google 搜索、计算器等跨项目工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "\treturn tools, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "type MySQLExecutionStatusModel struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "\tID           uint32 &#96;gorm:\"primaryKey;column:id;autoIncrement\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "\tExecutionID  string &#96;gorm:\"column:execution_id;size:64;not null;index\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "\tType         string &#96;gorm:\"column:type;size:32;not null\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "\tTimestampMs  int64  &#96;gorm:\"column:timestamp_ms;not null\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "\tNodeKey      string &#96;gorm:\"column:node_key;size:100\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "\tNodeType     string &#96;gorm:\"column:node_type;size:50\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "\tStatus       string &#96;gorm:\"column:status;size:32;not null\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "\tError        string &#96;gorm:\"column:error;type:text\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "\tAppName      string &#96;gorm:\"column:app_name;size:100;not null;index\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "\tRequestID    string &#96;gorm:\"column:request_id;size:100;not null;index\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "\tDataFlowJSON string &#96;gorm:\"column:data_flow;type:text\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "\tControlJSON  string &#96;gorm:\"column:control_flow;type:text\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "\tCreatedAt    time.Time"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "type mysqlStatusStore struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "\tdb          *gorm.DB"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "\texecTable   string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "\tstatusTable string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "func NewMySQLStatusStore(cfg config.StatusStoreConfig) (StatusStore, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "\tdsn := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s:%s@tcp(%s:%d)/%s?charset=utf8mb4\u0026parseTime=True\u0026loc=Local\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168,
            "text": "\t\tcfg.MySQL.User, cfg.MySQL.Password, cfg.MySQL.Host, cfg.MySQL.Port, cfg.MySQL.Database)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,
            "text": "\tdb, err := gorm.Open(mysql.Open(dsn), \u0026gorm.Config{})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "\treturn \u0026mysqlStatusStore{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176,
            "text": "\t\tdb:          db,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177,
            "text": "\t\texecTable:   cfg.MySQL.ExecTable,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178,
            "text": "\t\tstatusTable: cfg.MySQL.StatusTable,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179,
            "text": "\t}, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182,
            "text": "func (s *mysqlStatusStore) CreateExecution(executionID, appName, requestID string) *ExecutionRecord {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": "\tnow := time.Now()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184,
            "text": "\tmodel := \u0026MySQLExecutionModel{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185,
            "text": "\t\tExecutionID: executionID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186,
            "text": "\t\tAppName:     appName,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187,
            "text": "\t\tRequestID:   requestID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188,
            "text": "\t\tStartTime:   now,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 189,
            "text": "\t\tStatus:      \"running\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 190,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 191,
            "text": "\ts.db.Table(s.execTable).Create(model)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 192,
            "text": "\treturn \u0026ExecutionRecord{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193,
            "text": "\t\tExecutionID: executionID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 194,
            "text": "\t\tAppName:     appName,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195,
            "text": "\t\tRequestID:   requestID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 196,
            "text": "\t\tStartTime:   now,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "\t\tStatus:      \"running\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "func (s *mysqlStatusStore) GetExecution(executionID string)"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 59,
            "line": 200
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 141
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./status/status_store.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.1907172054052353
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "Tools:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "  Firecrawl:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "    ApiKey: \"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "  WebSearch:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "    Engine: \"bocha\" # bocha, serpapi, google, bing, duckduckgo, firecrawl, tavily"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "    Bocha:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "      ApiKey: \"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "      BaseUrl: \"https://api.bochaai.com\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "    SerpApi:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "      ApiKey: \"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "      BaseUrl: \"https://serpapi.com/search\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "    Google:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "      ApiKey: \"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "      Cx: \"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "      BaseUrl: \"https://www.googleapis.com/customsearch/v1\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "    Bing:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "      ApiKey: \"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "      MaxResults: 10"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "      Region: \"en-US\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "      SafeSearch: \"Moderate\" # Off, Moderate, Strict"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "    Tavily:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "      ApiKey: \"\"                    # 或环境变量 TAVILY_API_KEY"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "      BaseUrl: \"https://api.tavily.com\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "      SearchDepth: \"basic\"          # basic | fast | advanced | ultra-fast"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "      Topic: \"general\"              # general | news | finance"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "    DuckDuckGo:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "      MaxResults: 10"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "      Region: \"wt-wt\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "      SafeSearch: \"Moderate\" # Off, Moderate, Strict"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "  Unstructured:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "    ApiKey: \"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "    BaseUrl: \"https://api.unstructured.io/general/v0/general\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "  Pinecone:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "    ApiKey: \"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "    Host: \"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "    Namespace: \"default\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "    IndexName: \"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "  Embedding:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "    Type: \"qwen\" # qwen, openai"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "    ApiKey: \"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "    BaseUrl: \"https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "    Model: \"text-embedding-v2\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "    Dimensions: 1024"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "  LocalBrowser:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "    Enabled: false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "    MaxConcurrency: 3"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "    TotalTimeoutSec: 60"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "    NavigateTimeoutSec: 30"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "    WaitSelectorTimeoutSec: 20"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "    ChromePath: \"\" # 可选：自定义 Chromium 可执行文件路径"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "    Headless: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "    CookieStoreDir: \"storage/app/browser_cookies\""

          {
            "lineNumber": 321,
            "text": "\t\tTools: ToolsConfig{"
          },

            "lineNumber": 322,
            "text": "\t\t\tFirecrawl: FirecrawlConfig{"
          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 324,
            "text": "\t\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 325,
            "text": "\t\t\tWebSearch: WebSearchConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 326,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tEngine: \"bocha\","
          },
          {

            "text": "\t\t\t\tBocha: BochaConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 328,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tBaseUrl: \"https://api.bochaai.com\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 329,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 330,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 331,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tBaseUrl: \"https://serpapi.com/search\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 332,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 333,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tGoogle: GoogleConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 334,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tBaseUrl: \"https://www.googleapis.com/customsearch/v1\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 335,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 336,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tBing: BingConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 337,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tMaxResults: 10,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 338,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 339,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tTavily: TavilyConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 340,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tBaseUrl:     \"https://api.tavily.com\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 341,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tSearchDepth: \"basic\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 342,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tTopic:       \"general\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 343,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 344,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tDuckDuckGo: DuckDuckGoConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 345,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tMaxResults: 10,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 346,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 347,
            "text": "\t\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 348,
            "text": "\t\t\tUnstructured: UnstructuredConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 349,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tApiKey:  \"\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 350,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tBaseUrl: \"https://api.unstructured.io/general/v0/general\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 351,
            "text": "\t\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 352,
            "text": "\t\t\tPinecone: PineconeConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 353,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tApiKey:    \"\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 354,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tNamespace: \"default\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 355,
            "text": "\t\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 356,
            "text": "\t\t\tEmbedding: EmbeddingConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 357,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tType:       \"qwen\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 358,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tModel:      \"text-embedding-v2\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 359,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tDimensions: 1024,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 360,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 361,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 362,
            "text": "\t\t\tLocalBrowser: LocalBrowserConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 363,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 364,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tMaxConcurrency:         3,"
          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 366,

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "func BaseTools(ctx context.Context) ([]tool.BaseTool, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "\tvar tools []tool.BaseTool"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "\t// 1. UI/UX 设计智能工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\tuiTool, err := ui_ux.NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, uiTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "\t// 1.1. UI/UX 设计系统生成工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "\tdesignSystemTool, err := ui_ux.NewGenerateDesignSystemTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, designSystemTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "\t// 1.2. UI/UX 设计系统持久化工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "\tpersistTool, err := ui_ux.NewPersistDesignSystemTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, persistTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "\t// 2. 微信推送工具（如果已启用）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "\twxTool, err := wx.NewWeChatMessageTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, wxTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "\t// 3. 企业微信推送工具（如果已启用）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "\twecomTool, err := wx.NewWeComMessageTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, wecomTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "\twecomImageTool, err := wx.NewWeComImageTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, wecomImageTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "\twecomTextCardTool, err := wx.NewWeComTextCardTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, wecomTextCardTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "\twecomCustomerTool, err := wx.NewWeComCustomerMessageTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, wecomCustomerTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "\twecomCustomerImageTool, err := wx.NewWeComCustomerImageTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, wecomCustomerImageTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "\twecomCustomerVoiceTool, err := wx.NewWeComCustomerVoiceTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, wecomCustomerVoiceTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "\twecomCustomerVideoTool, err := wx.NewWeComCustomerVideoTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, wecomCustomerVideoTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {

          {

          },
          {

          },

            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {

          {

          },
          {

            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, wecomCustomerLinkTool)"
          },

            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,

          },

            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, wecomCustomerMiniprogramTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,

          }
        ],
