    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package status"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\t\"encoding/json\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\t\"fmt\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "\t\"sync\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\t\"time\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/webhook\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "\t\"gorm.io/driver/mysql\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "\t\"gorm.io/gorm\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "// StatusStore 状态存储接口"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "type StatusStore interface {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "\tCreateExecution(executionID, appName, requestID string) *ExecutionRecord"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "\tGetExecution(executionID string) (*ExecutionRecord, bool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "\tAddStatus(executionID string, status webhook.ExecutionStatus) bool"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "\tSetResult(executionID string, result webhook.Message) bool"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "\tListExecutions(page, pageSize int) ([]*ExecutionRecord, int)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "// ExecutionRecord 执行记录"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "type ExecutionRecord struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "\tExecutionID   string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\tAppName       string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\tRequestID     string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "\tStartTime     time.Time"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "\tEndTime       *time.Time"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "\tStatus        string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "\tStatusHistory []webhook.ExecutionStatus"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\tResult        *webhook.Message"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "\tError         string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\tmu            sync.RWMutex"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "// memoryStatusStore 内存实现"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "type memoryStatusStore struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "\tmu         sync.RWMutex"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "\texecutions map[string]*ExecutionRecord"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "\tmaxRecords int"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "func NewMemoryStatusStore(maxRecords int) StatusStore {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "\treturn \u0026memoryStatusStore{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "\t\texecutions: make(map[string]*ExecutionRecord),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "\t\tmaxRecords: maxRecords,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "func (s *memoryStatusStore) CreateExecution(executionID, appName, requestID string) *ExecutionRecord {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "\ts.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "\tdefer s.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "\trecord := \u0026ExecutionRecord{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "\t\tExecutionID:   executionID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "\t\tAppName:       appName,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "\t\tRequestID:     requestID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "\t\tStartTime:     time.Now(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "\t\tStatus:        \"running\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "\t\tStatusHistory: make([]webhook.ExecutionStatus, 0),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "\ts.executions[executionID] = record"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "\treturn record"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "func (s *memoryStatusStore) GetExecution(executionID string) (*ExecutionRecord, bool) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "\ts.mu.RLock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "\tdefer s.mu.RUnlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "\trecord, exists := s.executions[executionID]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "\treturn record, exists"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "func (s *memoryStatusStore) AddStatus(executionID string,"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 57,
            "line": 75
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./status/status_store.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.1767127513885498
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": "// UnstructuredConfig Unstructured.io 文档解析配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211,
            "text": "type UnstructuredConfig struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212,
            "text": "\tApiKey  string &#96;yaml:\"ApiKey\" json:\"ApiKey\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "\tBaseUrl string &#96;yaml:\"BaseUrl\" json:\"BaseUrl\"&#96; // 默认为 https://api.unstructured.io/general/v0/general"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216,
            "text": "// PineconeConfig Pinecone 向量数据库配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "type PineconeConfig struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218,
            "text": "\tApiKey    string &#96;yaml:\"ApiKey\" json:\"ApiKey\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219,
            "text": "\tHost      string &#96;yaml:\"Host\" json:\"Host\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220,
            "text": "\tNamespace string &#96;yaml:\"Namespace\" json:\"Namespace\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "text": "\tIndexName string &#96;yaml:\"IndexName\" json:\"IndexName\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224,
            "text": "// EmbeddingConfig 向量化模型配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225,
            "text": "type EmbeddingConfig struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226,
            "text": "\tType       string &#96;yaml:\"Type\" json:\"Type\"&#96; // openai, qwen"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227,
            "text": "\tApiKey     string &#96;yaml:\"ApiKey\" json:\"ApiKey\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228,
            "text": "\tBaseUrl    string &#96;yaml:\"BaseUrl\" json:\"BaseUrl\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229,
            "text": "\tModel      string &#96;yaml:\"Model\" json:\"Model\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 230,
            "text": "\tDimensions int    &#96;yaml:\"Dimensions\" json:\"Dimensions\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 231,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 233,
            "text": "var ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234,
            "text": "\t// DefaultConfig 全局默认配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235,
            "text": "\tcurrentConfig *Config"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238,
            "text": "// Load 从文件加载配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "text": "func Load(path string) (*Config, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240,
            "text": "\tdata, err := os.ReadFile(path)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 242,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 243,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245,
            "text": "\tvar cfg Config"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 246,
            "text": "\tif err := yaml.Unmarshal(data, \u0026cfg); err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250,
            "text": "\tcurrentConfig = \u0026cfg"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251,
            "text": "\treturn \u0026cfg, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254,
            "text": "// Get 获取当前配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 255,
            "text": "func Get() *Config {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256,
            "text": "\tif currentConfig == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 257,
            "text": "\t\tcurrentConfig = Default()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 259,
            "text": "\treturn currentConfig"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 260,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "text": "// Set 设置当前配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 263,
            "text": "func Set(cfg *Config) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264,
            "text": "\tcurrentConfig = cfg"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 266
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 267,
            "text": "// Default 返回默认配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 268,
            "text": "func Default() *Config {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 269,
            "text": "\tenabled := true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 270,
            "text": "\tdisabled := false"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 18,
            "line": 269
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 207
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./config/config.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.1700514554977417
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "package tools"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "    \"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/internal/global/variable\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/internal/utils/logger\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "    \"go.uber.org/zap\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "func init() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "    ctx := context.Background()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "    // 注册 UI/UX 搜索工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "    searchTool, err := ui_ux.NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "    if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "        logger.Error(\"创建 UI/UX 搜索工具失败\", zap.Error(err))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "        return"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "    if err := variable.ToolRegistry.Register(\"ui_ux_search\", searchTool); err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "        logger.Warn(\"UI/UX 搜索工具已存在\", zap.String(\"name\", \"ui_ux_search\"))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "    } else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "        logger.Info(\"UI/UX 搜索工具注册成功\", zap.String(\"name\", \"ui_ux_search\"))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "    // 注册设计系统生成工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "    designSystemTool, err := ui_ux.NewGenerateDesignSystemTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "    if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "        logger.Error(\"创建设计系统生成工具失败\", zap.Error(err))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "        return"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "    if err := variable.ToolRegistry.Register(\"generate_design_system\", designSystemTool); err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "        logger.Warn(\"设计系统生成工具已存在\", zap.String(\"name\", \"generate_design_system\"))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "    } else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "        logger.Info(\"设计系统生成工具注册成功\", zap.String(\"name\", \"generate_design_system\"))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "    // 注册设计系统持久化工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "    persistTool, err := ui_ux.NewPersistDesignSystemTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "    if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "        logger.Error(\"创建设计系统持久化工具失败\", zap.Error(err))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "        return"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "    if err := variable.ToolRegistry.Register(\"persist_design_system\", persistTool); err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "        logger.Warn(\"设计系统持久化工具已存在\", zap.String(\"name\", \"persist_design_system\"))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "    } else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "        logger.Info(\"设计系统持久化工具注册成功\", zap.String(\"name\", \"persist_design_system\"))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "#### 步骤 2：在 bootstrap 中导入工具包"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "在 &#96;bootstrap/your_app/init.go&#96; 中导入工具包："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "package yourappbootstrap"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/bootstrap/common\""
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 150
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 87
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.1600339412689209
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package websearch"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\t\"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\t\"fmt\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "\t\"os\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "// WebSearch 执行网页搜索"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "func WebSearch(ctx context.Context, req *SearchRequest) (*SearchResponse, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "\ttoolCfg := cfg.Tools.WebSearch"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "\tengine := toolCfg.Engine"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "\tif engine == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "\t\tengine = \"duckduckgo\" // 默认为 duckduckgo 占位"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\tfmt.Printf(\"执行搜索, engine: %s, query: %s, max_results: %d\\n\", engine, req.Query, req.MaxResults)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\tvar provider SearchProvider"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "\tvar err error"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\t// 转换为 map[string]interface{} 以兼容各 Provider 接参"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\tconfigMap := make(map[string]interface{})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "\tswitch engine {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "\tcase \"bocha\":"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "\t\tconfigMap[\"BochaApiKey\"] = toolCfg.Bocha.ApiKey"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\t\tconfigMap[\"BochaBaseUrl\"] = toolCfg.Bocha.BaseUrl"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "\t\tprovider, err = NewBochaProvider(configMap)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\tcase \"serpapi\":"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "\t\tconfigMap[\"SerpAPIKey\"] = toolCfg.SerpApi.ApiKey"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "\t\tconfigMap[\"SerpAPIEngine\"] = \"google\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "\t\tif toolCfg.SerpApi.BaseUrl != \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "\t\t\t// 如果有自定义URL需求，此处可以扩展，目前原生没这个参数"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "\t\tprovider, err = NewSerpAPIProvider(configMap)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "\tcase \"google\":"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "\t\tconfigMap[\"GoogleApiKey\"] = toolCfg.Google.ApiKey"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\t\tconfigMap[\"GoogleSearchEngineId\"] = toolCfg.Google.Cx"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "\t\tprovider, err = NewGoogleProvider(configMap)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "\tcase \"bing\":"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "\t\tconfigMap[\"BingApiKey\"] = toolCfg.Bing.ApiKey"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "\t\t// configMap[\"BingSafeSearch\"] = toolCfg.Bing.SafeSearch"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\t\tprovider, err = NewBingProvider(configMap)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "\tcase \"firecrawl\":"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "\t\t// Firecrawl Search 复用全局 Firecrawl ApiKey（与 firecrawl_scrape 相同）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "\t\tfirecrawlCfg := cfg.Tools.Firecrawl"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "\t\tapiKey := firecrawlCfg.ApiKey"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 31,
            "line": 53
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/research/websearch/web_search.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.15081609785556793
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "func ReadFile(ctx context.Context, req *ReadFileRequest) (*ReadFileResponse, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "\tcontent, err := os.ReadFile(req.Path)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"读取文件失败: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "\treturn \u0026ReadFileResponse{Content: string(content)}, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "// --- Doc to Markdown Tool (Placeholder) ---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "type DocToMarkdownRequest struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "\tPath string &#96;json:\"path\" jsonschema:\"required,description=PDF或文档路径\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "type DocToMarkdownResponse struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "\tMarkdown string &#96;json:\"markdown\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "func DocToMarkdown(ctx context.Context, req *DocToMarkdownRequest) (*DocToMarkdownResponse, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "\ttoolCfg := cfg.Tools.Unstructured"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "\tapiKey := toolCfg.ApiKey"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "\tif apiKey == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "\t\tapiKey = os.Getenv(\"UNSTRUCTURED_API_KEY\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "\tif apiKey == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"Unstructured API Key 未配置\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "\tbaseUrl := toolCfg.BaseUrl"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "\tif baseUrl == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "\t\tbaseUrl = \"https://api.unstructured.io/general/v0/general\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "\t// 1. 打开文件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "\tfile, err := os.Open(req.Path)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"无法打开文档: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "\tdefer file.Close()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "\t// 2. 准备 multipart 请求"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "\tbody := \u0026bytes.Buffer{}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "\twriter := multipart.NewWriter(body)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "\tpart, err := writer.CreateFormFile(\"files\", filepath.Base(req.Path))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "\tif _, err := io.Copy(part, file); err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "\t// 添加额外参数：策略设置为 'fast' 或 'hi_res'，输出格式为 'text/markdown'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "\t_ = writer.WriteField(\"output_format\", \"text/markdown\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "\t_ = writer.WriteField(\"strategy\", \"fast\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "\twriter.Close()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "\t// 3. 执行请求"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "\thttpReq, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, \"POST\", baseUrl, body)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "\thttpReq.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", writer.FormDataContentType())"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "\thttpReq.Header.Set(\"unstructured-api-key\", apiKey)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "\tclient := \u0026http.Client{Timeout: 60 * time.Second}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "\tresp, err := client.Do(httpReq)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "\tdefer resp.Body.Close()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "\tif resp.StatusCode != http.StatusOK"
          }
        ],

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package research"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\t\"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\t\"fmt\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "\t\"sync\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\t\"sync/atomic\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "\t\"time\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/go-rod/rod\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/go-rod/rod/lib/launcher\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/go-rod/rod/lib/launcher/flags\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/go-rod/stealth\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "type browserSession struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "\tid        uint64"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "\tpage      *rod.Page"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "\tstartedAt time.Time"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "\treleased  atomic.Bool"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "type browserManager struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\tmu         sync.Mutex"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "\tcfg        config.LocalBrowserConfig"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "\tbrowser    *rod.Browser"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\tslots      chan struct{}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\tsessions   map[uint64]*browserSession"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "\tnextID     uint64"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "\tstopCh     chan struct{}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "\tstopOnce   sync.Once"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "\tcleanupRun sync.Once"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "var ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "\tbrowserManagerOnce sync.Once"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "\tglobalBrowserMgr   *browserManager"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "func getBrowserManager() *browserManager {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "\tbrowserManagerOnce.Do(func() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "\t\tcfg := normalizeLocalBrowserConfig(config.Get().Tools.LocalBrowser)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "\t\tglobalBrowserMgr = \u0026browserManager{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\t\t\tcfg:      cfg,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "\t\t\tslots:    make(chan struct{}, cfg.MaxConcurrency),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "\t\t\tsessions: make(map[uint64]*browserSession),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "\t\t\tstopCh:   make(chan struct{}),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\t\tglobalBrowserMgr.startCleanupLoop()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "\t})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "\treturn globalBrowserMgr"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "func normalizeLocalBrowserConfig(cfg config.LocalBrowserConfig) config.LocalBrowserConfig {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "\tif cfg.MaxConcurrency \u003c= 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "\t\tcfg.MaxConcurrency = 3"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "\tif cfg.TotalTimeoutSec \u003c= 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "\t\tcfg.TotalTimeoutSec = 60"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "\tif cfg.NavigateTimeoutSec \u003c= 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "\t\tcfg.NavigateTimeoutSec = 30"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "\tif cfg.WaitSelectorTimeoutSec \u003c= 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "\t\tcfg.WaitSelectorTimeoutSec = 20"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "\tif cfg.CookieStoreDir == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "\t\tcfg.CookieStoreDir = \"storage/app/browser_cookies\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "\tif cfg.Headless == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "\t\tdefaultHeadless := true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "\t\tcfg.Headless = \u0026defaultHeadless"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "\treturn cfg"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "func (m *browserManager) acquire(ctx context.Context) (*browserSession, error)"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 78,
            "line": 77
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/research/browser_pool.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "func (m *browserManager) acquire(ctx context.Context) (*browserSession, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "\tselect {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "\tcase m.slots \u003c- struct{}{}:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "\tcase \u003c-ctx.Done():"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"等待浏览器并发槽位超时: %w\", ctx.Err())"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "\tbrowser, err := m.ensureBrowser(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "\t\t\u003c-m.slots"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "\tpage, err := stealth.Page(browser)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "\t\t_ = m.resetBrowser()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "\t\tbrowser, err = m.ensureBrowser(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "\t\t\t\u003c-m.slots"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "\t\tpage, err = stealth.Page(browser)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "\t\t\t\u003c-m.slots"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"创建 stealth 页面失败: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "\tid := atomic.AddUint64(\u0026m.nextID, 1)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "\ts := \u0026browserSession{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "\t\tid:        id,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "\t\tpage:      page,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "\t\tstartedAt: time.Now(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "\tm.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "\tm.sessions[id] = s"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "\tm.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "\treturn s, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "func (m *browserManager) release(s *browserSession) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "\tif s == nil || !s.released.CompareAndSwap(false, true) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "\t\treturn"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "\tif s.page != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "\t\t_ = s.page.Close()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "\tm.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "\tdelete(m.sessions, s.id)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "\tm.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "\tselect {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "\tcase \u003c-m.slots:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "\tdefault:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "func (m *browserManager) ensureBrowser(ctx context.Context) (*rod.Browser, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "\tm.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "\tdefer m.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "\tif m.browser != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "\t\tif _, err := m.browser.Version(); err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn m.browser, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "\t\t_ = m.browser.Close()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "\t\tm.browser = nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "\tl := launcher.New()."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "\t\tContext(ctx)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "\t\tNoSandbox(true)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "\t\tHeadless(*m.cfg.Headless)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "\t\tSet(flags.Flag(\"disable-gpu\"))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "\tif m.cfg.ChromePath != \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "\t\tl = l.Bin(m.cfg.ChromePath)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "\tcontrolURL, err := l.Launch()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"启动 Chromium 失败: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "\tbrowser := rod.New()."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "\t\tContext(ctx)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "\t\tControlURL(controlURL)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "\t\tTimeout(time.Duration(m.cfg.TotalTimeoutSec) * time.Second)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168,
            "text": "\tif err := browser.Connect(); err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"连接 Chromium 失败: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "\tm.browser = browser"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "\treturn m.browser, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176,
            "text": "func (m *browserManager) resetBrowser() error"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 45,
            "line": 175
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 75
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/research/browser_pool.go",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package research"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\t\"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\t\"encoding/json\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "\t\"fmt\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\t\"io\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "\t\"net/http\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\t\"strings\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "\t\"time\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "// JinaReaderRequest 网页读取请求"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "type JinaReaderRequest struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "\tURL string &#96;json:\"url\" jsonschema:\"required,description=要读取并转换为 Markdown 的网页 URL\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "// JinaReaderResponse 网页读取响应"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "type JinaReaderResponse struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\tMarkdown string &#96;json:\"markdown\" jsonschema:\"description=转换后的 Markdown 内容\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "// JinaReader 使用 r.jina.ai 将网页转换为 Markdown"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "// 这是一个极其强大的抓取方案，能够有效绕过微信公众号等平台的反爬验证"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "func JinaReader(ctx context.Context, req *JinaReaderRequest) (*JinaReaderResponse, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\tif req.URL == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"URL 不能为空\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "\t// 构造 Jina Reader URL"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\tjinaURL := fmt.Sprintf(\"https://r.jina.ai/%s\", req.URL)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\thttpReq, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, \"GET\", jinaURL, nil)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"创建请求失败: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "\t// 设置 Header 为 text/event-stream"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "\t// 实验证明 Jina Reader 的免费模式对 event-stream 的反爬支持更佳"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "\thttpReq.Header.Set(\"Accept\", \"text/event-stream\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\tclient := \u0026http.Client{Timeout: 90 * time.Second}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "\tresp, err := client.Do(httpReq)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"请求 Jina Reader 失败: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\tdefer resp.Body.Close()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "\tif resp.StatusCode != http.StatusOK {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "\t\tbody, _ := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"Jina Reader 返回错误: %d, body: %s\", resp.StatusCode, string(body))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "\tbody, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"读取响应失败: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "\t// 简单的 EventStream 解析逻辑 (Jina Reader 的格式通常是 data: {...})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "\t// 我们尝试寻找 data: 开头的行并提取其中的 content"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "\tcontent := string(body)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "\t// 如果是 event-stream 格式，尝试提取数据部分"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "\t// 为简单起见，如果包含 \"data: {\" 则尝试剥离前缀，"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "\t// 但其实 Jina Reader 在 event-stream 模式下如果是完整返回，"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 76,
            "line": 67
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/research/jina_reader.go",
        "signatures": {}

      "score": 0.1475733071565628

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "\tagentLambda := func(ctx context.Context, input []*schema.Message) (*schema.Message, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "\t\t// 构建消息列表（包含系统提示词）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "\t\tmessages := []*schema.Message{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "\t\t\tschema.SystemMessage(getSystemPrompt()),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "\t\tmessages = append(messages, input...)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "\t\t// 调用模型生成"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "\t\toutput, err := chatModel.Generate(ctx, messages)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"model generate failed: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "\t\t// 如果有工具调用，执行工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "\t\tif len(output.ToolCalls) \u003e 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "\t\t\t// 执行工具（工具节点接受单个消息，返回消息数组）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "\t\t\ttoolResults, err := toolNode.Invoke(ctx, output)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "\t\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"tool execution failed: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "\t\t\t// 将工具结果添加到消息列表，再次调用模型"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "\t\t\tmessages = append(messages, output)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "\t\t\tmessages = append(messages, toolResults...)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "\t\t\t// 再次调用模型处理工具结果（可能需要多轮工具调用）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "\t\t\tfor {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tfinalOutput, err := chatModel.Generate(ctx, messages)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"model generate after tools failed: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t// 如果还有工具调用，继续执行"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tif len(finalOutput.ToolCalls) \u003e 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\ttoolResults, err := toolNode.Invoke(ctx, finalOutput)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"tool execution failed: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tmessages = append(messages, finalOutput)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tmessages = append(messages, toolResults...)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tcontinue"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "\t\t\t\treturn finalOutput, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "\t\treturn output, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "\t// 创建 Graph 工作流"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "\tgraph := compose.NewGraph[[]*schema.Message, *schema.Message]()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "\t_ = graph.AddLambdaNode(\"ui_design_system_agent\", compose.InvokableLambda(agentLambda))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "\t// 编译 Graph 为 Runnable"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "\tcompiledGraph, err := graph.Compile(ctx)"
          },
          {

            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {

          },
          {

            "text": "}"

          },

        "range": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# browser_browse 使用与配置指南"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "本文说明如何在 DigEino 中启用和使用本地浏览器工具 &#96;browser_browse&#96;。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "## 1. 工具定位"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "&#96;browser_browse&#96; 是基于 &#96;go-rod + stealth&#96; 的本地无头浏览器工具，适用于："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "- 动态渲染页面（纯 HTTP 抓取不完整）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "- 强反爬页面（例如微信公众号、Cloudflare 保护页面）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "- 需要截图留档的场景"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "- 需要复用 Cookie 维持登录态的场景"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "它与 &#96;research_local_scraper&#96; 的区别："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "- &#96;research_local_scraper&#96;：更偏微信公众号正文抓取，能力较聚焦。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "- &#96;browser_browse&#96;：更通用，支持 &#96;read/screenshot&#96;、&#96;wait_selector&#96;、Cookie 域复用与并发控制。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "## 2. 配置方式（config/config.yaml）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "在 &#96;Tools&#96; 下新增/配置 &#96;LocalBrowser&#96;："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "Tools:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "  LocalBrowser:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "    Enabled: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "    MaxConcurrency: 3"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "    TotalTimeoutSec: 60"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "    NavigateTimeoutSec: 30"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "    WaitSelectorTimeoutSec: 20"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "    AllowedDomains:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "      - \"mp.weixin.qq.com\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "      - \"zhihu.com\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "      - \"juejin.cn\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "    ChromePath: \"\" # 可选，留空表示由 rod 自动寻找或下载 Chromium"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "    Headless: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "    CookieStoreDir: \"storage/app/browser_cookies\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "### 配置项说明"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "- &#96;Enabled&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "  - 是否启用工具注入；&#96;false&#96; 时 &#96;browser_browse&#96; 不会注册到全局工具集。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "- &#96;MaxConcurrency&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "  - 浏览器任务并发上限。建议 3~5（结合机器内存）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "- &#96;TotalTimeoutSec&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "  - 单次调用总超时。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "- &#96;NavigateTimeoutSec&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "  - 页面导航超时（&#96;Navigate&#96; 阶段）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "- &#96;WaitSelectorTimeoutSec&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "  - 等待 &#96;wait_selector&#96; 或正文候选元素的超时。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "- &#96;AllowedDomains&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "  - 允许访问的域名白名单。为空表示不限制；生产环境建议显式配置。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "- &#96;ChromePath&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "  - 可选，自定义 Chromium 可执行文件路径。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "- &#96;Headless&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "  - 是否无头运行。开发调试可设为 &#96;false&#96;。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "- &#96;CookieStoreDir&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "  - Cookie 持久化目录，按域名存储为 &#96;\u003cdomain\u003e.json&#96;。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "## 3. Agent 接入"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "在你的 &#96;agent.yml&#96; 里加入全局工具引用："
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 64
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/browser_browse_guide.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.14646029472351074
    }
  ]
}
```

  "searchTerm": "企业微信客服回调接收消息 API 文档"

```
Result:

```json
{
  "isFinal": true,
  "references": [
    {
      "chunk": "Links:\n1. [接收消息和事件-读取消息 - 企业微信 API](https://qiyeweixin.apifox.cn/api-10061327)\n2. [接收消息 - 文档 - 企业微信开发者中心](https://developer.work.weixin.qq.com/document/path/100719)\n3. [回调配置 - 文档 - 企业微信开发者中心](https://developer.work.weixin.qq.com/document/path/96238)\n4. [客服消息事件 | 微信开放文档](https://developers.weixin.qq.com/doc/store/shop/notify/kf_callback/kf_msg_event)\n5. [接收消息和事件 | 微信开放文档](https://developers.weixin.qq.com/minigame/dev/guide/open-ability/customer-message/receive.html)\n\n# 企业微信客服回调接收消息 API 文档\n\n## 核心流程\n\n企业微信客服消息接收采用两步流程：[1]\n1. 企业微信后台将事件回调数据包发送到企业指定URL\n2. 企业收到请求后，通过读取消息接口主动获取具体消息内容\n\n## 回调事件格式\n\n当有新消息时，企业微信发送的回调包含以下信息：[1]\n\n| 参数 | 说明 |\n|------|------|\n| ToUserName | 企业微信CorpID |\n| CreateTime | 消息创建时间（unix时间戳） |\n| MsgType | 固定为：event |\n| Event | 固定为：kf_msg_or_event |\n| Token | 调用拉取消息接口时需传此token，用于校验请求合法性 |\n| OpenKfId | 有新消息的客服账号 |\n\n## 读取消息接口\n\n**端点：** &#96;/cgi-bin/kf/sync_msg&#96; (POST方法)[1]\n\n可获取**最近3天内**的消息内容和事件，支持的消息类型包括：文本、图片、语音、视频、文件、位置、链接、名片、小程序、菜单、事件。[1]\n\n## 支持的消息类型\n\n返回格式示例：[1]\n\n- **文本消息**：&#96;msgtype: text&#96;，包含content和menu_id\n- **图片消息**：&#96;msgtype: image&#96;，包含media_id\n- **语音消息**：&#96;msgtype: voice&#96;，包含media_id\n- **视频消息**：&#96;msgtype: video&#96;，包含media_id\n- **文件消息**：&#96;msgtype: file&#96;，包含media_id\n\n**注意：** 不支持读取通过发送消息接口发送的消息。[1]",
      "title": "Web search results for query: 企业微信客服回调接收消息 API 文档"
    }
  ],
  "rejected": false
}
```

          {
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": "\tvar corpSecret string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211,
            "text": "\tvar targetAgentID int64"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212,
            "text": "\tif agentID != 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "\t\tfor _, app := range cfg.WeCom.Applications {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "\t\t\tif app.AgentID == agentID {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tcorpSecret = app.AgentSecret"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216,
            "text": "\t\t\t\ttargetAgentID = app.AgentID"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tbreak"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220,
            "text": "\t\tif corpSecret == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom application with AgentID %d not found\", agentID)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223,
            "text": "\t} else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224,
            "text": "\t\tapp := cfg.WeCom.Applications[0]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225,
            "text": "\t\tcorpSecret = app.AgentSecret"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226,
            "text": "\t\ttargetAgentID = app.AgentID"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229,
            "text": "\tif corpSecret == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 230,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom AgentSecret not configured\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 231,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 233,
            "text": "\tvar wx *workwx.Workwx"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234,
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeCom.QYAPIHost != \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235,
            "text": "\t\twx = workwx.New(cfg.WeCom.CorpID, workwx.WithQYAPIHost(cfg.WeCom.QYAPIHost))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236,
            "text": "\t} else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237,
            "text": "\t\twx = workwx.New(cfg.WeCom.CorpID)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "text": "\treturn wx.WithApp(corpSecret, targetAgentID), nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 242,
            "text": "// splitMsg 按字符数切割消息（支持多字节字符）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 243,
            "text": "func splitMsg(s string, maxLen int) []string {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244,
            "text": "\tvar result []string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245,
            "text": "\trunes := []rune(s)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 246,
            "text": "\tfor len(runes) \u003e maxLen {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247,
            "text": "\t\tresult = append(result, string(runes[:maxLen]))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248,
            "text": "\t\trunes = runes[maxLen:]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250,
            "text": "\tif len(runes) \u003e 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251,
            "text": "\t\tresult = append(result, string(runes))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253,
            "text": "\treturn result"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 255
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256,
            "text": "// SendWeComMessage 发送企业微信文字消息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 257,
            "text": "func SendWeComMessage(ctx context.Context, req SendWeComMessageRequest) (SendWeComMessageResponse, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258,
            "text": "\tif req.UserID == \"\""
          }
        ],
        "range": {

            "column": 48,

          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "HttpServer:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
