          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "1. **DigFlow 项目已存在**：确保你已经有一个 DigFlow 项目"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "2. **DigEino 依赖已添加**：DigFlow 的 &#96;go.mod&#96; 中应该已经包含 DigEino 依赖"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "require ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "    github.com/originaleric/digeino v1.0.2  // 或更新版本"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "## 快速开始"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "### 最简单的使用方式"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "**1. 添加依赖**（如果还没有）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "go get github.com/originaleric/digeino"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "**2. 注册工具**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "在你的 DigFlow 应用的 &#96;app/your_app/tools/tool_register.go&#96; 中："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "package tools"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "    \"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/internal/global/variable\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "func init() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "    ctx := context.Background()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "    // 注册 UI/UX 搜索工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "    tool, _ := ui_ux.NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "    variable.ToolRegistry.Register(\"ui_ux_search\", tool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "**3. 在 Agent 中使用**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "在你的 Agent 配置 &#96;app/your_app/config/agent.yml&#96; 中："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "Tools:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "  - Name: \"ui_ux_search\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "    Description: \"检索 UI/UX 设计知识库\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "Nodes:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "  - Key: \"designer\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "    Type: \"chat_model\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "    BindTools:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "      - \"ui_ux_search\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "## 使用方式"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "### 方式一：单独注册工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "适合只需要特定工具的场景。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "#### 步骤 1：创建或编辑工具注册文件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "在你的 DigFlow 应用中创建 &#96;app/your_app/tools/tool_register.go&#96;："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "package tools"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "    \"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "    "
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 93
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.23339809477329254
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 660,
            "text": "5. **模型名称一致性**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 661,
            "text": "   - 使用 Agent 工具时，&#96;agent.yml&#96; 中的模型名称必须与 &#96;tool_register.go&#96; 中的名称一致"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 662,
            "text": "   - 推荐使用 &#96;ui_model&#96; 作为模型名称"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 663
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 664,
            "text": "## 故障排查"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 665
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 666,
            "text": "### 问题 1：工具未找到"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 667
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 668,
            "text": "**错误信息**：&#96;工具 xxx 未注册&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 669
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 670,
            "text": "**解决方案**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 671,
            "text": "1. 检查工具是否在 &#96;tool_register.go&#96; 中正确注册"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 672,
            "text": "2. 检查 &#96;bootstrap/init.go&#96; 是否导入了工具包"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 673,
            "text": "3. 查看日志确认工具注册是否成功"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 674
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 675,
            "text": "### 问题 2：模型未找到（Agent 工具）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 676
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 677,
            "text": "**错误**：&#96;模型 ui_model 不存在&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 678
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 679,
            "text": "**解决**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 680,
            "text": "1. 检查 &#96;agent.yml&#96; 中是否配置了名为 &#96;ui_model&#96; 的模型"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 681,
            "text": "2. 确保模型名称与 &#96;tool_register.go&#96; 中的名称一致"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 682,
            "text": "3. 检查模型是否已正确注册到 ModelRegistry"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 683
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 684,
            "text": "### 问题 3：Agent 工具创建失败"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 685
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 686,
            "text": "**错误**：&#96;failed to create UI design system agent&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 687
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 688,
            "text": "**解决**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 689,
            "text": "1. 检查 ChatModel 是否正确获取"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 690,
            "text": "2. 检查 DigEino 依赖是否正确安装"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 691,
            "text": "3. 查看日志获取详细错误信息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 692
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 693,
            "text": "### 问题 4：工具调用失败"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 694
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 695,
            "text": "**错误**：&#96;agent execution failed&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 696
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 697,
            "text": "**解决**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 698,
            "text": "1. 检查模型 API Key 是否正确配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 699,
            "text": "2. 检查网络连接"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 700,
            "text": "3. 查看 Agent 内部日志"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 701
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 702,
            "text": "### 问题 5：配置加载失败"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 703
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 704,
            "text": "**错误信息**：&#96;加载 DigEino 配置失败&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 705
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 706,
            "text": "**解决方案**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 707,
            "text": "1. 检查配置文件路径是否正确"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 708,
            "text": "2. 如果不需要配置驱动功能，可以不加载 DigEino 配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 709,
            "text": "3. 使用 DigFlow 的模型注册表代替"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 710
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 711,
            "text": "### 问题 6：存储路径问题"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 712
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 713,
            "text": "**错误信息**：&#96;failed to create directories&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 714
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 715,
            "text": "**解决方案**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 716,
            "text": "1. 检查存储目录的写入权限"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 717,
            "text": "2. 确认 &#96;BaseDir&#96; 配置是否正确"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 718,
            "text": "3. 使用绝对路径避免路径问题"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 719
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 720,
            "text": "## 完整示例：在 UI Pro 应用中使用"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 721
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 722,
            "text": "参考 &#96;DigFlow/app/ui_pro/config/agent.yml&#96;，你可以看到 UI Pro 应用已经配置了 UI/UX 工具："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 723
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 724,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 725,
            "text": "Tools:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 726,
            "text": "  - Name: \"ui_ux_search\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 727,
            "text": "    Description: \"检索 UI/UX 设计知识库\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 728,
            "text": "    UseGlobal: true  # 如果工具在全局注册，使用 UseGlobal: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 729,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 730
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 731,
            "text": "如果你的工具在应用级别注册，使用 &#96;UseGlobal: false&#96;。"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 732
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 659
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.20230719447135925
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "- **参数**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "  - &#96;url&#96;: 目标网页地址（必填）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "  - &#96;action&#96;: &#96;read&#96; / &#96;screenshot&#96;，默认 &#96;read&#96;。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "  - &#96;wait_selector&#96;: (可选) 指定 CSS 选择器并等待其出现。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "  - &#96;use_cookie_domain&#96;: (可选) 从 &#96;Tools.LocalBrowser.CookieStoreDir&#96; 加载指定域名 Cookie 并在结束后回写。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "- **返回**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "  - &#96;read&#96;: 返回 &#96;title&#96;、&#96;text&#96;、&#96;markdown&#96;。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "  - &#96;screenshot&#96;: 返回 &#96;title&#96;、&#96;screenshot_base64&#96;。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "- **配置**：通过 &#96;Tools.LocalBrowser&#96; 控制启用、并发、超时、域名白名单与 Cookie 目录。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "- **最佳实践**：适合动态渲染页面、复杂反爬页面和需要截图证据的场景。生产环境建议配置 &#96;AllowedDomains&#96; 以限制可访问域。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "## 如何在 Agent 编排中使用"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "由于 &#96;DigFlow&#96; 的底层加载机制会自动调用 &#96;DigEino&#96; 的 &#96;BaseTools&#96;，您只需在您的 &#96;agent.yml&#96; 的 &#96;Tools&#96; 部分直接引用名称即可："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "Tools:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "  - Name: \"research_grep\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "    UseGlobal: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "  - Name: \"research_read\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "    UseGlobal: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "  - Name: \"research_doc_to_md\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "    UseGlobal: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "  - Name: \"firecrawl_scrape\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "    UseGlobal: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "  - Name: \"research_jina_reader\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "    UseGlobal: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "  - Name: \"research_local_scraper\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "    UseGlobal: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "  - Name: \"browser_browse\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "    UseGlobal: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "  - Name: \"web_search\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "    UseGlobal: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "## 阶梯式抓取策略建议"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "在 Agent 的 SystemPrompt 中，建议遵循以下抓取优先级："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "1. **L1 (轻量级)**：优先使用 &#96;firecrawl_scrape&#96;（速度快、资源占用低）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "2. **L2 (高级抓取)**：若 L1 返回\"环境异常\"、\"验证码\"或内容明显不正确，尝试 &#96;research_jina_reader&#96;。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "3. **L3 (本地浏览器专用抓取)**：若 L2 仍失败，可尝试 &#96;research_local_scraper&#96;（适合微信公众号等强反爬场景，但延迟较高）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "4. **L3.5 (本地浏览器通用访问)**：需要等待特定元素、复用登录 Cookie 或截图时，使用 &#96;browser_browse&#96;。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "5. **L4 (搜索兜底)**：若所有抓取均失败，使用 &#96;web_search&#96; 搜索目标 URL，获取快照摘要。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "## 注意事项"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "1. **Token 消耗**：由于这些工具往往返回大量文本，建议配合具备长上下文处理能力的模型（如 DeepSeek, Qwen）。"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 112
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 63
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/research_tools_guide.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.20171430706977844
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 528,
            "text": "func init() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 529,
            "text": "    // 加载 DigEino 配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 530,
            "text": "    _, err := config.Load(\"config/digeino.yaml\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 531,
            "text": "    if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 532,
            "text": "        logger.Warn(\"加载 DigEino 配置失败，使用默认配置\", zap.Error(err))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 533,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 534,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 535,
            "text": "    // ... 注册工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 536,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 537,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 538
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 539,
            "text": "## 使用示例"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 540
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 541,
            "text": "### 示例 1：使用 UI/UX Agent 工具（推荐）⭐"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 542
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 543,
            "text": "这是最简单的方式，Agent 会自动完成整个工作流："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 544
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 545,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 546,
            "text": "Nodes:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 547,
            "text": "  - Key: \"designer\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 548,
            "text": "    Type: \"chat_model\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 549,
            "text": "    Model: \"ui_model\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 550,
            "text": "    SystemPrompt: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 551,
            "text": "      你是一位专业的 UI/UX 设计师。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 552,
            "text": "      当用户需要生成设计系统时，使用 generate_ui_design_system 工具。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 553,
            "text": "      这个工具会自动完成需求分析、生成设计系统、补充搜索和持久化。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 554,
            "text": "    BindTools:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 555,
            "text": "      - \"generate_ui_design_system\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 556,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 557
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 558,
            "text": "**用户请求示例**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 559,
            "text": "- \"生成一个美容spa的设计系统，项目名称：Serenity Spa\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 560,
            "text": "- \"为我的电商平台生成设计系统，技术栈：react\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 561,
            "text": "- \"生成设计系统并持久化，项目名称：MyApp，页面：homepage\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 562
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 563,
            "text": "**Agent 会自动**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 564,
            "text": "1. 分析需求：识别产品类型（Beauty/Spa）、样式关键词、行业、技术栈"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 565,
            "text": "2. 生成设计系统：调用 &#96;generate_design_system&#96; 生成完整设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 566,
            "text": "3. 补充搜索：根据需要调用 &#96;ui_ux_search&#96; 获取 React 技术栈指南"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 567,
            "text": "4. 返回结果：返回完整的设计系统，包括 Pattern、Style、Colors、Typography、Effects"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 568
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 569,
            "text": "### 示例 2：使用场景"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 570
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 571,
            "text": "#### 场景 1：快速生成设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 572
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 573,
            "text": "**用户请求**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 574,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 575,
            "text": "生成一个电商平台的设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 576,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 577
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 578,
            "text": "**Agent 响应**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 579,
            "text": "- 自动识别产品类型：E-commerce"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 580,
            "text": "- 生成完整设计系统（配色、字体、样式、布局模式）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 581,
            "text": "- 返回格式化的设计系统文档"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 582
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 583,
            "text": "#### 场景 2：生成并持久化设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 584
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 585,
            "text": "**用户请求**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 586,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 587,
            "text": "生成一个 SaaS 产品的设计系统，项目名称：MySaaS，技术栈：react，并持久化"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 588,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 589
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 590,
            "text": "**Agent 响应**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 591,
            "text": "- 生成设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 592,
            "text": "- 获取 React 技术栈指南"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 593,
            "text": "- 持久化到 &#96;storage/app/ui_ux/design-system/mysaas/MASTER.md&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 594,
            "text": "- 返回持久化路径"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 595
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 596,
            "text": "#### 场景 3：生成页面特定设计系统"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 597
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 527
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.19690686464309692
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 442,
            "text": "- **stack**（可选）：技术栈，Agent 会自动获取该技术栈的指南"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 443,
            "text": "- **persist**（可选）：是否持久化设计系统到文件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 444,
            "text": "- **page_name**（可选）：页面名称，用于生成页面特定的覆盖文件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 445
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 446,
            "text": "### Agent 工作流"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 447
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 448,
            "text": "Agent 内部自动执行以下工作流："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 449
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 450,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 451,
            "text": "1. 分析需求"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 452,
            "text": "   ↓"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 453,
            "text": "2. 生成设计系统（generate_design_system）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 454,
            "text": "   ↓"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 455,
            "text": "3. 补充搜索（ui_ux_search，如果需要）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 456,
            "text": "   - 样式选项"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 457,
            "text": "   - 图表推荐"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 458,
            "text": "   - UX 最佳实践"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 459,
            "text": "   - 字体选项"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 460,
            "text": "   ↓"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 461,
            "text": "4. 技术栈指南（ui_ux_search with stack，如果指定了技术栈）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 462,
            "text": "   ↓"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 463,
            "text": "5. 持久化（persist_design_system，如果用户请求）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 464,
            "text": "   ↓"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 465,
            "text": "6. 返回完整结果"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 466,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 467
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 468,
            "text": "### 与单独工具的区别"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 469
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 470,
            "text": "#### 使用单独工具（方式一、二）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 471
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 472,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 473,
            "text": "# 需要手动编排工作流"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 474,
            "text": "BindTools:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 475,
            "text": "  - \"ui_ux_search\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 476,
            "text": "  - \"generate_design_system\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 477,
            "text": "  - \"persist_design_system\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 478
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 479,
            "text": "# 需要在 SystemPrompt 中详细说明调用顺序"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 480,
            "text": "SystemPrompt: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 481,
            "text": "  1. 先调用 generate_design_system"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 482,
            "text": "  2. 然后调用 ui_ux_search 补充信息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 483,
            "text": "  3. 最后调用 persist_design_system"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 484,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 485
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 486,
            "text": "#### 使用 Agent 工具（方式三）⭐"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 487
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 488,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 489,
            "text": "# 只需一个工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 490,
            "text": "BindTools:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 491,
            "text": "  - \"generate_ui_design_system\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 492
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 493,
            "text": "# SystemPrompt 简单明了"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 494,
            "text": "SystemPrompt: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 495,
            "text": "  使用 generate_ui_design_system 生成设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 496,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 497
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 498,
            "text": "## 配置说明"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 499
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 500,
            "text": "### 配置存储路径（可选）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 501
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 502,
            "text": "如果你想要自定义设计系统的存储路径，可以在 DigFlow 的配置中添加 DigEino 的配置："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 503
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 504,
            "text": "#### 创建 DigEino 配置文件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 505
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 506,
            "text": "在 DigFlow 项目中创建 &#96;config/digeino.yaml&#96;："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 507
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 508,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 509,
            "text": "ChatModel:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 510,
            "text": "  Type: \"qwen\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 511,
            "text": "  Config:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 512,
            "text": "    ApiKey: \"${QWEN_API_KEY}\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 513,
            "text": "    Model: \"qwen-max\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 514,
            "text": "    BaseUrl: \"https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 515
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 516,
            "text": "UIUX:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 517,
            "text": "  Storage:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 518,
            "text": "    BaseDir: \"storage/app/ui_ux\"  # 设计系统存储路径"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 519,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 520
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 521,
            "text": "#### 在工具注册时加载配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 522
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 523,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 524,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 525,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 526,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 527
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 528,
            "text": "func init() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 529,
            "text": "    // 加载 DigEino 配置"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 529
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 441
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.19039399921894073
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# DigEino 工具集概览 (Tools Information)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "本文档旨在汇总 &#96;DigEino&#96; 中集成的所有 Eino 工具，详细说明其功能、参数及使用场景。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "## 1. 调研与搜索 (Researcher \u0026 Search)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "这类工具旨在帮助 Agent 理解项目代码、阅读外部文档以及搜索互联网信息。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "### 1.1 基础调研 (Basic Research)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "| 工具名称 | 功能描述 | 主要参数 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "| :--- | :--- | :--- |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "| &#96;research_grep&#96; | 在源码或指定目录中进行关键词检索（模拟 ripgrep）。 | &#96;query&#96;: 关键词; &#96;path&#96;: 搜索路径 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "| &#96;research_read&#96; | 精确读取指定文件的完整内容。 | &#96;path&#96;: 文件路径 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "| &#96;research_doc_to_md&#96; | 集成 **Unstructured.io**，将 PDF/Word/Docx 高质量转为 Markdown。 | &#96;path&#96;: 文档路径 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "### 1.2 高级检索 (Advanced Retrieval)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "| 工具名称 | 功能描述 | 主要参数 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "| :--- | :--- | :--- |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "| &#96;research_semantic_search&#96; | **向量语义搜索**。基于 Pinecone，通过相似度定位偏逻辑意图的内容。 | &#96;query&#96;: 搜索意图; &#96;max_results&#96;: 结果数 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "| &#96;research_code_index&#96; | **项目索引工具**。扫描指定目录并将代码/文档向量化存入 Pinecone。 | &#96;path&#96;: 目标目录 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "| &#96;web_search&#96; | **统一网页搜索**。支持 Bocha, SerpApi, Google, Bing, DuckDuckGo, Firecrawl 和 Tavily 引擎。 | &#96;query&#96;: 搜索词; &#96;max_results&#96;: 结果数; &#96;region&#96;: 地区 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "| &#96;firecrawl_scrape&#96; | **深度网页爬取**。调用 Firecrawl API 将 URL 转换为清洗后的 Markdown。 | &#96;url&#96;: 目标网页地址 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "| &#96;research_jina_reader&#96; | **高级网页抓取**。使用 Jina Reader (r.jina.ai) 深度读取网页并转换为 Markdown，对微信公众号、知乎等强反爬平台有较好兼容性。 | &#96;url&#96;: 目标网页地址 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "| &#96;research_local_scraper&#96; | **本地无头浏览器抓取**。使用 go-rod + stealth 绕过复杂反爬（如微信公众号），抓取正文并输出 Text 与 Markdown。 | &#96;url&#96;: 目标网页地址 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "**web_search 引擎选择**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "| 引擎 | 特点 | 配置 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "|------|------|------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "| Bocha | 国内服务，中文友好 | &#96;Tools.WebSearch.Bocha.ApiKey&#96; |"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 32
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/tools_info.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.18841220438480377
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "   - 写入错误"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "### 代码示例"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "// 覆盖模式写入"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "  \"path\": \"docs/research/方案.md\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "  \"content\": \"# 调研方案\\n\\n...\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "  \"mode\": \"overwrite\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "// 追加模式写入"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "  \"path\": \"docs/research/日志.md\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "  \"content\": \"\\n## 2026-02-21\\n\\n...\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "  \"mode\": \"append\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "## 使用场景"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "1. **保存调研报告**：将 Agent 生成的调研方案保存为 markdown 文件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "2. **记录调研日志**：追加模式记录调研过程中的发现"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "3. **生成文档**：将代码分析结果保存为文档"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "4. **导出结果**：将 Agent 的执行结果导出到文件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "## 配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "无需额外配置，工具会自动通过 &#96;BaseTools&#96; 函数加载。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "## 依赖"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "- &#96;os&#96; - 文件系统操作"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "- &#96;path/filepath&#96; - 路径处理"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "- &#96;github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool&#96; - Eino 工具框架"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "- &#96;github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils&#96; - 工具工具函数"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "## 注意事项"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "1. **文件权限**：写入的文件权限为 0644，目录权限为 0755"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "2. **路径安全**：建议使用相对路径，避免写入系统关键目录"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "3. **内容大小**：大文件写入可能影响性能，建议控制单次写入内容大小"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "4. **并发安全**：追加模式下，多线程并发写入同一文件可能导致内容交错"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "## 测试建议"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "1. 测试覆盖模式写入新文件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "2. 测试覆盖模式覆盖已存在文件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "3. 测试追加模式追加到已存在文件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "4. 测试自动创建目录功能"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "5. 测试相对路径和绝对路径"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "6. 测试错误处理（无效路径、权限不足等）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "## 相关文件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/research/write_file.go&#96; - 工具实现"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/tools.go&#96; - 工具注册"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/research/general_researcher.go&#96; - 参考实现模式"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "## 参考"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "- DigFlow 更新文档：&#96;DigFlow/updates/2026-02-21_Researcher应用能力增强.md&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "- 能力对比分析：&#96;.cursor/plans/researcher应用能力对比分析_7633bfea.plan.md&#96;"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 127
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 63
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/updates/2026-02-21_调研工具文件写入功能.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.18413689732551575
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package research"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\t\"bytes\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\t\"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "\t\"fmt\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\t\"io\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "\t\"mime/multipart\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\t\"net/http\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "\t\"os\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "\t\"path/filepath\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "\t\"strings\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "\t\"time\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "// --- Grep Search Tool ---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "type GrepRequest struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\tQuery string &#96;json:\"query\" jsonschema:\"required,description=搜索关键词\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "\tPath  string &#96;json:\"path\" jsonschema:\"description=搜索路径，默认为项目根目录\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "type GrepResponse struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\tMatches []string &#96;json:\"matches\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\tCount   int      &#96;json:\"count\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "// GrepSearch 模拟代码搜索逻辑 (考虑到云端环境，这里使用简单的文件系统遍历，未来可接入 ripgrep)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "func GrepSearch(ctx context.Context, req *GrepRequest) (*GrepResponse, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\tsearchPath := req.Path"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "\tif searchPath == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\t\t// 默认搜索当前目录"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "\t\tsearchPath = \".\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "\tvar matches []string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "\terr := filepath.Walk(searchPath, func(path string, info os.FileInfo, err error) error {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn nil // 忽略错误文件夹"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\t\tif info.IsDir() || strings.HasPrefix(info.Name(), \".\") {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "\t\t// 简单起见，只检查文本类的文件后缀"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\t\text := strings.ToLower(filepath.Ext(path))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "\t\tif ext != \".go\" \u0026\u0026 ext != \".md\" \u0026\u0026 ext != \".yml\" \u0026\u0026 ext != \".json\" \u0026\u0026 ext != \".txt\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "\t\tcontent, err := os.ReadFile(path)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "\t\tif strings.Contains(string(content), req.Query) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "\t\t\tmatches = append(matches, path)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "\t\tif len(matches) \u003e 20 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn filepath.SkipAll // 限制前20个匹配，防止 Token 爆炸"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "\t})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "\treturn \u0026GrepResponse{Matches: matches, Count: len(matches)}, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "// --- Read File Tool ---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "type ReadFileRequest struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "\tPath string &#96;json:\"path\" jsonschema:\"required,description=要阅读的文件路径\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "type ReadFileResponse struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "\tContent string &#96;json:\"content\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "func ReadFile(ctx context.Context, req *ReadFileRequest)"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 56,
            "line": 86
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/research/general_researcher.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.17474409937858582
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 381,
            "text": "func init() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 382,
            "text": "    ctx := context.Background()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 383,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 384,
            "text": "    // 加载 DigEino 配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 385,
            "text": "    // 注意：需要创建 DigEino 的配置文件 config/digeino.yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 386,
            "text": "    _, err := config.Load(\"config/digeino.yaml\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 387,
            "text": "    if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 388,
            "text": "        logger.Error(\"加载 DigEino 配置失败\", zap.Error(err))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 389,
            "text": "        return"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 390,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 391,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 392,
            "text": "    // 从配置创建 Agent 工具（自动读取 DigEino 配置中的 ChatModel）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 393,
            "text": "    agentTool, err := ui_ux.NewUIDesignSystemAgentToolFromConfig(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 394,
            "text": "    if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 395,
            "text": "        logger.Error(\"创建 UI/UX Agent 工具失败\", zap.Error(err))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 396,
            "text": "        return"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 397,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 398,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 399,
            "text": "    // 注册工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 400,
            "text": "    if err := variable.ToolRegistry.Register(\"generate_ui_design_system\", agentTool); err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 401,
            "text": "        logger.Warn(\"UI/UX Agent 工具已存在\", zap.String(\"name\", \"generate_ui_design_system\"))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 402,
            "text": "    } else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 403,
            "text": "        logger.Info(\"UI/UX Agent 工具注册成功\", zap.String(\"name\", \"generate_ui_design_system\"))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 404,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 405,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 406,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 407
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 408,
            "text": "**DigEino 配置文件** (&#96;config/digeino.yaml&#96;):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 409
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 410,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 411,
            "text": "ChatModel:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 412,
            "text": "  Type: \"qwen\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 413,
            "text": "  Config:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 414,
            "text": "    ApiKey: \"${QWEN_API_KEY}\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 415,
            "text": "    Model: \"qwen-max\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 416,
            "text": "    BaseUrl: \"https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 417
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 418,
            "text": "UIUX:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 419,
            "text": "  Storage:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 420,
            "text": "    BaseDir: \"storage/app/ui_ux\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 421,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 422
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 423,
            "text": "## Agent 工具详解"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 424
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 425,
            "text": "### Agent 工具参数"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 426
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 427,
            "text": "Agent 工具接受以下参数："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 428
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 429,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;json"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 430,
            "text": "{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 431,
            "text": "  \"query\": \"beauty spa wellness service\",      // 必需：用户需求描述"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 432,
            "text": "  \"project_name\": \"Serenity Spa\",              // 可选：项目名称"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 433,
            "text": "  \"stack\": \"react\",                            // 可选：技术栈（react, vue, tailwind 等）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 434,
            "text": "  \"persist\": true,                             // 可选：是否持久化设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 435,
            "text": "  \"page_name\": \"homepage\"                      // 可选：页面名称（用于生成页面覆盖）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 436,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 437,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 438
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 439,
            "text": "**参数说明**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 440,
            "text": "- **query**（必需）：用户需求描述，例如 \"beauty spa wellness service\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 441,
            "text": "- **project_name**（可选）：项目名称，用于生成设计系统和文件命名"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 442,
            "text": "- **stack**（可选）：技术栈，Agent 会自动获取该技术栈的指南"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 443,
            "text": "- **persist**（可选）：是否持久化设计系统到文件"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 443
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 380
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.1670859009027481
    },
