    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "## 4. 如何在 Go 项目中集成 (Integration Guide)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "&#96;DigEino&#96; 的工具集是基于 [CloudWeGo Eino](https://github.com/cloudwego/eino) 框架开发的标准 &#96;tool.BaseTool&#96;。这意味着它们可以被集成到任何使用 Eino 框架的 Go 应用中。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "### 4.1 引入依赖"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "首先，在您的项目中安装 &#96;DigEino&#96;："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "go get github.com/originaleric/digeino"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "### 4.2 初始化配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "&#96;DigEino&#96; 工具依赖于一个全局配置单例。在使用工具前，您需要初始化配置（支持从 YAML 加载或环境变量覆盖）："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "import \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "func main() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "    // 方式 A：从 YAML 文件加载"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "    cfg, _ := config.LoadConfig(\"path/to/your/config.yaml\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "    // 方式 B：手动设置关键参数（如从环境变量读取）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "    cfg := config.Get()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "    cfg.Tools.WebSearch.Engine = \"tavily\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "    cfg.Tools.WebSearch.Tavily.ApiKey = os.Getenv(\"TAVILY_API_KEY\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "    // 或使用 Google: cfg.Tools.WebSearch.Google.ApiKey = \"...\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "    cfg.Tools.Pinecone.ApiKey = os.Getenv(\"PINECONE_KEY\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "### 4.3 获取并使用工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "您可以一次性获取全量工具，或者仅引入特定工具："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/research\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "func useTools(ctx context.Context) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "    // 1. 获取所有通过 BaseTools 注册的工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "    allTools, _ := tools.BaseTools(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "    // 2. 或者初始化特定工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "    grepTool, _ := research.NewGrepSearchTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "    // 3. 在 Eino Agent (Graph) 中使用"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "    // graph.AddChatModelNode(\"model\", model, compose.WithBindTools(allTools))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "### 4.4 兼容性说明"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "所有的工具都返回标准的 &#96;tool.BaseTool&#96; 接口："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "- **Schema 定义**：自动根据 Go 结构体生成 JSON Schema，模型可直接理解。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "- **并发安全**：支持 context 控制和超时刻。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "- **错误处理**：内部已进行安全封装，返回友好的错误提示供模型自我纠错。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "**本工具库旨在为 Golang 生态提供一套开箱即用的「大模型工具箱」，助力开发者快速构建具备调研、设计与推送能力的智能体。**"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 129
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 66
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/tools_info.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.15409725904464722
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 593,
            "text": "- 持久化到 &#96;storage/app/ui_ux/design-system/mysaas/MASTER.md&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 594,
            "text": "- 返回持久化路径"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 595
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 596,
            "text": "#### 场景 3：生成页面特定设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 597
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 598,
            "text": "**用户请求**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 599,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 600,
            "text": "生成设计系统，项目名称：MyApp，页面：homepage，并持久化"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 601,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 602
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 603,
            "text": "**Agent 响应**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 604,
            "text": "- 生成设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 605,
            "text": "- 持久化 Master 文件：&#96;MASTER.md&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 606,
            "text": "- 持久化页面覆盖：&#96;pages/homepage.md&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 607,
            "text": "- 返回两个文件的路径"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 608
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 609,
            "text": "### 示例 3：在 Agent 中使用单独的 UI/UX 搜索工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 610
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 611,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 612,
            "text": "Nodes:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 613,
            "text": "  - Key: \"designer\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 614,
            "text": "    Type: \"chat_model\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 615,
            "text": "    Model: \"ui_model\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 616,
            "text": "    SystemPrompt: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 617,
            "text": "      你是一位 UI/UX 设计师。使用 ui_ux_search 工具搜索设计知识库。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 618,
            "text": "    BindTools:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 619,
            "text": "      - \"ui_ux_search\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 620,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 621
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 622,
            "text": "### 示例 4：手动使用设计系统生成和持久化工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 623
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 624,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 625,
            "text": "Nodes:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 626,
            "text": "  - Key: \"designer\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 627,
            "text": "    Type: \"chat_model\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 628,
            "text": "    Model: \"ui_model\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 629,
            "text": "    SystemPrompt: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 630,
            "text": "      你是一位 UI/UX 设计师。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 631,
            "text": "      当用户请求生成设计系统时："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 632,
            "text": "      1. 使用 generate_design_system 生成设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 633,
            "text": "      2. 使用 persist_design_system 持久化到文件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 634,
            "text": "      3. 使用 AppName=\"your_app\" 进行应用隔离"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 635,
            "text": "    BindTools:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 636,
            "text": "      - \"generate_design_system\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 637,
            "text": "      - \"persist_design_system\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 638,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 639
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 640,
            "text": "## 注意事项"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 641
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 642,
            "text": "1. **配置隔离**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 643,
            "text": "   - DigEino 的配置和 DigFlow 的配置是分开的"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 644,
            "text": "   - 如果使用 DigEino 的配置驱动功能，需要单独加载 DigEino 的配置文件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 645,
            "text": "   - 如果使用 DigFlow 的模型注册表，可以直接使用 DigFlow 的模型"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 646
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 647,
            "text": "2. **存储路径**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 648,
            "text": "   - 设计系统默认存储在 &#96;storage/app/ui_ux/&#96; 目录"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 649,
            "text": "   - 可以通过 &#96;AppName&#96; 参数实现应用隔离"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 650,
            "text": "   - 存储路径可以在 DigEino 配置中自定义"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 651
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 652,
            "text": "3. **依赖管理**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 653,
            "text": "   - 确保 &#96;go.mod&#96; 中的 DigEino 版本是最新的"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 654,
            "text": "   - 运行 &#96;go mod tidy&#96; 确保依赖正确"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 655
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 656,
            "text": "4. **工具命名冲突**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 657,
            "text": "   - 如果 DigFlow 中已有同名工具，注册会失败（但不会报错）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 658,
            "text": "   - 建议检查日志确认工具是否注册成功"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 659
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 660,
            "text": "5. **模型名称一致性**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 661,
            "text": "   - 使用 Agent 工具时，&#96;agent.yml&#96; 中的模型名称必须与 &#96;tool_register.go&#96; 中的名称一致"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 661
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 592
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.15298253297805786
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# DigEino 使用指南"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "&#96;DigEino&#96; 是基于 &#96;Eino&#96; 的二次封装，旨在为 Go 项目提供统一的状态追踪、Webhook 回调及配置管理功能。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "## 1. 安装"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "在您的 Go 项目中，通过以下命令导入："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "go get github.com/originaleric/digeino"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "## 2. 配置管理"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "&#96;DigEino&#96; 提供了灵活的配置管理方式，推荐在项目启动时进行初始化。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "### 2.1 依赖结构"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "配置主要包含两个部分："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "- &#96;HttpServer&#96;: 用于获取本地服务端口（构建默认 Webhook URL 时使用）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "- &#96;Status&#96;: 包含 &#96;Webhook&#96; 和 &#96;Store&#96;（存储）的配置。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "### 2.2 使用示例"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "#### 方式 A：从 YAML 文件加载（推荐）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "首先，在您的项目中准备一个 &#96;config.yaml&#96; 文件（可以参考 &#96;DigEino/config/config.yaml&#96;）："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "HttpServer:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "  Api:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "    Port: \":20201\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "Status:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "  Webhook:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "    Enabled: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "    URL: \"https://your-callback-url.com/webhook\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "    Events: [\"complete\", \"error\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "  Store:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "    Enabled: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "    Type: \"memory\" # 或 \"mysql\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "然后在代码中加载："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "import \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "func main() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "    // 加载配置文件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "    _, err := config.Load(\"path/to/your/config.yaml\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "    if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "        panic(err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "#### 方式 B：在代码中手动设置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "import \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "func initConfig() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "    cfg := config.Default()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "    cfg.Status.Webhook.Config.URL = \"https://custom-url.com\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "    config.Set(cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "## 3. 核心功能使用"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "### 3.1 状态存储 (Status Store)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "&#96;DigEino&#96; 支持将执行状态存储在内存或 MySQL 中。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "import \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/status\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "func someProcess() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "    // 获取默认存储实例（根据配置自动选择 memory 或 mysql）"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 80
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/usage.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.1519927978515625
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# 调研员工具集 (Research Tools) 使用指南"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "本工具集旨在让 Agent 具备深度理解代码、文档和互联网信息的能力。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "## 工具列表"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "### 1. 深度检索 (&#96;research_grep&#96;)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "- **功能**：模拟 &#96;grep&#96; 或 &#96;ripgrep&#96;，在指定范围内搜索关键词。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "- **参数**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "  - &#96;query&#96;: 搜索关键词。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "  - &#96;path&#96;: (可选) 相对路径。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "- **最佳实践**：用于发现特定功能在源码中的分布。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "### 2. 精确阅读 (&#96;research_read&#96;)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "- **功能**：读取文件的完整文本。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "- **参数**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "  - &#96;path&#96;: 文件路径。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "- **最佳实践**：在 &#96;research_grep&#96; 找到具体文件后，调用此工具深度阅读代码细节。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "### 3. 文档转 Markdown (&#96;research_doc_to_md&#96;)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "- **功能**：将 PDF、Word、TXT 等文件解析为纯文本 Markdown 结构。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "- **参数**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "  - &#96;path&#96;: 文档路径。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "- **最佳实践**：处理需求说明书、API 文档等非代码类文件。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "### 4. 深度网页爬取 (&#96;firecrawl_scrape&#96;)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "- **功能**：利用 Firecrawl API 深度清理网页噪音，返回结构化的 Markdown 内容。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "- **参数**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "  - &#96;url&#96;: 目标网页地址。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "- **前置条件**：需配置环境变量 &#96;FIRECRAWL_API_KEY&#96; 或在 &#96;eino.yml&#96; 中配置 &#96;Tools.Firecrawl.ApiKey&#96;。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "- **最佳实践**：用于学习最新的第三方 API 文档。作为 L1 轻量级抓取方案，速度快、资源占用低。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "### 5. 高级网页抓取 (&#96;research_jina_reader&#96;)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "- **功能**：使用 Jina Reader (r.jina.ai) 深度读取网页并转换为 Markdown，对微信公众号、知乎等强反爬平台有较好兼容性。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "- **参数**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "  - &#96;url&#96;: 目标网页地址。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "- **前置条件**：无需 API Key（使用公共服务模式）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "- **最佳实践**：当 &#96;firecrawl_scrape&#96; 返回\"环境异常\"或\"验证码\"时，可作为 L2 备选方案。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "### 6. 本地无头浏览器抓取 (&#96;research_local_scraper&#96;)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "- **功能**：使用 go-rod + stealth 绕过复杂反爬（如微信公众号），抓取正文并输出 Text 与 Markdown。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "- **参数**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "  - &#96;url&#96;: 目标网页地址（建议为微信公众号文章等复杂反爬页面）。"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 43
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/research_tools_guide.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.1487528681755066
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "    \"go.uber.org/zap\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212,
            "text": "func init() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "    ctx := context.Background()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215,
            "text": "    // 获取 DigEino 的所有基础工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216,
            "text": "    baseTools, err := digeinoTools.BaseTools(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "    if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218,
            "text": "        logger.Error(\"获取 DigEino 基础工具失败\", zap.Error(err))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219,
            "text": "        return"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "    // 批量注册工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223,
            "text": "    for _, tool := range baseTools {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224,
            "text": "        info, err := tool.Info(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225,
            "text": "        if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226,
            "text": "            logger.Warn(\"获取工具信息失败\", zap.Error(err))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227,
            "text": "            continue"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229,
            "text": "        "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 230,
            "text": "        if err := variable.ToolRegistry.Register(info.Name, tool); err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 231,
            "text": "            logger.Warn(\"工具已存在\", zap.String(\"name\", info.Name))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232,
            "text": "        } else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 233,
            "text": "            logger.Info(\"工具注册成功\", zap.String(\"name\", info.Name))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "text": "**注意**：这种方式会注册 DigEino 的所有基础工具，包括："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240,
            "text": "- &#96;ui_ux_search&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241,
            "text": "- &#96;generate_design_system&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 242,
            "text": "- &#96;persist_design_system&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 243,
            "text": "- &#96;send_wechat_message&#96;（如果配置了微信）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245,
            "text": "### 方式三：使用 UI/UX Agent 工具（推荐）⭐"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 246
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247,
            "text": "**这是最推荐的方式**，Agent 工具会自动完成整个设计系统生成工作流，包括需求分析、生成、补充搜索和持久化。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249,
            "text": "#### 什么是 UI/UX Agent 工具？"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251,
            "text": "&#96;generate_ui_design_system&#96; 是一个智能编排的 Agent 工具，它将整个设计系统生成工作流封装成一个工具。相比单独使用各个工具，Agent 工具的优势是："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253,
            "text": "- ✅ **自动工作流编排**：自动完成需求分析、生成、搜索、持久化"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254,
            "text": "- ✅ **智能决策**：根据用户需求自动决定调用哪些工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 255,
            "text": "- ✅ **完整输出**：一次性返回完整的设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256,
            "text": "- ✅ **简单易用**：只需一个工具调用，无需手动编排"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 257
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258,
            "text": "#### 步骤 1：在 agent.yml 中配置模型"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 259
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 260,
            "text": "在你的应用配置 &#96;app/your_app/config/agent.yml&#96; 中确保有模型配置："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 263,
            "text": "Models:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264,
            "text": "  - Name: \"ui_model\"  # 模型名称，用于 Agent（必须与代码中的名称一致）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265,
            "text": "    "
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 4,
            "line": 264
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 208
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.1482386589050293
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, wecomCustomerMiniprogramTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "\t// 3.1. 接收企业微信客服消息工具（如果已启用回调功能）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "\treceiveWeComCustomerTool, err := wx.NewReceiveWeComCustomerMessageTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, receiveWeComCustomerTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "\t// 4. 通用调研系列工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "\tgrepTool, err := research.NewGrepSearchTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, grepTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "\treadTool, err := research.NewReadFileTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, readTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "\tdocTool, err := research.NewDocToMarkdownTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, docTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "\tfirecrawlTool, err := research.NewFirecrawlTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, firecrawlTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "\twebSearchTool, err := websearch.NewWebSearchTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, webSearchTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "\tsemanticSearchTool, err := research.NewSemanticSearchTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, semanticSearchTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "\tcodeIndexTool, err := research.NewCodeIndexTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, codeIndexTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "\tjinaReaderTool, err := research.NewJinaReaderTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, jinaReaderTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "\twriteFileTool, err := research.NewWriteFileTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, writeFileTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "\t// 5. 本地无头浏览器抓取工具（高级反爬场景，如微信公众号）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "\tlocalScraperTool, err := research.NewLocalScraperTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, localScraperTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "\t// 5.1 本地浏览器通用抓取工具（read/screenshot + cookie 复用）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "\tbrowserBrowseTool, err := research.NewBrowserBrowseTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, browserBrowseTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "\t// 这里未来可以放入通用的 Google 搜索、计算器等跨项目工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,
            "text": "\treturn tools, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 170
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 77,
            "line": 109
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/tools.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.14814400672912598
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 324,
            "text": "    UseGlobal: false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 325
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 326,
            "text": "Nodes:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 327,
            "text": "  - Key: \"designer\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 328,
            "text": "    Type: \"chat_model\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 329,
            "text": "    Model: \"ui_model\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 330,
            "text": "    SystemPrompt: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 331,
            "text": "      你是一位专业的 UI/UX 设计师。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 332,
            "text": "      当用户需要生成设计系统时，使用 generate_ui_design_system 工具。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 333,
            "text": "      这个工具会自动完成："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 334,
            "text": "      1. 分析需求（产品类型、样式、行业、技术栈）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 335,
            "text": "      2. 生成完整设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 336,
            "text": "      3. 补充搜索详细信息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 337,
            "text": "      4. 获取技术栈指南"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 338,
            "text": "      5. 持久化（如果用户请求）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 339,
            "text": "    BindTools:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 340,
            "text": "      - \"generate_ui_design_system\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 341
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 342,
            "text": "  - Key: \"tools\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 343,
            "text": "    Type: \"tools_node\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 344,
            "text": "    Tools:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 345,
            "text": "      - \"generate_ui_design_system\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 346
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 347,
            "text": "Edges:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 348,
            "text": "  - From: \"START\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 349,
            "text": "    To: \"designer\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 350,
            "text": "  - From: \"tools\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 351,
            "text": "    To: \"designer\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 352
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 353,
            "text": "Branches:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 354,
            "text": "  - From: \"designer\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 355,
            "text": "    Condition: \"has_tool_calls\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 356,
            "text": "    Targets:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 357,
            "text": "      - Key: \"tools\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 358,
            "text": "        When: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 359,
            "text": "      - Key: \"END\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 360,
            "text": "        When: false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 361,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 362
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 363,
            "text": "#### 替代方式：使用 DigEino 配置创建 Agent"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 364
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 365,
            "text": "如果你想要使用 DigEino 的配置系统（而不是 DigFlow 的模型），可以这样做："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 366
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 367,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 368,
            "text": "package tools"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 369
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 370,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 371,
            "text": "    \"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 372,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 373,
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/internal/global/variable\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 374,
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/internal/utils/logger\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 375,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 376,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 377,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 378,
            "text": "    \"go.uber.org/zap\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 379,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 380
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 381,
            "text": "func init() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 382,
            "text": "    ctx := context.Background()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 383,
            "text": "    "
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 383
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 323
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.14799213409423828
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 263,
            "text": "Models:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264,
            "text": "  - Name: \"ui_model\"  # 模型名称，用于 Agent（必须与代码中的名称一致）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265,
            "text": "    Type: \"qwen\"      # 或 \"openai\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 266,
            "text": "    Config:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 267,
            "text": "      api_key: \"${QWEN_API_KEY}\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 268,
            "text": "      model: \"qwen-max\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 269,
            "text": "      base_url: \"https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 270,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 271
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 272,
            "text": "#### 步骤 2：注册 Agent 工具（使用 DigFlow 的模型）⭐ 推荐"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 273
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274,
            "text": "**推荐方式**：使用 DigFlow 的 ModelRegistry 获取 ChatModel"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 275
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 276,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 277,
            "text": "package tools"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 278
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 279,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 280,
            "text": "    \"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 281,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 282,
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/internal/global/variable\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 283,
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/internal/utils/logger\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 286,
            "text": "    \"go.uber.org/zap\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 287,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 288
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 289,
            "text": "func init() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 290,
            "text": "    ctx := context.Background()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 291,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 292,
            "text": "    // 从 DigFlow 的 ModelRegistry 获取 ChatModel"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 293,
            "text": "    // 注意：模型名称必须与 agent.yml 中配置的 Model Name 一致"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 294,
            "text": "    chatModel, err := variable.ModelRegistry.GetChatModel(\"ui_model\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 295,
            "text": "    if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 296,
            "text": "        logger.Error(\"获取 ChatModel 失败\", "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 297,
            "text": "            zap.String(\"model_name\", \"ui_model\"),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 298,
            "text": "            zap.Error(err))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 299,
            "text": "        return"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 300,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 301,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 302,
            "text": "    // 创建 UI/UX Agent 工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 303,
            "text": "    agentTool, err := ui_ux.NewUIDesignSystemAgentTool(ctx, chatModel)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 304,
            "text": "    if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 305,
            "text": "        logger.Error(\"创建 UI/UX Agent 工具失败\", zap.Error(err))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 306,
            "text": "        return"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 307,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 308,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 309,
            "text": "    // 注册工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 310,
            "text": "    if err := variable.ToolRegistry.Register(\"generate_ui_design_system\", agentTool); err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 311,
            "text": "        logger.Warn(\"UI/UX Agent 工具已存在\", zap.String(\"name\", \"generate_ui_design_system\"))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 312,
            "text": "    } else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 313,
            "text": "        logger.Info(\"UI/UX Agent 工具注册成功\", zap.String(\"name\", \"generate_ui_design_system\"))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 314,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 315,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 316,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 317
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 318,
            "text": "#### 步骤 3：在 agent.yml 中配置工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 319
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 320,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 321,
            "text": "Tools:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 322,
            "text": "  - Name: \"generate_ui_design_system\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 323,
            "text": "    Description: \"生成完整的 UI/UX 设计系统（智能编排 Agent）\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 324,
            "text": "    UseGlobal: false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 325
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 326,
            "text": "Nodes:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 327,
            "text": "  - Key: \"designer\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 328,
            "text": "    Type: \"chat_model\""
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 328
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 260
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.14703139662742615
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "**下一步行动计划（TODO）**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "1. 在 CentOS 实验环境安装基础库和字体。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "2. 在 DigEino 库中实现 &#96;browser_browse&#96; 插件（包含实例池和僵尸进程回收机制）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "3. 更新 DigFlow 的 &#96;agent.yml&#96; 配置并调整 Prompt 接入使用。y"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 119
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 114
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/2026-02-22_基于本地无头浏览器的防微反爬策略.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.14478899538516998
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 729,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 730
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 731,
            "text": "如果你的工具在应用级别注册，使用 &#96;UseGlobal: false&#96;。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 732
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 733,
            "text": "## 参考"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 734
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 735,
            "text": "- [DigEino UI/UX 工具文档](../../tools/ui_ux/README.md)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 736,
            "text": "- [DigFlow 工具注册文档](https://github.com/your-org/digflow/blob/main/README.md)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 737,
            "text": "- [DigEino 更新日志](../../updates/2026-02-01_ui_ux_config_and_storage_improvements.md)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 738,
            "text": "- [Agent 实现代码](../../tools/ui_ux/agent.go)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 739,
            "text": "- [Agent 工具包装代码](../../tools/ui_ux/agent_tool.go)"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 739
          },

          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package tools"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\t\"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/schema\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/research\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/research/websearch\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/wx\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "// safeTool 安全的工具包装器，用于处理错误"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "type safeTool struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "\ttool.InvokableTool"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "func (s safeTool) Info(ctx context.Context) (*schema.ToolInfo, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "\treturn s.InvokableTool.Info(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "func (s safeTool) InvokableRun(ctx context.Context, argumentsInJSON string, opts ...tool.Option) (string, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\tout, e := s.InvokableTool.InvokableRun(ctx, argumentsInJSON, opts...)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "\tif e != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "\t\treturn e.Error(), nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "\treturn out, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "// SafeInferTool 安全地创建工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "func SafeInferTool[T, D any](toolName, toolDesc string, i utils.InvokeFunc[T, D]) (tool.InvokableTool, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "\tt, err := utils.InferTool(toolName, toolDesc, i)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "\treturn safeTool{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "\t\tInvokableTool: t,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "\t}, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "// BaseTools 获取 digeino 提供的通用基础工具集"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "func BaseTools(ctx context.Context) ([]tool.BaseTool, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "\tvar tools []tool.BaseTool"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "\t// 1. UI/UX 设计智能工具"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 31,
            "line": 48
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/tools.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.14075499773025513
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "package yourappbootstrap"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/bootstrap/common\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "    _ \"DigFlow/app/your_app/tools\"  // 导入工具包，触发 init() 注册"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "    // ... 其他导入"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "func init() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "    common.InitCommon()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "    // ... 其他初始化逻辑"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "#### 步骤 3：在 agent.yml 中配置工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "在你的应用配置 &#96;app/your_app/config/agent.yml&#96; 中添加工具："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "Tools:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "  - Name: \"ui_ux_search\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168,
            "text": "    Description: \"检索 UI/UX 设计知识库\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "    UseGlobal: false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,
            "text": "  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "  - Name: \"generate_design_system\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "    Description: \"生成完整设计系统\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "    UseGlobal: false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174,
            "text": "  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "  - Name: \"persist_design_system\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176,
            "text": "    Description: \"持久化设计系统到文件\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177,
            "text": "    UseGlobal: false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179,
            "text": "Nodes:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180,
            "text": "  - Key: \"designer\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181,
            "text": "    Type: \"chat_model\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182,
            "text": "    Model: \"qwen-max\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": "    SystemPrompt: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184,
            "text": "      你是一位专业的 UI/UX 设计师。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185,
            "text": "      你可以使用以下工具："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186,
            "text": "      - ui_ux_search: 搜索设计知识库"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187,
            "text": "      - generate_design_system: 生成完整设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188,
            "text": "      - persist_design_system: 持久化设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 189,
            "text": "    BindTools:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 190,
            "text": "      - \"ui_ux_search\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 191,
            "text": "      - \"generate_design_system\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 192,
            "text": "      - \"persist_design_system\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 194
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195,
            "text": "### 方式二：批量注册所有工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 196
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "如果你想要使用 DigEino 提供的所有基础工具（包括 UI/UX 工具和微信工具），可以使用 &#96;BaseTools()&#96; 函数："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200,
            "text": "package tools"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203,
            "text": "    \"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/internal/global/variable\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/internal/utils/logger\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "    digeinoTools \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "    \"go.uber.org/zap\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212,
            "text": "func init() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "    ctx := context.Background()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "    "
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 214
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 146
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.1372727006673813
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# DigEino Updates - 2026-01-02"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "## Overview"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "Enhanced the &#96;StatusCollector&#96; and improved type compatibility to better support complex integrations like &#96;DigFlow&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "## Changes"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "### Webhook Module"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "- **&#96;StatusCollector&#96; Enhancements**:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "    - Added &#96;GetExecutionID()&#96;: Allows retrieving the associated Execution ID."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "    - Added &#96;GetStatusHistory()&#96;: Returns a snapshot of the execution status history."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    - Added &#96;GetTotalUsage()&#96;: Returns the aggregated Token Usage for the session."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "- **Interface Decoupling**:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "    - Refactored &#96;StatusStoreInterface&#96;: Removed &#96;CreateExecution&#96; from the base interface in the &#96;webhook&#96; package. This allows for cleaner separation of concerns, as execution creation is typically handled at the controller/application level."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "### Status Module"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "- **Compatibility Fix**:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    - Standardized &#96;StatusStore&#96; implementation to match the updated &#96;webhook.StatusStoreInterface&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "### Tools Module"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "- **&#96;BaseTools&#96; Setup**:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "    - Initialized &#96;BaseTools&#96; function in &#96;tools.go&#96; to provide a central registry for shared cross-project tools."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "## Versioning"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "- Released as **v1.0.2**."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 25
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/updates/20260102.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.13596199452877045
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "text": "func CodeIndex(ctx context.Context, req *CodeIndexRequest) (*CodeIndexResponse, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240,
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get().Tools"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241,
            "text": "\tsearchPath := req.Path"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 242,
            "text": "\tif searchPath == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 243,
            "text": "\t\tsearchPath = \".\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 246,
            "text": "\t// 1. Loader"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247,
            "text": "\tldr, err := file.NewFileLoader(ctx, \u0026file.FileLoaderConfig{})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252,
            "text": "\t// 2. Splitter"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253,
            "text": "\tspl, err := markdown.NewHeaderSplitter(ctx, \u0026markdown.HeaderConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254,
            "text": "\t\tHeaders: map[string]string{\"#\": \"h1\", \"##\": \"h2\"},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 255,
            "text": "\t})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 257,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 259
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 260,
            "text": "\t// 3. Indexer"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261,
            "text": "\tidxConn, err := createPineconeConn(cfg.Pinecone.ApiKey, cfg.Pinecone.Host)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 263,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 266,
            "text": "\tembedder, err := openai.NewEmbedder(ctx, \u0026openai.EmbeddingConfig{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 267,
            "text": "\t\tAPIKey:     cfg.Embedding.ApiKey,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 268,
            "text": "\t\tBaseURL:    cfg.Embedding.BaseUrl,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 269,
            "text": "\t\tModel:      cfg.Embedding.Model,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 270,
            "text": "\t\tDimensions: \u0026cfg.Embedding.Dimensions,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 271,
            "text": "\t})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 272,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 273,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 275
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 276,
            "text": "\tidx := \u0026PineconeIndexer{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 277,
            "text": "\t\tindexConn: idxConn,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 278,
            "text": "\t\tembedder:  embedder,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 279,
            "text": "\t\tnamespace: cfg.Pinecone.Namespace,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 280,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 281
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 282,
            "text": "\t// 4. Graph"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 283,
            "text": "\tg := compose.NewGraph[document.Source, []string]()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284,
            "text": "\t_ = g.AddLoaderNode(\"loader\", ldr)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285,
            "text": "\t_ = g.AddDocumentTransformerNode(\"splitter\", spl)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 286,
            "text": "\t_ = g.AddIndexerNode(\"indexer\", idx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 287
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 288,
            "text": "\t_ = g.AddEdge(compose.START, \"loader\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 289,
            "text": "\t_ = g.AddEdge(\"loader\", \"splitter\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 290,
            "text": "\t_ = g.AddEdge(\"splitter\", \"indexer\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 291,
            "text": "\t_ = g.AddEdge(\"indexer\", compose.END)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 292
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 293,
            "text": "\trunnable, err := g.Compile(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 294,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 295,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 296,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 297
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 298,
            "text": "\t// 5. Execution Logic (Dir vs File)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 299,
            "text": "\tvar totalDocs int"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 300
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 301,
            "text": "\tinfo, err := os.Stat(searchPath)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 302,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 303,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"无法访问路径: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 304,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 305
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 306,
            "text": "\tprocessFile := func(path string) error {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 307,
            "text": "\t\t_, err := runnable.Invoke(ctx, document.Source{URI: path})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 308,
            "text": "\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 309,
            "text": "\t\t\t// 记录错误但继续处理"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 310,
            "text": "\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"索引文件失败 %s: %v\\n\", path, err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 311,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 312,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 313,
            "text": "\t\ttotalDocs++"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 314,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 315,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 316
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 317,
            "text": "\tif info.IsDir()"
          }
        ],
